He didn’t intend to make the Stone family lose face in front of his family, but they seemed to ask for it. So there was no need for him to cover up for them anymore. 
He turned around and ordered Corbin, “Show them.” 
Under everyone’s confused gazes, Corbin took out his mobile phone and showed the surveillance video of Harriet asking Lilian to change the flowers.
###Chapter 576
“Miss Stone, do you have anything else to say?” Maurice asked. 
“I… Well, I…” 
The evidence was irrefutable. How else could Harriet deny it? 
At this moment, Bonita’s face darkened too. 
Maurice stared at Harriet expressionlessly for a while. Then he asked coldly, “Did you pick on Eliana yesterday?” 
Harriet was so frightened that she shuddered and grabbed Bonita’s arm tightly. 
Maurice didn’t wait for her to answer. He continued, “This is not the first time, right? Last time you deliberately made yourself have an allergic reaction to frame Eliana with your own life. You have completely crossed the bottom line of the Moran family this time.” 
Every word he said made Harriet’s face grow paler and paler. 
Earle and Nancy were shocked by the truth. 
Seeing their reaction, Bonita felt heartbroken. She turned to Harriet and said aloud, “Harriet, tell me the truth. Did you really do it?” 
Harriet replied stubbornly, “Mom, I just didn’t want to give up just like that. I…” 
“That’s enough!” 
Before she could finish her words, Bonita interrupted her with a grim face. Bonita took her hand, stood up, and apologized to Earle, “Mr. Moran, I apologize to you on behalf of Harriet. I didn’t expect that she would do so many wrong things behind my back. I hope you will forgive her today.”
Bonita apologized so sincerely that Earle didn’t know what to say. 
In the end, Bonita and Harriet didn’t have the face to stay in the Moran family’s house longer, so they immediately left. 
After they left, the atmosphere in the Moran family’s house became even more depressing. 
Nancy looked at Maurice, and then at Earle. She was caught between her grandson and her husband. She was in a dilemma now. 
She knew that Earle wanted Maurice to marry Harriet because she was also from a wealthy and influential family. 
But with Maurice’s stubborn character, he would never allow anyone to make the decision for him, not even his own grandfather. He would never marry someone he didn’t like. 
Maurice and Earle always clashed because of many differences. Nancy didn’t know who to side with, so she could only try her best to balance. 
“Earle, don’t lose your temper now. Honestly, I’m not satisfied with Harriet. So it was good that Maurice cut the Gordian knot quickly. Fortunately, Bonita had a clear mind. I don’t think what happened today will affect the relationship between the Stone family and the Moran family.” 
Maurice couldn’t help but sneer, “Grandma, you think too highly of her. Mrs. Stone is not as simple as you think.” 
When he said this, Earle snorted coldly but didn’t contradict him. 
“I’ve been investigating them. Mrs. Stone’s husband and first daughter died in an avalanche. So she doted on Harriet, her only daughter. Now she is a mother and the head of Stone Group at the same
time. She is a ruthless and resourceful person who can run the entire company by herself. She won’t let her daughter do anything recklessly.” 
Earle and Nancy thought that Maurice’s analysis was very reasonable. Nancy stared at Maurice as if she was seeing the energetic Blair. 
The little boy who didn’t know anything back then had grown into an independent and capable man. 
If Blair and Brenda could see him now, they would feel happy and proud. 
With tears in her eyes, Nancy said, “You’re right, Maurice. Since this is the case, there’s no need for you to marry Harriet. You can choose your future wife by yourself.” 
“Choose? I think he has already chosen,” Earle chimed in grimly. 
“Maurice, let me ask you a question. Are you with that Eliana again?” 
Eliana’s name was taboo in the Moran family. As long as any of them mentioned it, the atmosphere would instantly become tense. 
“Yes,” Maurice answered without hesitation. He didn’t want to hide the truth anymore. 
When Earle saw Maurice look so calm admitting it, he fumed with rage. But he was angry not only at Maurice but more at Eliana. 
He was a wise old man. But in the end, he was fooled by a young woman. 
“As expected, you are together behind my back. I thought that although that woman is poor, at least she knows how to keep her words. I didn’t expect that she would go back on her promise now. She is really from a lowly family.”
Earle was so overwhelmed by anger that he unexpectedly revealed the secret agreement between him and Eliana. 
This made Maurice’s head buzz. All the clues he had ignored were suddenly connected, allowing him to draw an astonishing conclusion. 
It turned out that Eliana’s disappearance had something to do with Earle.
###Chapter 577
“Grandpa, why did Eliana suddenly leave? Did you do something to her?” 
Although Maurice already had an answer in his heart, he still asked this question. 
Earle didn’t admit or deny it. But with a sullen face, he threatened, “It seems that you still haven’t learned your lesson last time. Isn’t it enough to experience losing the power in your hands? I can actually give everything to Gerald. Are you really forcing me to do it?” 
Because of Earle’s words, Maurice was also provoked. “If you want to do it, give it a try. I actually don’t mind. Don’t forget that the power my uncle has been dreaming of is still in my hands.” 
As Maurice spoke, he defiantly touched the ring on his right hand. 
This ruby ring was lost but was found again. It represented the supreme power of the Mason family. And this was also giving him the confidence to fight back against Earle. Because even if he lost the Moran Group, he had other choices. 
What Maurice said had completely angered Earle. The Mason family was his Achilles heel. And over the years, no one had dared to mention it. 
Back then, Earle’s son Blair fell in love with Brenda, the daughter of the Mason family. But he opposed the relationship between the two and disagreed with their marriage. However, who would have thought Blair would be so stubborn? The more he hindered their relationship, the more determined Blair was. One day, Blair and Brenda eloped despite the formidable obstacles and later gave birth to a son and a daughter. 
Then a tragedy happened later. Blair and Brenda were both killed in a car accident. This disaster was a heavy blow to the Moran family. The situation was so serious to the point that the members of the Moran family almost broke up.
And now, Maurice wanted to follow in his father’s footsteps and repeat the same mistake. How could Earle not get angry? 
“Damn you! You’re such an asshole!” 
Earle was so angry that he trembled all over, and blue veins stood out on the back of his hand holding the cane. It was as if he was going to smash it towards Maurice the next second. 
Listening to their exchange of hurtful words, Nancy knew she could not stop them. 
The atmosphere between the grandfather and grandson was too tense for her to intervene. 
Just as the battle was about to break out, Silas ran downstairs with his drawing board on his back. He sandwiched himself between Maurice and Earle, looked at each of them, and asked, “Great-grandpa, Uncle, are you free now? Can you help me with my homework?” 
Since the little boy was between them, Earle and Maurice subconsciously restrained themselves. 
Then Earle said gently, “Silas, go play in your room first. Your uncle and I have something to talk about.” 
But actually, Silas didn’t just come here to ask the two men to help him with his homework. He looked up and winked at Nancy beside him. 
Nancy immediately understood what he meant. So she also cooperated with him. 
“Silas, what homework is that? Is it very important?” 
Silas deliberately emphasized, “Of course! Our teacher told us that we must finish it. We have to submit it on Monday. If I’m the only one who failed to do it, what would I do?”
“If they don’t want to help you, then let me do it. What’s your homework today?” Nancy continued to act with Silas in front of Maurice and Earle. 
“Great-grandma, it’s about family,” Silas replied, deliberately raising his voice. “I want to draw Uncle and Great-grandpa. But…” 
He didn’t finish his words. Instead, he lowered his head in disappointment. 
“You two, why don’t you help Silas finish his homework? Look at how sad he is now.” 
In the end, Earle and Maurice compromised. They posed according to Silas’ instructions. It seemed that Silas and Nancy’s efforts were not in vain. 
In the process, the two people who were not on good terms suddenly had to be close and intimate with each other. Obviously, both of them felt awkward. 
Silas looked at Earle’s and Maurice’s poses with satisfaction and started to draw. Nancy stood beside him, supervising the poses of the two big men. 
As time went on, Earle’s and Maurice’s anger gradually subsided. 
When Earle looked at Maurice, he was reminded of Blair. 
They were both stubborn and intelligent. Did this mean Maurice would also be like Blair in the future? Would Maurice leave his family because of a woman?
###Chapter 578
Harriet found it hard to accept that she was just dragged by Bonita out of the Moran family’s house. 
Finally, she broke out. 
She shook off Bonita’s hand and asked unwillingly, “Mom, why didn’t you help me deal with the Moran family just now? Why did you even protect that bitch Eliana?” 
Bonita felt Harriet was really being unreasonable. She always made trouble out of nothing. So Bonita warned her again, “Didn’t I tell you not to mess with Eliana? You don’t know her that much. Her background is not as simple as you think.” 
“Then tell me! How will I know if you don’t tell me? Who the hell is that bitch? How come we can’t afford to offend her? We are the Stone family, after all.” 
Was Eliana born into a noble family? How could it be possible? For Harriet, this was the most doubtful and unacceptable thing. 
“Stop talking nonsense!” At this time, Bonita was already very angry at her rebellious daughter. “I haven’t taught you a lesson yet. Have you gone out of your mind? How could you risk your own life to frame your rival in love just because of a man? Have you ever thought if it’s worth it or not?” 
“Mom, it’s worth it. I want Maurice. And I’ll get him at all costs.” 
As she said this, Harriet had a ferocious look on her face. It was as if she was being possessed. 
Bonita looked at Harriet in disbelief. She couldn’t believe that the daughter she had always been proud of was now desperate for a man. What had happened? 
She was so furious that she raised her hand and gave Harriet a hard slap in the face.
The impact made Harriet turn her head to the side. And she was totally stunned. Bonita always doted on her. She didn’t understand why Bonita would beat her now because of someone else. 
“Are you sober now?” Bonita asked, her hand still trembling. Then she added angrily, “When I wanted you to be engaged with Maurice, I asked you to help me get the Moran Group, not to make you infatuated with him.” 
Bonita’s words were like a sharp blade that pierced through Harriet’s heart. She couldn’t bear it anymore, so she broke into tears and ran away, covering her face. 
Bonita could do nothing but just watch Harriet’s back helplessly, feeling a dull pain in her temples. 
She told herself, “Forget it. Give her some time, and she’ll figure it out one day.” 
Bonita was still lost in thought when a mysterious black car stopped in front of her. 
She pondered for a moment and got in the car. 
It turned out that Gerald was also in the back seat. He smiled at her and said sincerely, “Mrs. Stone, are you interested in talking to me now?” 
“I don’t know what you want to talk about.” Bonita played dumb. 
“Don’t play dumb in front of me.” Gerald turned his head and looked at her with eyes full of madness, “As long as you help me bring Maurice down, I will help you carve up the Moran Group.” 
Now Gerald didn’t care about the Moran Group anymore. All he wanted was to defeat Maurice and make him doomed forever. 
Bonita looked at the crazy Gerald with a gloomy expression.
Before, she wanted to get the Moran Group. But now, her ambition was more than that. She wanted more. 
“Gerald, I’ll tell you the truth. What I want is more than just the Moran Group.” 
“What do you mean? Aside from Moran Group, what else do you want?” 
Gerald was stunned. He didn’t know what else could be more valuable than the Moran Group. 
Bonita sneered, “I’m afraid you still don’t know the background of Maurice’s girlfriend.” 
“Do you mean Eliana Pierce?” Now, Gerald was more confused. “Isn’t she the daughter of the Pierce family? What else can she have?” 
“The problem is… Her mother’s maiden name is White,” Bonita said slowly. “Ingrid was a well-known beauty in the past, and she came from an even more prominent family. But later, the White family fell into decline. It was at that time that she left the White family and married into the Pierce family. But later, the White family rebuilt their business and made a comeback. Their situation has been even greater in recent years. If the White family knows that Ingrid’s daughter has been out there, they will definitely take her back.” 
As Bonita explained Eliana’s background to Gerald, there was a hint of fear and imperceptible jealousy in her tone. 
When Gerald heard this familiar name, his mind traveled back in time. 
Ingrid’s voice and appearance appeared in his mind again. All these years, he wanted to forget her, but he just couldn’t.
And every time he thought that such a beautiful woman committed suicide for Lemuel, he could not accept it. 
But somehow, he couldn’t help but feel a little fortunate. Ingrid did not completely disappear. Because Eliana, who had inherited her beautiful face, appeared. 
Maybe he still had a chance.
###Chapter 579
As night fell, Eliana thought of her promise to Maurice this morning. So she went to the kitchen and unwittingly prepared a sumptuous dinner. After setting up the table, she looked at it only to realize that tonight there seemed to be a feast. 
Time quietly passed as Eliana kept track of the time. She patiently watched as the clock’s hour hand slowly ran from six o’clock to eight o’clock. Now it was almost nine o’clock, but there was no sign of Maurice coming home yet. 
“Mommy, when is Mr. Moran coming? I’m starving,” Aileen complained, sitting on the sofa and rubbing her belly with her little hands. When she stared at the big meal on the table, her mouth watered, and she almost drooled. 
“I think that bad guy doesn’t want to come, so he stands us up.” 
Adrian had always disliked Maurice. And now that Maurice was late, he disdained Maurice even more. 
Eliana looked at the door disappointedly. Then she gradually stopped looking forward to Maurice’s coming. 
It was too late now. She didn’t want to wait any longer and starve her children. 
“Okay, kids. Since you’re hungry, let’s eat first.” 
As soon as Adrian and Aileen sat at the table, they devoured the food. Eliana, on the other hand, lost her appetite when she looked at the table full of food. 
Her mind was obviously not on eating but on something else. She glanced at her phone on the table every now and then as if waiting for a call or text from someone.
When Aileen noticed Eliana’s abnormality, she put down her fork and knife, looked at Eliana with concern, and asked, “Mommy, are you thinking of Mr. Moran?” 
Eliana only came back to her senses after Aileen called her out several times. She answered Aileen’s question guiltily, “Of course not. I am not thinking of him.” 
However, Aileen had already seen through her lie. The little girl secretly forked a piece of pepper and put it on Eliana’s plate. 
Eliana was in a trance, totally unaware of what Aileen was doing. So she naturally forked the pepper and put it into her mouth. 
As soon as she bit it, the spicy taste exploded in her mouth. 
“Ahhh! It’s so spicy!” 
She grimaced and hurriedly spat out the pepper. It was so spicy that tears welled up in her eyes. Her face flushed at once. 
Since Aileen’s prank was successful, she covered her mouth and snickered. 
Instead of getting angry, Eliana was amused. “You… You are such a naughty girl. Good thing you are cute.” 
She smiled helplessly, and stroke Aileen’s hair. 
Adrian couldn’t stand Eliana’s distracted look too. He hesitated for a while before he finally said, “Mommy, if you are really worried about that bad guy, why don’t you call him and ask?” 
Eliana thought Adrian’s idea made sense. So she plucked up her courage, picked up her phone, and called Maurice.
Maurice was still in the Moran family’s house. When he saw Eliana’s name flashing on the screen of his phone, it was only then that he remembered their agreement this morning. 
He couldn’t help smiling when he answered the phone. He asked, “Are you still waiting for me to come home for dinner?” 
“Of course not! You’re flattering yourself too much!” Eliana quickly retorted. 
“I’m happy to know that you’re waiting for me.” 
Maurice’s voice was filled with obvious joy. 
Eliana’s face quickly flushed. After being seen through by Maurice, she was too embarrassed to say a word. 
Before she could even recover from the embarrassment, Maurice changed the topic. “Eliana, did my grandfather force you to leave me before?” 
Eliana was stunned for a moment. How did Maurice know about it? 
Could it be that Earle told him? 
For a moment, she didn’t know what to say. She actually couldn’t tell the truth. 
How could she tell Maurice that she and Earle had a deal? Their agreement was simple. As long as she left, Maurice could take the Moran Group back. And to avoid getting Maurice into trouble, she ran away. 
Eliana knew Maurice too well. He would go crazy if he knew. 
But her silence had actually given him the answer.
And this made him furious. 
He was so furious that he couldn’t wait to stand in front of her and kiss her lips fiercely. Then he would tell her how stupid the decision she made was. 
But at this moment, Maurice could only speak to Eliana on the phone. So he said in a tone that seemed threatening but also pleading, “Eliana, listen carefully. I won’t lose everything because of my grandfather’s suppression. I want you to promise me that from now on, you will never leave me for whatever reason. Do you understand?” 
At this moment, Eliana felt that the wall she had built in her heart with great difficulty collapsed. 
And it was Maurice’s attack that made it collapse. Then those suppressed emotions in her heart poured out like a flood that was hard to contain. 
Her hand holding the phone trembled slightly. No words could fully express her feelings right now. Finally, she condensed it in two sentences. 
“Maurice, don’t underestimate yourself. I have nowhere to go.” 
Both her body and her heart had nowhere to go.
###Chapter 580
Was Eliana making him a promise? 
Maurice’s heart skipped a beat. He seriously warned, “Eliana, remember what you said today. If you run away again…” 
However, he was unable to finish his sentence. 
The thing was that every time he threatened Eliana, no matter how serious he was, he would end up being softhearted and the so-called punishment would remain in abeyance. 
That had happened so often that he couldn’t find anything to threaten Eliana this time. Maurice never managed to get really angry with Eliana and that bothered him a bit. Could he ever make her to be scared of his threat again? 
He couldn’t answer that question either. 
“Don’t worry. I won’t run away again.” 
When Eliana said these words, she suddenly felt like everything was settled. A sense of undisguised bitterness suddenly rose in her heart. However, she also felt a strange sweet feeling in her heart. 
She was no longer alone. From now on, there was someone in the world who loved her and cared about her. 
Maurice and Eliana were silent for a moment, each holding their phone to their ear. It was as if they could hear each other’s heartbeat gradually quickening. 
It was Maurice who broke the silence. “By the way, I was delayed by something and that is why I didn’t come back for dinner,” Maurice explained, feeling guilty for breaking his promise tonight.
“It’s okay. I didn’t really expect you to come anyway, so I just casually cooked something. You can come next time,” Eliana replied calmly. 
It didn’t take much for Maurice and Eliana to really feel like they were a couple. 
Aileen and Adrian, who were standing behind their mother, clearly saw what was going on. 
Aileen put on a serious look and asked to her brother, “Adrian, do you think Mommy is in love?” 
“Don’t talk nonsense! Mommy spends her days with us. When did she have the time to meet someone and fall in love?” Adrian replied with a pout. 
At this moment, Aileen’s eyes lit up and she said excitedly, “What about Mr. Moran? I really think Mommy is in love. Nana was like this when she was in a relationship last time!” 
At the mention of Maurice, Adrian immediately pulled a long face. 
Although he didn’t want to admit it, he also had a feeling that his mother might be in love, and the person she was dating was probably the man he hated the most. 
“But… I don’t like that bad guy! I don’t want Mommy to be with him,” Adrian protested. 
Aileen pursed her lips and snorted. “Adrian, you never like any man who is too close to Mommy. In the past, it was Mr. Bowman you didn’t like!” 
That was right. Jonathan! 
How could he forget him? 
All of a sudden, an idea struck Adrian.
He remembered that before they came back, Jonathan had told him that if he and his mother were unhappy, he could call Jonathan at any time. 
Now was the right time to call him! 
Adrian’s heart began to beat faster. However, on second thought, he felt that Jonathan also had a thing for his mother. He suddenly wasn’t so sure about calling Jonathan anymore. 
Adrian thought hard, trying to judge which of Maurice and Jonathan was the most hateful. After thinking for a long time, he took his smart watch and secretly texted Jonathan, telling him about their recent situation. 
Adrian paid attention to his words when sending the message and didn’t make his intentions clear right away. He wanted to probe Jonathan first. 
After sending the message, he lay in the bed, his eyes fixed on his smart watch as he waited for Jonathan’s reply. 
He waited for a long time but there was no reply. 
Why was Mr. Bowman so silent at this critical moment? If nothing was done, his mother would be taken away by the bad guy. 
The mere thought of it made Adrian furious. He threw his smart watch aside and buried his face in the pillows. Slowly, he fell asleep. 
What Adrian didn’t know was that when he texted Jonathan asking him to come home, Jonathan had just got off the plane. 
He was in this city.
In the wee hours of the morning, outside the empty airport, the sound of a fleet of luxury cars suddenly broke the silence of the night. The cars slowly stopped. A group of well-trained bodyguards in black got out of the cars and quickly lined up in two lines. 
Moments later, a man in a gray overcoat walked out of the airport, surrounded by many people. 
An assistant in a suit walked up to him, bowed and asked, “Mr. Bowman, are you going to see Miss Pierce now?”
###Chapter 581
The man dressed in the gray overcoat was tall, handsome, and looked put together. He gave off an air of sophistication and virtue. 
When he entered the room, everyone felt an air of authority around him. It made people tread carefully in his presence. 
Jonathan paused for a moment after hearing the assistant’s question. His eyes glanced at the poster of Maurice hanging outside of the airport. 
“I wonder… is that Maurice?” he murmured bitterly to himself. His stoic face was laced with bitterness. 
“Mr. Bowman?” the assistant addressed him tentatively. 
Jonathan still hadn’t responded. 
He looked away from the poster before replying, “That’s not necessary. Ask her to come and see me face to face.” 
“But…” The assistant seemed hesitant and embarrassed to continue. “Miss Pierce hasn’t been in contact with us for some time. I’m worried that…” he finally said after a few moments of hesitation. 
Jonathan’s brows furrowed at his words. “Find a way to make it happen! Also, we need to watch Maurice now that we’ve lost contact with Eliana. Since he once took Eliana away and imprisoned her for some time, I’m going to bet he’ll prevent me from seeing her. He’s a dangerous man.” 
“I understand, Mr. Bowman.” 
The assistant had no choice but to do as Jonathan wished. 
After that, they didn’t speak another word.
In his head, Jonathan was muttering curses as he gazed at the strange city sprawling in front of him. 
Now that he was back, he believed that there was nowhere for Eliana to run away this time. 
The morning after that, Eliana woke up early to bring the children to school. 
While Eliana was freshening up, Adrian entered the bathroom. Dark circles were visible underneath his eyes. 
“Adrian, what were you doing last night?” Eliana asked as she took in his sleep deprived state. “Did you have trouble sleeping?” 
Adrian couldn’t tell her why he didn’t get much sleep last night. The truth was, he was waiting for Jonathan’s reply. He stammered, “I’m fine, Mommy. I…I had a nightmare last night.” 
Eliana believed him and didn’t push further. She packed up their belongings and brought them to the kindergarten. 
Adrian was silent on the drive there. His mind was far away even while he was in class. 
Aileen could tell that her brother was acting strange. “Adrian, is something wrong?” she asked tentatively. “You’ve been acting weird since you woke up this morning,” she continued. 
“Aileen…” 
Adrian wanted to confess to his sister that he contacted Jonathan. However, he suddenly remembered that his sister was fond of Maurice. 
Aileen would be furious with him when she discovered he had texted Jonathan behind her back and asked Jonathan to take Maurice away from them. 
He hesitated as he tried to figure out how to explain himself.
“Aileen, are you sure you like Silas’ uncle?” he finally asked. 
“Are you talking about Mr. Moran?” Aileen’s eyes lit up at the mention of Maurice. “Of course! I like him a lot,” she exclaimed without hesitation. 
“Why? What’s so great about him?” Adrian probed. 
“He’s a handsome man, and he’s always been nice to me. He even gave me a hug and gifted me flowers.” 
Aileen counted all the kind gestures Maurice had done for her on her little fingers. 
Adrian interrupted her and asked, “Isn’t Mr. Bowman also an attractive man who treated you well? Don’t you like him?” 
Aileen was surprised to hear her brother mention Jonathan. Her eyes dropped to the floor as she thought about his question. After a few moments, she responded, “It’s not that I don’t like Mr. Bowman. He’s also a good man. Mommy doesn’t seem to like him, though. I think she prefers Mr. Moran to Mr. Bowman. I like whoever Mommy likes!” 
Adrian was taken aback by her words. He couldn’t deny the truth in her words. There was nothing else he could do but sigh in frustration. 
It was Jonathan’s fault that he failed to win their mother’s heart! 
Eliana rushed to the factory after dropping the twins at school. 
Little did she know someone was following her. 
As she was about to enter the factory, a crowd appeared out of nowhere and blocked her path.
When Eliana noticed the large group of men dressed in all black blocking her way, her heart lurched in her chest. She held her breath in fear. 
Eliana was terrified by the familiar scene. 
Damn it! Someone was trying to kidnap her again!
###Chapter 582
Eliana had been kidnapped before, and she wasn’t going to let that happen to her a second time. She quickly turned around and ran away. 
What she didn’t know was that these men had been sent by Jonathan to find her. 
They did not expect that Eliana would be on her toes. Before they could say anything, she had turned around and was running as fast as she could. They had to hurry up to catch up with her. 
Seeing that these men were running after her, Eliana was even surer that they were here to kidnap her. 
Her past kidnapping experiences had made her smart. 
She always had a few self-defense items on her. 
When some men were about to catch up with her, she took out a pepper spray from her bag and sprayed it crazily into their eyes. The men were caught off guard and many of them fell to the ground because of the pain of the pepper in their eyes. 
Eliana shouted for help as she ran into the factory. 
“Help! Help me! Someone is trying to kidnap me!” 
Her cry for help immediately alerted some workers in the factory and they all ran out. They were stunned to see a group of men in black chasing after Eliana. 
“Miss Pierce!” Brevard was the first to rush over. He stood in front of Eliana and shouted at the men chasing after her, “Who on earth are you?” 
When the men in black saw that the people coming out of the factory to protect Eliana vastly outnumbered them, they had no choice but to retreat for the time being.
It wasn’t until the men had retreated that Brevard heaved a sigh of relief. He wiped the sweat on his head and asked with concern, “Miss Pierce, who were those people? What did they want from you?” 
Eliana was just as confused as anyone was. 
To the best of her knowledge, she kept a low-profile recently. Who could want to harm her? 
Eliana tried to think of anyone who might have a grudge against her. 
Her face suddenly darkened. There were so many people who could want to kidnap her! She couldn’t tell which one of them had sent these men. 
After a while, she looked at Brevard and said nervously, I really have no idea who sent them here. It’s probably someone who hates me for some reason.” 
Brevard was speechless. He couldn’t help asking, “Miss Pierce, why would someone hate you?” 
Eliana could only answer with a wry smile, “To be honest, I have a lot of enemies. However, I can’t say why they hate me!” 
Seeing that she didn’t look well, Brevard asked no more. However, he was a little worried. 
He visited Hodge in hospital yesterday and asked the nurse who attended to Hodge how Hodge got to the hospital. He also heard rumors. 
From what he heard, Hodge had been sent to the hospital because of Eliana. 
Moreover, there was once a conflict between Hodge’s son and Eliana. The whole hospital knew about this. 
Brevard was lost in thought. Seeing him absent-minded, Eliana thought that he was worried about her, and she was deeply moved.
“Mr. Wallace, I’m fine. You know, the cops have been doing a terrible job recently, and there are more hooligans in our streets. Those men were probably just young thugs. They surely wanted to kidnap me and ask for a ransom.” she said, hoping that Brevard would stop worrying about her. 
“Well… Maybe you are right!” 
Although Brevard said so, he didn’t seem reassured at all. 
In fact, it wasn’t that he cared so much about Eliana. He was just worried that he and the people in the factory might be injured because of her, just like Hodge. 
Outside the factory, Jonathan’s men didn’t leave. They hid not far away and observed the factory. 
They did not dare to act in a rash. After all, there were too many people in the factory. If they acted rashly, they might leave clues that could incriminate them later. It would be difficult to deal with that. 
Rutherford Schneider, the leader of the men in black, saw that storming the factory was not an option at all. So he pulled out his cell phone and called Jonathan. 
“Mr. Bowman, we have found Eliana, but there are many people around her now, so we can’t get close to her. What should we do now?” 
Jonathan’s calm voice came from the other end of the line. 
“Since you can’t get her, go get her two children and bring them back. Eliana cares the most about her children and I miss them too…” 
There was something in Jonathan’s gentle tone that made Rutherford feel a chill. 
“Alright, Mr. Bowman. We shall complete the task.”
Rutherford was but a pawn in the eyes of these mighty men. He didn’t care about anything other than getting his job done.
###Chapter 583
It was already time for the children to leave the kindergarten. 
Standing at the gate of the kindergarten, Adrian and Aileen waited for Eliana to come pick them up. 
But today, something unusual happened. Two strange men suddenly appeared at the gate of the kindergarten. They looked around the kindergarten as if looking for someone. 
The teacher quickly noticed these men and walked over. “Hello, who are you?” she asked. 
“We are here to pick up Aileen and Adrian,” one of the men answered. 
Just as they said so, they saw Aileen and Adrian standing not far away. Without another word, they walked straight towards the two children. 
“Hello, children. I’m an employee of your mother, Miss Pierce. She had something important to do today and couldn’t pick you up. So she asked us to pick you up.” 
The two men smiled kindly at the two children. 
Aileen and Adrian looked at each other and immediately became alert. 
“Sir, my sister and I don’t know you. We can’t go with you. We will wait for our mommy to pick us up,” Adrian said firmly while pulling Aileen behind him. 
“Yes, Mommy said that we should never go with strangers,” Aileen replied, hiding behind her brother. She stared vigilantly at the strange men in front of her. 
“Gentlemen, I’m sorry, we can’t let anyone pick up children here unless their parents come in person.” 
The teacher had just walked over and stood in front of the children.
However, despite what the teacher said, the two men still didn’t want to give up. The situation persisted for a while. 
Soon, the noise at the gate attracted the attention of Silas. 
He had already gotten into the car and the driver was about to start the car when he saw the altercation at the gate of the kindergarten. Realizing that something was wrong, he turned back at once. 
“Aileen, Adrian, what’s wrong?” Silas asked as he walked over. 
“These two people insist that they know our mommy and want us to go with them. We don’t want to go with them!” 
Aileen stepped forward and told Silas what was going on. 
Silas stared at the two nervous men in front of him. He had a bad feeling. 
“Who the hell are you? Either you tell me or I call Miss Pierce to ask her directly,” Silas said firmly. 
Hearing that, the men were speechless. What could they say now? 
“You guys seem up to no good! Miss, call the police quickly! We’ll have them arrested!” Silas ordered the teacher at once. 
Seeing that the matter was getting out of hand, the two men looked at each other with a fierce look on their faces. 
When the teacher was not noticing, they opened the gate of the kindergarten. 
At this time, there were many children waiting at the door. The children ran out excitedly. Teachers and security guards struggled to stop the children, while parents waiting outside were eager to find their children. The scene was a total chaos for a moment.
The men in black took advantage of the chaos to grab Aileen and Adrian. 
However, the moment the door was opened, Silas instinctively held the hands of Aileen and Adrian. No matter how hard the two men tried to pull the kids, Silas didn’t let go of them. 
Seeing that Silas wouldn’t let go, one of the men cursed in his heart and said, “Damn it! Well, we’ll take the three of them.” 
The two men picked up the three children at once. With their hands covering the kids’ mouths, they rushed out. 
Unfortunately, Silas’ bodyguards were all in the car now. It was a real chaos at the gate of the kindergarten. The bodyguards were also blocked outside by the crowd and could only watch as the three children were taken away. 
Rutherford’s car was parked not far away, and he was waiting for his men and the kids. The men rushed to Rutherford’s car and jumped into it. Within seconds, the car was gone. 
Serendipitously, Earle came to pick up his great-grandson today on a whim and also wanted to take the opportunity to see Aileen and Adrian. 
His motorcade arrived at the gate of the kindergarten exactly when the men were abducting the three children, and they witnessed the whole scene. 
Who was so bold as to abduct his great-grandnson, especially in broad daylight? 
Earle initially panicked and shouted to his men, “Hurry up! Catch up with the car in front of us!” 
The driver also realized the seriousness of the matter and pressed hard on the accelerator. 
Meanwhile, the two men who had just abducted the three children didn’t dare to do anything to them.
After all, the twins were the children of the woman their boss loved. These men didn’t dare to harm the kids. 
After carefully fastening their seatbelts, Rutherford threatened the kids in a low voice. “Be obedient. Nothing will happen if you don’t make a fuss, got it?” 
Silas’ face was pale with fear. However, he still didn’t let go of the hands of Aileen and Adrian. He reassured them in a low voice, “We will be fine. Don’t be afraid…” 
Fortunately, although Aileen and Adrian initially panicked, they quickly calmed down. 
As the elder, Silas forced himself to be tough, so he could protect the Aileen and Adrian. 
He stared at Jonathan’s men and snapped, “Do you know who I am? How dare you kidnap me? My family won’t let you go if they know it!” 
Jonathan’s men burst into laughter when they heard Silas’ words. 
They had been hired by the CEO of the Universe Group. How could they be afraid of a kid’s threats? 
Rutherford muffled his laughter and said casually, “Little brat, you are so arrogant. Tell me, which family are you from?” 
“The Moran family!” 
As soon as those three words came out of Silas’ mouth, a heavy silence fell in the car.
###Chapter 584
After Silas mentioned that he came from the Moran family, the car suddenly halted. 
Earle’s cars were chasing after them. 
The driver was alarmed by what Silas said and anxiously looked back at the vehicles following them. 
The Moran family was famous in the local area. If he offended the family, he would meet a terrible end. 
Rutherford could tell that the driver was having second thoughts. He threatened, “What’s the matter? Are you afraid? Does the Moran family scare you? How about Mr. Bowman? Aren’t you afraid of him?” 
The driver trembled at the thought of what Jonathan could do to him. 
He couldn’t afford to offend either of those people! 
Another man reasoned, “Besides, what the child said might not be true. As far as I know, Maurice doesn’t have a son.” 
Mr. Bowman! Jonathan! 
All of a sudden, a thought occurred to Adrian. “Are you referring to Jonathan Bowman?” he blurted out. 
Rutherford ruffled Adrian’s hair with a slight smile on his face. In an ominous voice, he said, “Good boy. You’re right. I thought you would be happy to hear the news. I know you’ve missed Mr. Bowman.” 
Jonathan was behind all of this! 
Adrian’s eyes filled with tears at his words. Realization dawned on him. 
Adrian blamed himself for what happened. 
If he hadn’t texted Jonathan, they wouldn’t have gotten caught!
He didn’t expect Jonathan to go after him and his sister. Now even Silas was in danger. 
If they went missing, Eliana would be worried! 
Rutherford was still ruffling Adrian’s hair. Adrian felt nauseous. He made up his mind at that moment. Suddenly, he bit Rutherford firmly without hesitation. 
“Ouch!” 
Adrian latched onto Rutherford as hard as he could. Rutherford immediately withdrew his hand as he howled in pain. 
“You brat!” 
Rutherford rubbed his hand and glared at Adrian. 
He was a man who was skilled at dealing with people from all works of life. Never in his life had he ever been hurt by a child. Anger simmered inside of him. 
He lifted his hand and was about to lash out at the child when someone yelled, “Adrian!” 
Aileen was about to pounce on Rutherford, but Silas got to him faster and bumped his head against Rutherford. 
The movement came from nowhere, and Rutherford didn’t have time to dodge. His head spun, and his vision blurred. 
“Damn it!” 
Rutherford was infuriated. He was so furious that he turned his head towards the weakest child, which was Aileen.
As he was about to slap her, the car suddenly stopped. 
Rutherford lost his balance and lurched forward. After that, Adrian and Silas held Aileen away from him. 
“What the hell is going on?” 
Rutherford raised his head with a murderous expression on his face. 
“Shit! Rutherford, they’re coming after us!” The driver scrambled to start the car. 
He wanted to drive the car away, but there was nowhere for them to go. 
Their car was surrounded by Earle’s cars. 
When Rutherford’s car halted, Earle stepped out of his Rolls-Royce and approached. There was an air of authority in him, and his eyes were fierce. 
He slammed his cane against the window and shouted, “Open the door! Now!” 
Silas was filled with hope when he saw Earle. 
“You see that man out there? He’s my great-grandfather! There’s nowhere for you to go! Let us go now!” 
As Rutherford gazed at the vehicles surrounding them, he realized that the child must have been telling the truth. Silas was a member of the Moran family! 
“Rutherford… We’re… What should we do?” 
The driver was so terrified that he couldn’t form coherent sentences.
Rutherford’s brows furrowed as he thought of a way to maneuver out of this sticky situation. 
He earned a living by doing illegal things, and he couldn’t afford to get caught by the Moran family. 
When the two sides reached a stalemate, Adrian spoke up. “I advise you to think about what you’ll do next. Jonathan even wanted to kidnap children. I don’t think he cares about his men. If you got caught, do you think he would go out of his way to save you?” 
The expression on Rutherford’s face changed. 
Silas immediately understood what Adrian was trying to do. He was trying to get Rutherford to turn against Jonathan. “The best thing for you to do is to let us go. If you let us leave the car, I can persuade my great-grandfather to let you go.” 
Rutherford gazed out the window and knew he couldn’t take the twins today. 
Silas had provided him with a way to escape. 
Rutherford suddenly looked down at the three children inside the car and came to a conclusion. The best thing for him was to let them go and attempt to run away. 
However, he wasn’t sure if his plan would work. 
He didn’t think the Moran family would let him go without paying the consequences.
###Chapter 585
At this time, Rutherford changed his mind. He came up with a better way to escape. 
He suddenly grabbed Silas, turned to Earle, and threatened, “I will only give you the children back if you ask your men to back away immediately.” 
When Earle saw Silas’ pale face, he felt distressed. 
“Okay, I can do that.” 
Earle turned to his bodyguards and nodded, hinting at them to follow Rutherford’s demand. The bodyguards all stepped back at once. 
The next second, Rutherford opened the car door and threw Silas out. 
Earle was the nearest to the car. So when he saw Silas, he immediately threw his walking stick away, rushed forward, and caught Silas. 
But at this moment, Rutherford also ruthlessly threw Adrian and Aileen out of the car. 
“Ahhh!” the kids screamed in unison. 
But Earle was not a coward. He first caught Aileen, the most frightened one, and immediately held her in his arms. Then he didn’t forget to protect the two boys too. 
Earle was old, but he was still strong. And perhaps because of the adrenaline rush, he saved the three children at one time. 
Looking at the three children all safe and sound in his arms, he breathed a sigh of relief. 
“Mr. Moran, it’s you!” Aileen shouted excitedly upon seeing Earle’s face clearly.
Earle smiled kindly at the three children and asked, “Are you all right?” 
The three children shook their heads altogether. 
At this moment, Rutherford and his men took advantage of the situation when Earle was not paying attention. They started the car, crashed into a luxury car ahead, and rushed forward. 
As the two cars collided, there was an ear-splitting sound. It was so loud that it even resounded through the sky. And the fire instantly ignited. 
“Ahhh!” Aileen screamed in horror. 
“Aileen!” Adrian and Silas called out in unison. 
The loud crash startled Aileen, so Adrian and Silas immediately stretched out their hands and covered her ears. 
Although Aileen was terrified, she instinctively reached out and covered Earle’s ears. 
For a moment, the scene looked unusually harmonious. 
Since Earle was holding the three children in his arms, he didn’t move at all. Their safety mattered more to him than the small explosion. 
But Aileen’s soft hands suddenly covered his ears, and she said sweetly, “Mr. Moran, don’t be afraid. Don’t be afraid…” 
Earle looked down at her and saw that her cute little face was full of worries. He thought that his heart was already as hard as steel. But at this moment, he felt that it had melted. 
Rutherford escaped with his companions in their car, but no one was in the mood to care about them at this time.
Aleck and the bodyguards worriedly ran towards Earle one after another. 
They all knew that he had a weak heart. If anything happened to him, none of them could be held responsible for it. 
“Mr. Moran, are you alright?” Aleck was the first to rush over and asked Earle. 
“Don’t worry about me. I’m fine. Check on the three children. They are more important.” 
After saying this, Earle gently put down Aileen. Then he reached out and touched the heads of Silas and Adrian. He picked up his walking stick on the ground, looking energetic. 
“Mr. Moran, come with me and take your medicine first,” Aleck urged, still a little scared. 
At first, Earle hesitated. But finally, he compromised and walked towards the car with Aleck. But after taking a few steps, he looked back and smiled at the children. 
“Don’t worry. I’ll be back soon.” 
The three children felt relieved when they saw his smile. 
When Adrian recalled how Earle had rescued them valiantly just now, he couldn’t help praising, “Silas, your great-grandfather is awesome! When he knocked on the bad guy’s car window just now, he looked like a superhero. He was so handsome!” 
“Yes, that’s right! Your great-grandpa is so cool.” 
This time, Aileen agreed with Adrian, which was rare to happen. 
Silas was still agitated. But when he heard their praises, he was in a good mood. He felt proud of having such a brave great-grandfather.
But then, something suddenly happened. After taking a few steps forward, Earle clutched his chest. His heart was suddenly cramped. He was in so much pain that he trembled all over. 
Aleck immediately supported Earle’s arm and said worriedly, “Mr. Moran!” 
But Earle broke away from Aleck’s grip and shook his head. The children were looking at him. He couldn’t let them worry about him. 
For the children not to notice that he was not feeling well, he endured the pain and waved his walking stick to the three children behind him. 
But Silas was very keen. He immediately noticed that something was wrong with Aleck’s expression. Something must be wrong with Earle. 
He could tell that Earle was weak and only pretending to be alright. The expression on his face greatly changed as he shouted, “Great-grandpa, stop!” 
Earle’s pain became more and more unbearable. His eyes darkened, and he fell to the ground in a coma.
###Chapter 586
“Mr. Moran!” 
“Mr. Moran!” 
“Great-grandpa!” 
Aleck and the three kids shouted at the same time. 
“Take Mr. Moran to the hospital right away! Hurry up!” Aleck shouted. 
They all got together to carry Earle into the car. 
The kids got in the car in turn and sat beside the unconscious Earle. 
As soon as they were all in the car, the driver stepped on the gas pedal and the car sped towards the hospital. 
By this time, Aleck had calmed down. He took out his phone and quickly called Maurice. 
“Mr. Moran, your grandfather has a heart attack. We are on our way to the hospital…” 
Aleck had no time to finish his words as Maurice had already hung up. Aleck guessed that Maurice was already on his way to the hospital. 
Soon the car arrived at the hospital. Earle’s doctor had already been notified and was waiting for them at the entrance to the hospital. As soon as the car stopped, they got Earle out of the car and put him on the stretcher. The doctor, accompanied by two nurses, immediately rushed Earle to the emergency room. 
Earle was quickly taken care of and the diagnosis showed that he did not suffer from anything alarming. He had just had a panic attack.
Earle woke up shortly afterwards. 
Everyone finally felt relieved. 
As Aileen stared at the old man lying listlessly in the bed, she had the feeling that this scene was familiar to her. 
“Oh, no!” Aileen suddenly exclaimed in panic. She patted her head and said nervously, “Adrian, we forgot to tell Mommy! You remember what happened last time? We stayed at the hospital for a long time and Mommy was worried about us. She was so angry. We need to call Mommy right now!” 
Adrian immediately recalled the matter his sister was referring to and nodded. “You are right!” 
Hearing the children’s conversation, Earle was impressed. 
Adrian and Aileen were so young, but they were sensible and considerate. It was really rare. 
“Aleck, come here.” Earle looked at Aleck who was standing by the bed and ordered, “Go with the kids and help them call their mother. Explain the situation clearly to their mother this time. Make sure you don’t cause any misunderstanding like last time.” 
“Alright, Mr. Moran,” Aleck replied. 
Aleck then led the twins out of the ward. Meanwhile, Silas stayed in the room with Earle. 
In the corridor of the hospital, Aleck took out his phone and asked the twins their mother’s phone number. Then he dialed it. 
While the call was in progress, Aleck casually asked the twins, “What’s your mother’s name?” 
“Eliana Pierce! My mommy’s name is Eliana Pierce. It’s a pretty name, isn’t it?” Aileen said proudly in a sweet voice.
Aleck was stunned and his eyes widened in disbelief. He couldn’t believe his ears. 
Did he hear this little girl clearly just now? 
Did the little girl say her mother was Eliana Pierce? 
What a coincidence! 
Aleck was utterly stunned. He thought of Eliana whom he had seen a few times. 
While he was lost in thoughts, a familiar voice came from the other end of the line. 
“Hello, who’s it?” 
It turned out he didn’t mishear Aileen just now. It was really Eliana’s voice! 
She was the mother of these twins. 
Aleck was confused. He had lots of questions to ask Eliana, but he knew it was not a good time to ask. 
He had to do as Earle said first. 
“Miss Pierce? I’m Aleck Hinks, Mr. Earle Moran’s assistant.” 
“Mr. Moran’s assistant!” At the other end of the phone, Eliana was a little uneasy when the man introduced himself. “Is there anything that Mr. Moran wants you to tell me?” she asked nervously. 
Aleck hurriedly explained, “No! Actually, there was an accident today, and Mr. Moran and your children are in the hospital now. Your kids care about Mr. Moran, so they and Silas decided to stay here with Mr. Moran. You can rest assured that I will send them back safely later.” 
Eliana’s nervousness grew at the mention of the hospital.
Why were Earle and her children at the hospital? 
Eliana was very worried. 
“Can you make a video call so that I can talk to my kids?” Eliana asked. 
Aleck had no reason to refuse. He did the video call and handed the phone to Aileen. 
“Mommy!” Aileen greeted Eliana as soon as she took the phone. 
“Sweetie, tell me, what’s going on?” 
“Mommy, Silas’ great-grandfather had a heart attack. Can Adrian and I stay here with him?” Aileen asked with genuine concern in her voice. 
Eliana saw the familiar bodyguards standing next to Aileen. 
She knew for sure that her kids were with Earle. 
Eliana actually didn’t want her children to have much contact with Earle. 
But she couldn’t ignore the relationship between the twins and Earle. Moreover, now that Earle was hospitalized, Eliana didn’t have the heart to ask Adrian and Aileen to leave the old man at the hospital and come back home. 
“Okay, you can stay. But you and Adrian have to behave well there, okay? Don’t cause trouble!” 
Eliana finally agreed to Aileen’s request. 
“Mommy, you’re the best!” 
Aileen was overjoyed and she happily returned the phone to Aleck.
“Thank you for taking care of my kids. Please, remember to send them back early,” Eliana said earnestly to Aleck. 
Then she hung up the phone. 
At this very moment, Maurice walked out of the elevator.
###Chapter 587
Maurice bolted out of the elevator and quickly stormed towards the ward. “Aleck, how is Grandpa doing?” he asked worriedly. 
Aleck, who clutched his phone in his hand, looked up at Maurice in a daze. 
All of a sudden, a question popped up in his head. 
If the twins were Eliana’s children, how were they related to Maurice? 
Was Maurice the father of the children? 
It seemed like a wild guess to him. He didn’t dare to think about it more unless he had evidence to back it up. 
Aleck was immersed in his thoughts and didn’t notice the expression on Maurice’s face shifting. His face grew more severe as time passed. 
Maurice waited for Aleck to answer and thought his silence meant that Earle was doing worse than expected. 
At the thought of this, Maurice turned to the ward. All of a sudden, a small hand gripped his. 
Aileen looked up at Maurice with sympathetic eyes. “Mr. Maurice Moran, don’t be alarmed. Mr. Earle Moran is doing well!” 
Adrian stood beside her and glared at Maurice. 
That was the moment that Maurice noticed the twins’ presence. “What are they doing here?” he asked Aleck.
“Well… It’s a long story. I’m not sure if you’ll want to hear it. Your grandfather went to pick up Silas. He noticed that the three children got kidnapped, and then saved them. The situation distressed him, so he was sent to the hospital.” 
Aleck explained the recent events as briefly as he could, and Maurice’s eyes darkened. Maurice could only imagine the kind of danger they faced. 
“Kidnapped? Who were they trying to kidnap? Was it Silas? Or was it the twins?” Maurice grimaced. 
Aleck hesitated for a moment before he answered. “I don’t think those people were after Silas,” he said with uncertainty. 
His words implied that the kidnappers intended to target Aileen and Adrian. 
Maurice’s thoughts raced in his head. 
He thought he had concealed Silas’ identity well. If the kidnappers held Silas for ransom, they should have come after him from the start. Why would they go out of their way to abduct two other children? 
That could only mean one thing. They intentionally targeted the twins. 
Why would anyone go after them? 
It became obvious to Maurice that the men wanted the twins to threaten Eliana. 
Who would dare to do such a thing? 
The Stone family recently learned their lesson for attempting to mess with him. They wouldn’t do anything for the time being. 
Did Eliana have other enemies that he didn’t know about?
Maurice was bewildered by the situation. He looked down at the twins and tried to get some clues from them. 
“Who do you think was behind your kidnapping today?” he asked the twins. 
Aileen shook her head in reply. It seemed like she knew nothing. 
Maurice turned his head towards Adrian and noticed the way the boy’s body tensed at the mention of the kidnapping. 
Based on the expression on Adrian’s face, Maurice knew there was something the boy wasn’t telling him. 
Maurice squatted so he could be at eye level with Adrian and looked into his eyes. 
“Adrian, do you know something?” 
Adrian guiltily looked away from his piercing eyes. He murmured, “I don’t know anything.” 
Maurice could tell he was lying. 
He could tell that the boy was hiding something, so he gently urged Adrian on. 
“Are you sure you don’t know anything?” 
Adrian was no match for Maurice no matter what tactic he tried to evade Maurice’s questions. He had no choice but to tell the truth. 
Adrian was about to open his mouth and confess when Earle’s voice suddenly came from inside the ward.
“Maurice, come inside!” 
Earle’s voice caught Maurice’s attention. Adrian breathed a sigh of relief. 
Maurice took one last look at Adrian, who bit his lip tightly. He stood up and said to Aleck, “Please send the twins home. I don’t want their family to worry about them.” 
Aleck could tell that Maurice had a close relationship with the twins and their mother. He instantly knew that Maurice was aware Eliana was the twins’ mother. 
What could his relationship be with the children?
###Chapter 588
Maurice was a little stunned by Aleck’s words. But when he came back to his senses, he immediately denied Aleck’s speculation. 
“No,” he said firmly. 
“Then who is the father of the twins…” 
Aleck still wanted to ask something, but Maurice, who was already in a bad mood, interrupted him, “It’s none of your business. It has nothing to do with you. Just do your job well.” 
Maurice didn’t need others to remind him again and again that the twins were not his children and that Eliana had once belonged to another man. 
When Aleck noticed that Maurice already looked impatient, he had no choice but to shut his mouth. 
After a while, Maurice broke the silence and added, “And don’t mention the twin’s identity to my grandpa. Especially now that he is in poor health and can’t bear any stimulation.” 
“I understand, sir.” 
Aleck understood it clearly. 
Earle liked the twins so much. If he found out that their mother was the woman he hated, he would definitely not be able to accept it. 
Besides, the twins’ biological father was still a mystery. 
After making sure that Aleck understood what he meant, Maurice turned around and walked into the ward. 
Earle was lying weakly in the bed with a pale face. Silas sat beside him, watching over him.
As soon as Earle saw Maurice, he immediately snapped, “What did you tell Aileen and Adrian outside? Do you think I didn’t see it? You are an adult, but you still don’t know how to get along with children. Why do you like making things difficult for them? Are you not embarrassed?” 
Earle scolded Maurice fiercely. 
But considering Earle’s health condition, Maurice didn’t dare to retort. He could only explain, “I just asked them if they knew who the kidnappers were.” 
“Are you serious? They are just five-year-old kids. What can they know?” Earle tried his best to stand up for the twins. “The two kids have just been kidnapped. So you must know how much they’ve suffered. Why do you have to make things difficult for them? I’ll leave the matter to you. Go and find out who wants to hurt them.” 
He couldn’t believe that someone in this city had dared to hurt his people. Didn’t they know him? They’d better find a good place to hide. Because if he found them, he would definitely make them pay a hefty price. 
Silas also spoke up to defend the twins. “Uncle Maurice, don’t make things difficult for Aileen and Adrian. It’s not their fault. What if those bad guys only target them because they are too close to me? It only means that it’s me who implicates them, right?” 
Maurice was rendered speechless after hearing their words. 
He must admit that Aileen and Adrian were both adorable. But he still couldn’t help wondering what they had done to make his family defend and protect them. 
“Okay, Grandpa. Rest well and recuperate here. You can rest assured that I will find out who the kidnappers are.”
Maurice agreed to do it not only to make Earle and Silas feel at ease but also for the safety of Eliana and the twins. 
At this moment, Aleck sent Aileen and Adrian home. He was still full of doubts. 
Eliana had been waiting downstairs for a long time. The moment she saw the two children get out of the car, she immediately rushed over and hugged them. 
“Kids, how are you? Are you alright?” 
“We are fine, Mommy. We are here now,” Aileen immediately answered. It seemed that her mood was not affected by the kidnapping. 
In contrast to Aileen’s mood, Adrian looked preoccupied. 
Eliana looked at Aleck and said, “Hello, Mr. Hinks. Can you tell me what happened today?” 
Aleck then explained the whole story of today’s kidnapping incident to her. 
“Kidnapping? Someone wants to kidnap Aileen and Adrian? But… How can that be?” 
Eliana’s restless heart had already calmed down. But upon hearing Aleck’s words, she became anxious again. 
“Yes, that’s right. We are really sorry that we haven’t caught the kidnappers yet. For now, please be more careful. We don’t know who the enemy is yet. The Moran family is doing their best to hunt down the kidnappers. And they will also send some people to guard you. So don’t worry so much,” Aleck assured Eliana to calm her down. 
But Eliana was not in the mood to listen to him. She suddenly thought of how she was almost kidnapped before.
Could it be that the same person was behind both kidnappings? Since those people failed to abduct her before, they targeted Aileen and Adrian this time. 
This terrifying conjecture sent a chill down her spine. She felt so cold all over that she felt like her blood almost froze. 
Who was that person? Who on earth was targeting them? 
Eliana felt like she was shrouded by a dark mist. No matter how hard she tried, she couldn’t clearly see the person hiding behind the thick dark fog. But she felt like that person was only waiting for a perfect opportunity to attack her.
###Chapter 589
Aleck noticed that Eliana was lost in thought, so he didn’t disturb her. He gave her enough time to think. 
It took Eliana a long time to come back to her senses. 
Then she turned to Aleck and said, “Mr. Hinks, I really thank you and Mr. Moran for today. If the two of you hadn’t been there, the consequences would have been unimaginable.” 
She expressed her gratitude to Aleck with a pale face. 
“You don’t need to thank me. Mr. Moran is very close to the two children, especially to Aileen. He thinks that Aileen looks like his granddaughter, so he cares about the two children so much,” Aleck explained patiently in a somewhat intriguing tone. 
Eliana couldn’t help sighing in her heart. She knew why Earle felt so close to Adrian and Aileen. And that was because he and the twins were related by blood. Mixed emotions overwhelmed her. 
Earle didn’t know that the twins were his great-grandchildren, but he still had a deep affection for them. He even saved them by accident. Eliana wondered what his reaction would be if he found out the truth about the twins’ identity. 
Eliana looked at Aleck and said, “Mr. Hinks, if you need any clue about the kidnappers, you can contact me anytime. I will do my best to help you find them.” 
Aleck was a little tempted. Actually, there was really something he wanted to ask Eliana. However, it was not about the kidnappers but the twins. 
He pondered for a while. Finally, he decided to ignore Maurice’s warning. 
“Miss Pierce, if you don’t mind, may I ask if the father of the twins is…”
But before he could finish his words, Eliana’s loud voice interrupted him. 
“No! He is not.” 
When she said this, she even wanted to cover the ears of the two children with a guilty conscience, but of course, she wasn’t able to do that. 
“Miss Pierce…” 
Aleck wanted to continue asking, but he was interrupted by Eliana again. 
“Well, Mr. Hinks… Thank you for sending the kids back today. We’ll go inside now.” 
She didn’t want to say anything to Aleck anymore, so she directly took Aileen and Adrian upstairs. 
Aleck had no choice but to watch their receding backs. But he couldn’t help frowning as his confusion deepened. 
Eliana didn’t even let him finish his words. And he had not mentioned Maurice’s name, but she already knew he was referring to Maurice. She immediately denied the relationship between her two children and Maurice. 
Obviously, Eliana was trying to evade this question. Was she hiding something? 
In the hospital, Maurice categorically denied that he was the twins’ father. But what if there was only a misunderstanding? 
Aleck was an outsider, but he clearly knew what blood relationships and family affection were. 
Maurice, Earle, and Silas all had special feelings for Aileen and Adrian. It was undeniable that the two children were lovable. But there must be a deeper reason for their affection.
One possibility was that the twins might be Maurice’s children. 
And with Eliana’s strange reaction just now, Aleck confirmed his guess even more. 
But at the moment, he had no evidence to prove it, so he could only keep it to himself. 
Aleck had been working for Earle for so many years. Of course, the word “loyalty” had long been carved in his heart. So he decided to figure it out. 
Then he thought of someone. 
Corbin. He might be of help. 
Corbin had been working for Maurice over the years, so he must know a lot of inside information. 
At the thought of this, Aleck called Corbin directly. 
At this moment, Corbin was with Maurice, looking for clues about the kidnappers. 
He was confused to receive a sudden phone call from Aleck. 
But Aleck was his mentor, after all. So after hesitating for a while, he answered the phone without telling Maurice. 
“Aleck, what can I do for you?” 
Aleck asked straightforwardly, “Corbin, is Mr. Moran the father of Eliana’s children?” 
Corbin was so shocked that he was stunned. It took him a long time to come back to his senses. 
“Where did you get that information? Forget it. It’s not the time to be concerned about it. The twins are not Mr. Moran’s children. Eliana has already denied it personally.”
“I don’t believe it,” Aleck retorted excitedly. “There must be something wrong with that. Go check it carefully.” 
“That thing…” Corbin paused for a moment before explaining, “Actually, Mr. Moran had asked Eliana the same question before. But she firmly refused to admit that the twins were his children. Mr. Moran has high self-esteem, so he believed what Eliana said and didn’t investigate. He even didn’t allow us to mention anything about it.” 
After listening to Corbin’s explanation, Aleck rolled his eyes. He couldn’t help cursing, “Are you a fool? Do you really think Eliana was telling the truth? If you haven’t even thought about it, you’d better quit your job now.” 
After saying this, he hung up the phone angrily. 
Corbin fell into deep thought. At this moment, some clues he chose to ignore before surfaced in his mind. 
The more he thought about the twins’ birth, the more suspicious he became. Was Jonathan really their father? 
For the sake of Maurice’s happiness, he decided to find out the truth.
###Chapter 590
That night, sitting on the edge of the bed, Eliana was reading fairy tales to Aileen and Adrian. 
After such a hectic day, Aileen was so tired that she fell asleep early. 
Adrian, meanwhile, couldn’t stop thinking about the fact that they were nearly kidnapped. He tossed and turned in bed and couldn’t fall asleep. 
Eliana had just finished reading the story and was about to leave the room when a small hand suddenly grabbed hers. 
“Mommy, I can’t fall asleep. Can you stay with me?” Adrian asked in a low voice, looking at Eliana earnestly. 
Adrian was not the kind of child constantly asking for attention. So, Eliana couldn’t say no to him now. 
“Okay, I’ll stay with you.” 
So Eliana lay down in Adrian’s bed and held him in her arms. 
“Is there anything bothering my darling baby? Tell me please,” Eliana said in a sweet voice. 
Adrian buried his head in Eliana’s chest, hesitating to tell her or not. Finally, he decided to confess what he had done. 
“Mommy, I’m sorry. What happened today was all my fault…” 
“Honey, why did you say that?” Eliana asked in surprise. 
With a guilty look on his face, Adrian explained, “Yes, it was all my fault. I was the one who secretly contacted Mr. Bowman. I think the men who tried to kidnap us today were sent by him. I’m sorry, Mommy. I didn’t think Mr. Bowman was such a bad person!”
Eliana was stunned at the mention of Jonathan. 
She thought he was still abroad. 
Did he come back? 
Eliana was utterly shocked by what Adrian said. She couldn’t believe that it was Jonathan who tried to kidnap her and her children, let alone that it was Adrian who called him back. 
Eliana said nothing for a long moment, lost in thought. Her long silence made Adrian feel more and more depressed, and tears welled up in his eyes. 
“Mommy, did I get you in trouble?” Adrian asked in a sad voice. 
Hearing her son’s words, Eliana quickly came to her senses. She stroked the little boy’s head and comforted him, “Don’t worry, honey. I will solve it. Everything will be fine. You don’t have to feel guilty. Mr. Bowman is not a bad guy. He probably just wants to see you, but he didn’t do it the right way.” 
It took a long time for Eliana to calm Adrian down and let him fall asleep peacefully. 
When Eliana finally left the children’s room, the anger she had been suppressing all along flared up, and her face darkened instantly. 
Jonathan had helped her a lot. She could never pay him back for all he had done for her and the children. But how could he try to kidnap her kids? 
While Eliana was lost in thoughts, her phone rang. She checked the caller ID and saw it was an incoming call from a strange number. 
After thinking for a while, Eliana answered the phone. 
“Hello?”
“Eliana…” 
A deep and magnetic voice came from the other end of the phone, and Eliana almost immediately recognized the person speaking. 
“Jonathan!” 
“Absolutely! Long time no see. How are you doing recently?” 
Jonathan’s voice was mixed with smile. 
Just by listening to this voice, Eliana could already see in her mind the beautiful and gentle face of the man. 
But when she thought about what he had done, it chilled her to the bone. 
“Jonathan, why did you try to kidnap my children?” Eliana asked curtly. 
She wasn’t in the mood to chat with him, so she cut to the chase. 
“It’s been so long since we’ve seen each other. Why are you so cold to me? I just want to see you. I couldn’t reach you since you even changed your phone number, so I came up with this idea.” 
It was only then that Eliana remembered she had indeed changed her phone number to avoid being called by Maurice. 
She later on sent her new phone number to her close friends, except for Jonathan. 
She just didn’t want to tell him her new number. 
“So since you couldn’t find me, you decided to use my children as leverage to make me come to you?”
“Don’t be mad. You’re so lovable. I hired Kimora, but she lied to me in order to help you in the end.” 
Jonathan’s casual words made Eliana’s hair stand on end. 
He had found Kimora! 
“What did you do to Kimora?” Eliana asked almost in a roar. 
“Don’t worry. Kimora’s precious grandson and granddaughter had a small accident and she went to take care of them. There’s really nothing to worry about!” 
Jonathan’s tone was extremely gentle, but Eliana sensed a strong threat in it. 
She took a deep breath, trying to suppress her surging emotions. “Jonathan, what on earth do you want from me?” 
Eliana had known Jonathan for many years, and she knew that he was way more terrifying than Maurice. 
The difference between Maurice and Jonathan was that, Maurice would never hurt her, let alone hurt her children.
###Chapter 591
“Eliana, it seems that my absence has done something good. You learned to be smart when I was away,” Jonathan said with a smile. His voice was filled with joy. 
“I want you to see me alone. I’ve helped you for so long. You should at least agree to see me this time, right?” 
Eliana’s heart skipped a beat. 
She had long expected this to happen because she knew she had to face Jonathan one day. Even if she didn’t want to see him, she couldn’t avoid him forever. 
Just like Maurice, Jonathan was also her inescapable someone. 
Left with no choice, Eliana had to say, “Okay.” 
At this moment, the look in her eyes became firm. She finally made up her mind. 
“I can meet you. But I’ll decide the time and place.” 
“Of course, it’s your choice. A good gentleman always has to accommodate a lady.” 
Jonathan’s voice revealed a sense of victory. He firmly believed that Eliana would be his. For him, she was like a caged bird that could not escape his palm. 
After their talk, Eliana hung up the phone. She suddenly felt a trace of exhaustion penetrate deep into her bones. 
She walked to the balcony to get some fresh air, but she was met by the wet and cold night wind. Eliana couldn’t help shivering. But the cold made her mind become a little clearer.
Jonathan was back. And judging from their conversation just now and what he had done to her and her children, it was obvious that he didn’t want to let her go. 
If she resisted, he would definitely make another move. He wouldn’t stop until he totally conquered her. 
She, her children, and Kimora… Who would be the next? 
The night wind was very cold, but it was not as cold as Eliana’s heart at the moment. 
She had been standing there for a long time when the door suddenly opened. 
Nana came back from her date. She walked into the apartment with light steps, humming a song softly. After being nourished with love, she seemed to be in a good mood. 
When she turned on the lights, she saw Eliana standing on the balcony in a daze. 
Her brows furrowed at once. It was already late. Why was Eliana still up? 
Nana walked over in surprise and patted Eliana on the shoulder, “Eliana?” 
“Ahhh!” 
Eliana was startled by Nana’s sudden appearance. She patted her chest and said, “You’re back.” 
“Eliana, why are you still awake? It’s so late now. What are you doing here on the balcony? Did something happen?” Seeing the sadness on Eliana’s face, Nana was worried. 
Eliana smiled bitterly. “Jonathan is back.” 
“What? Who did you say is here?” At first, Nana was confused. But the next second, she shivered all over. She exclaimed, “What? Jonathan is back? But why?”
“I do not know either,” Eliana answered, shaking her head helplessly. 
Nana remembered the rumors about Jonathan, and a bad feeling surged in her heart. 
“Oh, my goodness! He didn’t come back for you, right?” 
Eliana also thought of this possibility. She got goose bumps, and her scalp tingled. 
“He called just now. He wanted to see me, and I said yes. I just hope that during our meeting, the matter between us will be resolved properly.” 
“He wants to see you? Why did you say yes? Are you not afraid that he might have an ulterior motive?” Nana jumped up in shock. “I think you have to tell Maurice about this. You are together now. What if he misunderstands you again?” 
Eliana sighed. Actually, she also thought of telling Maurice. But after giving it a second thought, she gave up. 
“Nana, think about it. Until now, Maurice still believes that the twins are Jonathan’s children. If he knows that I am going to meet Jonathan, what do you think will be his reaction?” 
Nana subconsciously imagined Maurice’s angry face, and she couldn’t help shivering. 
Maurice was like a violent beast when he was angry. If he found out about it and lost his temper, who could control him then? 
“You’re right. But…” Nana had a strange expression on her face. “But think about it too. You have never succeeded in hiding something from Maurice. Not even once.” 
Nana’s words made Eliana recall her countless failures, and she couldn’t help feeling discouraged.
Could she really hide this matter from Maurice? 
On the same night, when Eliana got to know the person behind the kidnapping, Maurice also gained something—he caught the executor of the kidnapping. 
He was in an icy basement, sitting in the shadows. Standing beside him was Corbin, who looked serious. 
A man was lying on the floor in front of them. He was the kidnapper who tried to kidnap Adrian and Aileen today.
###Chapter 592
The man was tightly wrapped in the bag, and he was still thrashing about in it, like a writhing maggot. 
“Open it!” Maurice ordered his men. 
Following Maurice’s order, the bodyguards immediately stepped forward and untied the bag, revealing the man inside, tightly bound. 
It was none other than Rutherford! 
As soon as the bag was taken from him, Rutherford knelt down, his head lowered. Without even clearly seeing who had caught him, he shouted, “Mr. Bowman, please forgive me. I’m sorry I couldn’t complete the mission. Please forgive me!” 
Rutherford thought that since he hadn’t been able to accomplish the task that Jonathan had given him, Jonathan was certainly going to punish him! So he hastened to ask for mercy. 
After pleading for a long time, he realized that there was no sound in front of him. 
Rutherford was scared to the bone and raised his head nervously. To his greatest surprise, he didn’t see Jonathan’s frightening smile. Instead, he saw a strange face. 
It seemed it wasn’t Jonathan who caught him! 
At this moment, Rutherford became confident. If the man who caught him was not a real big shot, then he wasn’t scared at all. 
Rutherford’s expression changed from humbleness to arrogance and malice. 
“Who the hell are you? How dare you catch me! You better go to the underworld and ask about me! I’m definitely not the guy you want to mess with!”
There wasn’t a trace of humility on Rutherford’s face right now. 
Casting a pitiful look at the arrogant Rutherford, Corbin snapped at him, “Rutherford, I advise you to be honest. The person standing in front of you is the CEO of the Moran Group, Maurice Moran.” 
As soon as Corbin revealed Maurice’s identity, Rutherford’s face changed drastically. His eyes widened in shock and he felt a shiver run through him. 
It was Maurice who kidnapped him! 
But why? 
Then, Rutherford thought of the three kids he tried to kidnap during the day. One of them said that he was a member of the Moran family… 
Damn! He messed with the wrong person this time! 
“Mr. Moran! I so sorry. I really didn’t mean to kidnap your family member. Please forgive me and spare my life!” Rutherford begged. 
Rutherford knew when to eat humble pie and when to hold his head high. He immediately began to beg for mercy, with tears running down his cheeks. 
“Shut up!” Maurice roared, glaring coldly at the man kneeling in front of him. Rutherford was so scared that he didn’t dare to say a word again. 
“Just now, you mentioned Mr. Bowman, did you refer to Jonathan?” 
Rutherford nodded quickly. 
Jonathan was Aileen and Adrian’s biological father. Why would he kidnap his own children?
Maurice was shocked and confused. 
“Why didn’t Jonathan come to meet the twins directly? Isn’t he their father?” Maurice asked coldly. 
Rutherford was stunned by the question and didn’t know what to answer. He was just a goon the bigwigs paid to do their dirty jobs. How could he know so much? 
Rutherford explained helplessly, “Mr. Moran, I’m just paid with money to do things. Mr. Bowman didn’t tell me anything. Oh, I remember! He had asked me to get a woman named Eliana Pierce. That woman was as cunning as a fox and I wasn’t able to get her. It was only after that that Mr. Bowman asked me to kidnap her two children. He wanted to use the kids as a leverage to make her come to him. I didn’t expect that the two kids were protected by the Moran family. I wasn’t able to catch any of them…” 
Rutherford quickly told Maurice everything he knew about his mission. He would say anything and everything to save his life.
