"Eliana asked me not to tell anyone... If I tell you, you will definitely tell Maurice," Nana said in a low voice.
With a slight smile, Corbin looked at Nana and asked seriously, "Do you really think you can hide it from my boss? Since I've guessed it, he must have already guessed as well."
Hearing what he said, Nana was stunned. Maurice had guessed it?
Nana's heart skipped a beat. She looked at Corbin and asked, "Really? I promised Eliana not to tell Maurice."
With a serious look on his face, Corbin said, "Nana, tell me what's wrong. If you confide in me, we can help them. You know, Mr. Moran and Eliana struggled to get where they are today..."
Gritting her teeth, Nana finally told Corbin everything.
"You mean Jonathan drugged Eliana?" Corbin exclaimed in shock after Nana told him.
"Yes..."
Nana still felt her blood run cold when she thought back to Eliana vomiting blood in the hospital.
Choking with sobs, she told Corbin everything that had happened. "Eliana has been suffering from a strange disease since she came back from Jonathan's place. Whenever this disease seized her, she would vomit blood and pass out. Jonathan used Eliana's health as a leverage to get her back to him. But Eliana is unwilling to compromise. She chooses to stay with Maurice no matter how much pain she has to endure."
Learning what Eliana had suffered to be with Maurice, Corbin felt bad.
He held Nana in his arms and comforted her, "Don't worry. Mr. Moran will protect Eliana well. I know he won't let her suffer. We must tell him about it as soon as possible."
After saying that, Corbin took out his phone to call Maurice.
But before he could dial Maurice's number, Maurice called him first.
He picked up the phone at once. "Mr. Moran, there is something..."
"Ask the hacker team of the Moran Group to start right away.
I want them to destroy Universe Group's system."
Maurice's deep voice interrupted Corbin.
Corbin was a little surprised by his boss' sudden order. But he
quickly came back to his senses.
"Mr. Moran... Have you known it?"
"Yes."
Although Maurice's voice was very calm, Corbin knew that his boss was seething right now.
"Okay, I'll do it right away. What is your goal, Mr. Moran?"
"Force Jonathan to negotiate with me. I didn't do anything ruthless before because Jonathan had saved Eliana's life. No matter what his reasons were then, it was thanks to him that I could meet Eliana again. But this time he went too far. I won't spare him."
Standing on the balcony, Maurice hung up the phone with a heavy heart.
"Woof!"
The dog ran over and walked around him.
Maurice squatted down and stroked the dog's soft fur.
When he raised his head, he saw Eliana and the children playing happily in the living room through the glass window. His expression gradually softened.
He was willing to sacrifice everything to keep the smiles on the three people's faces.
Eliana soon joined Maurice on the balcony.
"Who were you talking to on the phone just now? Why did it take you so long?"
Maurice lied casually, "It was Wyatt. He and Nicole recently got back together and are planning their wedding. He wants us to attend their wedding."
"Wyatt is going to marry Nicole!" Eliana was overjoyed by the good news. "That's great. They have finally decided to tie the knot!"
Maurice smiled and said, "That's right. We can't be inferior to them. Choose any wedding dress you like. I've prepared a whole design team for you, and I promise you'll have the most beautiful wedding dress in the world."
Hearing Maurice's words, Eliana couldn't help but imagine the wedding scene in her mind. Her face flushed with excitement.
###Chapter 672 Make Up For The Regret
At night, Eliana lay in the bathtub, dizzy.
She had a relapse today, so she was so weak that she couldn't even walk for a long while.
What if Maurice wanted to have sex with her tonight? This thought flashed through Eliana's mind.
Maurice was so smart that he would definitely sense something was off.
She was afraid that he would find out about her illness. She covered her face helplessly, wondering what to do.
Suddenly, there was a knock on the door, followed by Maurice's worried voice.
"Eliana, what's wrong? Why have you been in there for so long? If you don't come out now, I will break in..."
Hearing that, Eliana felt a chill all over and she quickly stood up. "I'll be out soon!"
Now she had no choice but to dry herself quickly and get out of the bathroom.
As soon as she opened the door, Maurice lifted her up and carried her to the bed. He gently lay her down on the bed.
Maurice leaned close to her.
"Honey, why did it take you so long to take a bath?" Maurice asked softly.
He was so close to her as if he was going to kiss her the next second.
Feeling his hot breath on her skin, Eliana felt nervous and was getting stiff.
"Well, I just wanted to wash myself clean..."
Oh damn it! What was she talking about?
It was weird to say that.
As Eliana racked her brains for a reasonable excuse, she heard Maurice chuckle. Then she felt a warm kiss on her forehead.
Maurice gave her a gentle kiss and said softly, "Forget it. Sleep now. I'll stay with you."
He then pulled over the quilt, held Eliana in his arms and closed his eyes.
Maurice had no intention of doing anything to Eliana.
Leaning against Maurice's broad chest, Eliana could feel his strong heartbeat. The sound of his heartbeat soothed her a great deal.
She smiled and closed her eyes. If only time could freeze right now and stay like this forever.
The next day, Eliana took Nana to a high-end wedding dress store to buy herself a wedding dress.
Coincidentally, Nicole had also come to the same wedding dress store.
"Nicole!"
"Eliana!"
The two women exclaimed at the same time.
It had been a while since they last saw each other and Eliana found that Nicole had changed a lot.
She was still very beautiful, but she wasn't as flamboyant as before. She had become gentle, and looked very happy now.
"Congratulations, Eliana!"
Nicole heard from Wyatt that Eliana and Maurice were getting married.
"Same to you! Hey, since we meet here, let's choose our dresses together!" Eliana said with a happy smile on her face.
The three women therefore started shopping.
The wedding dress store was really top-notch, and the decoration was fantastic.
Countless pure white roses decorated every corner of the shop, and the light fragrance of flowers wafted through the air, making people feel comfortable.
There were special salespeople whose job was to attend to the customers. Every now and then, the salespeople would bring tea and coffee to the three women.
Nana's eyes lit up when she saw the wedding plan proposed by the planner.
She read the plan and then pointing at one of the items, she said confidently to the planner, "You are wrong. The priest shouldn't show up at this time..." When she had spoken out her thoughts, she said firmly, "I almost had a wedding once. My opinion is absolutely valid."
Hearing that, Eliana reminded her, "Nana, you didn't make it, did you?"
Nana fell silent. She didn't know what to say. However, she didn't give up. She went to another room with the planner to see the props needed for the wedding.
Meanwhile, the bride-to-be, Eliana, was sitting on the sofa in the lounge, leisurely eating dessert.
She and Nicole clinked their tea cups and drank together.
"Nicole, what's your plan after you get married? Are you really going to quit show business?"
Upon hearing that, Nicole's hand holding the teacup stopped in mid-air, and she didn't say anything for a long time.
Eliana tried to persuade her. "Nicole, I know you are a very ambitious person. A lot of people on the Internet are calling for you to come back to show business. Are you really ready to quit?"
Nicole took a sip of tea and looked at Eliana. She looked determined and was smiling brightly.
"Don't worry, Eliana. I just want to rest for a while. I won't have my fans wait for too long. In the past, I wasn't strong enough to protect the person I loved. Now I have everything. I just want to make up for the regrets of the past."
###Chapter 673 Pack Up And Leave
When Eliana heard what Nicole said, she was stunned. After all, she felt the same way.
She wanted nothing more than to spend time with the man she loved and her kids to make up for the time they had lost together as a family.
"Eliana, I've found my happiness, and I hope you hold onto yours too," Nicole said sincerely, putting down the glass and holding Eliana's hand.
"I will," Eliana said firmly and also held Nicole's hand.
They just smiled and did not say anything more.
There was a sudden noise outside, breaking the beautiful warm moment.
"I'd like to see who is inside! How dare you not cooperate with my shoot?"
A woman's sharp voice came, and then the door was pushed open.
Upon hearing the familiar voice, Eliana raised her eyes and saw Cheryl.
"So it was you two, huh!"
Cheryl was shocked for a moment but then she became arrogant.
After all, she had taken over the movie from which Nicole had been cast out.
And there just happened to be a wedding scene to be shot for the show.
However, Cheryl was surprised and amused to see Nicole there, which gave her the perfect chance to humiliate Nicole.
Ignoring Eliana, Cheryl gave Nicole a gloating look and sneered, "Nicole, you are getting married, aren't you? I also heard that the son of the Todd family became a pauper for you, and now, the Todd family has banned you. Wouldn't it be better for you two paupers to save some money instead of hosting a wedding ceremony? That way, you won't end up homeless in the future!"
Nicole's expression darkened as she turned to Janetta, Cheryl's agent. "Janetta, are you going to let Cheryl continue being crazy? We've already booked this place, so it would be best if you leave before I get angry!"
Janetta smiled contemptuously, not taking her words seriously at all.
In her eyes, Nicole was just a paper tiger, so she was no threat to her.
Janetta had been displeased with her because she had stood in Cheryl's way many times before.
"Nicole, do you still think of yourself as some star? This shop has signed a contract with our crew, so you should be the one to get out of here!"
"Oh, really?" Unable to stand it anymore, Eliana asked, "Did you say that you have signed the contract? Show it to me!"
Janetta proudly took the contract from her bag.
"Read it, and once you're done, pack up your stuff and get out!"
Eliana took the contract, studied it, and immediately found that something was wrong.
"I don't think the date on this is correct." Pointing at the date mentioned on the contract, Eliana questioned, "It says here that you booked this shop for tomorrow, so why are you here now?"
Janetta was stunned. She immediately took the contract back and carefully read it, only to find that it was indeed booked for the next day.
"Now that we've cleared things up, pack up and leave!" Eliana said in a firm voice.
Cheryl's face darkened at once. Even if she was in the wrong, she still wanted to stay there just to spite Nicole.
"Eliana, this grudge is between me and Nicole. Mind your own
business! I won't leave. What can you do?"
Eliana and Nicole looked at her disgustedly.
Soon, the manager of the establishment heard the commotion and rushed over.
Staring at Cheryl seriously, she said, "Miss Gibson, please don't make trouble. Take your people and leave right now!"
Cheryl was furious.
Ever since Nicole left, she had become the most popular star in the entertainment circle. Wherever she went, people respected her, and she had never been humiliated like that before.
"How dare you try to drive me away? Do you know who I am? You can believe it or not, but I can cancel the contract with you any time!" Cheryl said arrogantly, thinking that the manager would compromise.
However, the manager remained fearless and unfazed as she bowed to Eliana. "I am sorry, Miss Pierce. Please forgive our bad reception. Our shop will cancel the cooperation with the crew immediately, and fully cooperate with you and Mr. Maurice Moran's wedding."
The manager of the shop was not stupid, and she knew well how important the future wife of Maurice was, compared to a mere movie star!
###Chapter 674 The Embarrassed Cheryl
"What? You will marry Maurice?" Cheryl exclaimed in shock.
Her eyes widened in disbelief.
Eliana looked at her and said calmly, "I'm already in the bridal shop now. Why are you still surprised?"
Cheryl thought it was Nicole who would pick up a wedding dress today. It turned out it was Eliana. Eliana was about to become Maurice's wife.
At this moment, Cheryl was blinded by jealousy. She said ferociously, "I don't believe it! Why can you marry into the Moran family?"
This time, Nicole chimed in, "Why can't she? After all, Maurice loves her."
Cheryl was so enraged that she said without thinking, "That's impossible! Eliana slept with a male prostitute and had two kids. And I knew that when Erica forced her to marry the male prostitute last time. Don't try to lie to me."
"Wait! What did you say?" Eliana instantly caught the flaw in Cheryl's words. "Very few people knew about this matter clearly. How did you know?"
Cheryl realized that she had said something wrong, and she panicked.
"I didn't say anything, Don't talk nonsense."
After saying this, Cheryl was about to leave. But Nicole was already prepared. She stepped forward and grabbed Cheryl's arm to stop her.
"Where do you think you're going?"

"You must tell me the truth now. Were you also involved in that matter? I found that you was a man's mistress, so you slandered me in such a mean way, huh?"
The three of them were in a stalemate, and all the staff and crew around were already looking at them.
Cheryl noticed that something was wrong, so she shouted at Janetta, "You useless rubbish! Hurry up! Come and help me."
It was only then that Janetta came back to her senses. She rushed over to help Cheryl.
Cheryl finally had a chance to fight back. She reached out and pushed Eliana hard on the chest.
At this moment, a fit of dizziness came over Eliana again. Her hand became soft, and her grip on Cheryl loosened. She staggered back and sat back on the sofa.
Cheryl took advantage of this opportunity. She broke free from restraint and ran forward.
At this moment, Nana came back just in time to see the chaotic scene.
When Cheryl was about to pass by her, she hastily picked up a glass of milkshake on the table and splashed it on Cheryl.
Cheryl subconsciously dodged. But she lost her balance and slipped.
"Ahhh!"
With a scream, she fell face down to the floor in front of everyone.
Her face fell right into the sticky puddle of milkshake.
Cheryl struggled to stand up with her face full of yellow and green milkshake. Some of them were still stuck to her hair, slowly dripping down. She was extremely embarrassed.
"Ha-ha! That's what you deserve from bullying my best friend."
While laughing, Nana took out her phone to take photos.
Of course, Nicole would not want to miss this opportunity either. She also took out her phone almost at the same time as Nana. It seemed there would be many additions to her collection of Cheryl's ugly photos.
"Hey, you are not allowed to take photos!" Janetta said as she hurried over and stood in front of Cheryl.
At this moment, Nicole and Nana put away their phones and
looked at each other tacitly. Janetta was too late.
Nicole smiled. "Let's upload them together later?"
Nana shook her phone. "Of course!"
Janetta helped Cheryl stand up. And when Cheryl heard that Nicole was going to expose her ugly photos, her eyes darkened. She was about to rush forward to fight with Nicole.
"You... I'll tear you apart!"
However, Janetta held her. "Cheryl, calm down!"
They were at daggers drawn, and the atmosphere was filled with tension.

Cheryl's mind finally cleared up a bit. When she realized how embarrassed she was, she quickly lowered her head, took off Janetta's coat, and put it on her head.
But before she left, she turned around and said fiercely, "Just wait and see!"
Nicole finally breathed a sigh of relief when she saw Cheryl leave.
But when she turned around, she saw Eliana lying on the sofa with a pale face and gasping for breath.
###Chapter 675 Try On The Wedding Dress
"Eliana, what's the matter with you?"
Nicole walked over in a panic and quickly helped Eliana up from the sofa.
"Stop fussing over me. I'm fine! Cheryl pushed me off, and I lost my breath for a second." Eliana forced a smile to reassure her.
Nicole was getting married soon, and Eliana didn't want to make her worry.
"Are you sure?"
Eliana's face looked pale, and Nicole couldn't shake off the feeling that something was wrong.
"Calm down. I can tell if there's something wrong with Eliana," Nana answered. She helped Eliana maintain the lie. "Let's go pick out your wedding dress!" Nana said.
Nicole wanted to ask more questions, but Nana whisked Eliana away to pick up the wedding dress, so she had no choice but to give up.
In a low voice, Nana asked, "How are you feeling, Eliana? Can you hold on? If you don't feel good, you must tell me immediately."
Eliana nodded and said, "My heart was racing a second ago, but I feel fine now."
Nana let out a sigh of relief.
After that, the two began to sift through the wedding dresses.
Moments later, Eliana spotted a vintage white wedding dress.
The dress had a delicate off-the-shoulder design. Its upper part was constructed out of handmade lace, while the lower part was a dress made of white gauze. Round pearls adorned the seam where the two materials met.
The dress looked luxurious and elegant, with a shape that flattered a woman's body. The floor-length veil was made with lace, resembling a portrait of the Virgin Mary.
The dress looked familiar. It looked similar to the dress in her mother's wedding photo!
Eliana's eyes lit up at the thought. She couldn't help but pull the dress off the rack to get a closer look.
"Miss Pierce, you have a good eye."
The designer of the wedding dress suddenly approached them.
Eliana recognized the designer immediately and exclaimed, "It's you! I remember you! You designed my mother's wedding dress, didn't you?"
The designer was momentarily stunned before she answered, "Miss Pierce, I didn't think you would remember me after so many years. I'm surprised you still recognized me. You look exactly like your mother did in her youth. Miss Pierce, you're just as beautiful and kind-hearted as her."
Eliana's eyes watered at her compliment. It had been so long since she'd seen the designer.
At that moment, she knew that was the wedding dress for her.
If Eliana wore a wedding dress made by someone who designed her mother's dress, then she would feel like her mother was there for her on her special day.
Eliana walked into the fitting room with the dress draped over her arm.
Nana followed her in and helped Eliana put the dress on.
Maurice called Eliana before she could put the dress on.
Nana was busy helping her get dressed while Eliana answered her phone.
As soon as she picked up the phone, she complained, "Maurice, why are you being so clingy lately? We just saw each other earlier today!"
"My fiancee is trying on her wedding dress. As her fiance, I'm curious to see what she looks like."
Maurice's deep voice was filled with joy.
"There's no need for you to come in person. I could take photos for you," Eliana offered shyly.
"Not a chance. I'm already on my way there. I booked the entire shop for you, so I need to make the experience worthwhile," Maurice teased.
Eliana was amused. "Fine, I'll let my fiance have a look. I have a good feeling about this dress."
Eliana couldn't stop smiling, even after she ended the call.
Nana continued helping Eliana change into the wedding dress.
Once Eliana pulled the curtain open, a pair of intense eyes met hers.
Maurice was here!
"How did you get here so soon?"
Eliana's eyes were wide with shock as she asked.
The white wedding dress wrapped elegantly around Eliana's slender but curvy body. The traditional cut of the dress didn't stifle her natural sensuality and charm but accentuated her body perfectly.
The translucent veil draped delicately over her hair and topped with an antique sapphire crown. The lace partly obscured her beautiful face. Against her pale skin, she looked like an ethereal beauty. Eliana looked like a goddess of the moon spoken of in legends.
Everyone in the room had their eyes on her.
Maurice couldn't hide the awe in his eyes. He looked at her with love in his eyes, as if she was the only person in the world.
It was quiet for a moment before Eliana lowered her head shyly and asked, "What do you think?"
Maurice stepped forward and cradled her in his arms before he answered, "You look beautiful."
###Chapter 676 How Much Money Have You Saved
Maurice enjoyed the moment, holding his beautiful fiancee in his arms.

Maurice let go of her and helped her straighten up the wedding dress that wrinkled a little from the hug.
"On the way here, I saw the trending topics on the Internet. They were all about Cheryl. She failed to stir up trouble with someone, and her ugly photos were exposed. I see that the place where the photos were taken was exactly this shop."
Eliana hurriedly said, "I'm fine. Cheryl didn't hurt me. But I realize that she probably has once joined forces with Harriet. I thought she just let me take the blame for the mistress incident back then. But now, I realize it seems premeditated. They must have planned it."
Maurice was not surprised. He took Eliana's hand and said, "I see. But you don't have to worry about these things now. Just focus on being my most beautiful bride."

Adrian nodded in agreement.

Maurice chuckled lightly and patted Silas on the shoulder. "Boy, come back to your senses. Aileen is asking you."

Everyone was so amused by the three children's words that they burst into laughter.
Only Nana was alone on the side, looking sad. While watching the happy scene in front of her, she wanted to cry. Because only she knew how painful it was for Eliana when she suffered from attacks.
Every time she thought that Eliana got happiness at the expense of enduring the pain, she didn't feel like celebrating it.
When Corbin noticed Nana's unusual mood, he walked over to her and hugged her.
He asked, "What's wrong?"
Nana quickly sniffed and changed the topic.
"It's nothing. I just realize I'm going to be a bridesmaid again.
I've done it many times. I also want to wear a wedding dress like those brides."
She said those words unintentionally. But when Corbin heard them, the light in his eyes instantly dimmed a lot.
Indeed, he was not like Maurice, who had billions of dollars of wealth. And he was not destined to give his woman a grand and extravagant wedding.
Nana grew up in a wealthy family, and her ex-boyfriend was Huey, who was born with a silver spoon in his mouth.
Could a poor man like him really make her happy?
Nana noticed Corbin's sudden unusual silence. It seemed that lovers really had a connection. She immediately understood what he was worried about.
So she nudged him and teased, "What are you thinking? I've been through a lot of hardship. I'm not the ignorant girl anymore."
She paused for a moment before she continued, "Corbin, tell me the truth. How much money have you saved?"
Corbin was always an honest man, so he answered honestly, "My boss has paid me a lot these years. Maybe I have at least two million..."
Before he could finish, Nana suddenly interrupted, "Two million dollars?"
Obviously, she was shocked.
Then Corbin continued to count his family property carefully.
"I still have some investments. I can probably make more money..."
"Shut up!" Nana raised her voice subconsciously, and she couldn't help looking around.
She pulled Corbin aside and said in an extremely low voice, "Shut up, you big fool! Don't show off your wealth. Don't you understand it?"
Corbin couldn't help smiling when he saw Nana's cautious look.
It seemed that a hostess would soon be taking care of the money he had saved.
###Chapter 677 One Request
After choosing the wedding dress, they went back to Eliana's house.
Maurice and Eliana were the first ones to get off the car along with the kids, while Corbin and Nana proceeded to park the car.
Upon getting off the car, Maurice's phone rang.

"Who's calling you?" asked Eliana.
Acting as though nothing was wrong, Maurice looked back at
her and said, "One of my partners is calling. I have to take this. It probably concerns the company."
He then walked aside to answer the call.

"How are Eliana and the kids?" asked Jonathan. "She's gotten thinner, hasn't she? How can you let her walk around without enough layers of clothes? She might catch a cold! Aileen and Adrian have grown taller. Their clothes don't fit that well anymore."

"Long time no see, Maurice," he remarked.
Maurice put his phone in his pocket and scoffed, "So, you've finally showed your ugly mug. It hasn't been that long, but it seems you're already at your wits' end."
Jonathan froze in place
Over the past few days, the Universe Group had been attacked by anonymous hackers and the company suffered heavy losses. He investigated and found out that the Moran Group was behind the crime.
Almost at the same time, Rosamond's company swooped in to take away many of the Universe Group's projects.
Being caught in a pincer attack between two industry giants had put the Universe Group in an awful situation.
It hadn't been that long since he returned to the country, and the Universe Group's foothold in the domestic market was still unstable. The recent attacks had damaged the company's stability even further, and it was highly probable that it would take a long time for the company to recover its losses.
Obviously, Maurice was the mastermind behind all of this. How could Jonathan not hate him?
"Hand over the antidote, bastard! Because if you don't, I will destroy the Universe Group and savor every moment of it!" Maurice had completely lost his composure.
Jonathan adjusted his glasses, smiling like the Devil himself. "I'm not going to hand it over just like that. What can you even do to me? Letting Eliana die along with the Universe Group isn't that big of a deal to me. I can always rebuild and start a new company, but people's lives can never be restored. This is payback for what she did to me.
Maurice clenched his fists, his eyes quivering with anger. He grabbed Jonathan by the collar, seemingly ready to strangle him. "Give me the fucking antidote; or else I'll send you to hell where you belong!"
Unfazed, Jonathan just allowed himself to be manhandled by Maurice.
Just as the situation was about to spiral out of control, someone intervened, "Let go of Mr. Bowman!"
Jonathan's assistant hurried to his side.
Maurice took a deep breath and paused, but he didn't let go of Jonathan yet. He shot a daunting gaze at the latter's assistant, clenching his fists.
"Fuck off!"
The assistant quivered at Maurice's gaze. It felt like a lion was staring at him, ready to devour him.
He then took out a small glass bottle, which contained dozens of white capsules.
"This is the antidote that you're looking for. I'll give it to you as long as you let Mr. Bowman go."
When Maurice heard that it was the antidote, he loosened his grip on Jonathan's collar. It was then that the latter shoved away the former's hand.
Thereafter, Jonathan winked at his assistant. The assistant threw the bottle to Maurice at once.
Upon receiving the bottle, Maurice held it tightly. "How can I be sure that this really is the antidote?"
This matter involved the health of his beloved. He was merely erring on the side of caution.
Jonathan straightened his disheveled collar and said, "If you don't trust me, you can go to the hospital and have it tested to see if its ingredients are effective. However, those pills can only bring a brief respite from the pain. The true antidote is still within my possession."
Maurice was none too pleased to hear that. "What do you want, Jonathan?"
Jonathan's eyes glinted. "I only have one request. Hand over the whole theme park project to me!"
###Chapter 678 Do Everything
For Her
For a moment, there was pin-drop silence, and the air was eerily still.

No matter what Jonathan wanted, he would temporarily agree for Eliana's sake.
So he said without hesitation, "Okay, I agree."

Gerald pressed the pause button of the pen recorder, and the voices suddenly stopped.

It turned out that Eliana was related to the White family.
This information was not included in the data found by Aleck

Eliana is related to the White family. We definitely can't allow her to marry into the Moran family. Dad, don't forget. The White family might have something to do with my brother's death."
As soon as Gerald mentioned Blair, Earle was reminded of what happened back then.
When Blair died, all clues showed that his death was not < accidental.
At that time, he began to suspect if their rival, the White family, had something to do with it.
Gerald had been observing Earle's reaction. And when he saw that Earle seemed to agree with what he said, he was ecstatic.
Actually, after he killed Blair back then, he deliberately created some evidence to point to the White family and let them take the blame for him. In this way, no one would suspect him.

Unfortunately, Earle had fallen into the trap Gerald had set up for him, and he was getting deeper and deeper into it.
He said, "Gerald, Maurice has been completely bewitched by Eliana. This can't go on like this. Although Eliana is related to the White family, the twins are the grandchildren of our Moran family. I must keep them. But as for her... She can't marry into our family."
###Chapter 679 Relapsing Into A Coma
Gerald was overjoyed when he heard it. He then said hurriedly, "Dad, I'll take care of Eliana. Let me help you deal with her."
His eagerness made Earle suspicious.
Earle slowly came back to his senses, and he felt that something was wrong.
He knew Gerald very well. Gerald might be planning something bad now that he was so energetic.
Despite his disappointment with Maurice, Earle could not trust Gerald.
"No, you don't have to. Go and ask Aleck to come in. I'll let him handle it. It's a perfect opportunity for him to make amends."
Earle was in a fit of anger just a while ago, but he still believed in Aleck.
Even if Maurice bought Aleck off, Earle believed that his grandson did not want to destroy the Moran family. He was just blinded by his love for Eliana.
Maurice would return to normal once Eliana was gone.

Why?
Why did Earle choose to believe Maurice despite seeing him do something wrong?
Gerald couldn't take it any longer and revealed his true character. "It's unfair!" he screamed angrily. "Dad! I'm your son. Why do you treat Maurice and me differently? You haven't changed at all. Just as you always thought highly of my brother while ignoring me!"
Gerald had been thinking this way for many years.
Earle sensed Gerald's anger and resentment in his words. He was even more disappointed in him.

"Gerald, stop your nonsense. Now hand me the medicine bottle on the table!"

Nancy approached him after noticing he didn't appear well and < asked, "Aleck, what happened? You look bad."

Aleck smiled bitterly. "I'm afraid it won't be as simple as that. This is about something significant. Eliana..."
Before he could even finish speaking, a loud noise roared in the living room.

Nancy hurriedly got into the car as well.

###Chapter 680 What An Ungrateful Son!

###Chapter 681

Eliana closed her eyes and expressed her anger silently.
Jonathan suddenly felt very frustrated. "Is Maurice that good? Is he worth your life? Leaving him is the best option for the both of you!"
"I won't leave him," Eliana replied, opening her eyes. There was nothing but determination in her eyes. "I lied to him many times before and did many things that I thought were good for him. In the end, it only caused him pain. I won't do that again. Maurice has lost his family members twice. I won't let him experience it again."
"Aren't you afraid that I will make him lose everything?" Jonathan asked with jealousy.
Eliana looked at him calmly and said, "Jonathan, I don't know what you are going to do. Go ahead and fight if you still want to. But Maurice will definitely fight back, and I have faith in him."
The words "I have faith in him" made Jonathan let go of her dejectedly.
He realized that he had completely lost the fight.
*Please excuse me, I need to use the bathroom to clean myself."
Eliana stood up, trembling, and forced herself to go to the bathroom.
Before she could go home, she had to clean all the bloodstains from her body. She couldn't let Maurice see them because it would break his heart.
"Why did Eliana become like this?" Jonathan asked the doctor angrily after Eliana had left. "That drug shouldn't have such a strong effect!"
"Perhaps it's because Miss Pierce has a special constitution, so she has a strong reaction to this drug," the doctor responded in a trembling voice.
Jonathan slumped into his chair and remained silent for a long time.
Apparently, Eliana was not afraid of pain or the threat of death just so she could be with Maurice.
But Jonathan didn't want her to die.
It was at that moment that Jonathan decided to set Eliana free.
In the Moran Group, Eliana was waiting for Maurice to come back.
Although she believed in Maurice's ability, she was still worried.
In fact, while she was talking to Maurice a while ago, she had already guessed that he was going to negotiate with Jonathan.
But she didn't stop him.
She had done everything she could. No matter what decision Maurice made, she and the children would support him.
During the lunch break, Lucia came to find Eliana. The two decided to have lunch together in the nearby business district.
They went to a nice restaurant and chatted while eating.
"You know what, Eliana? Wyatt got into a fight with his family over Nicole. Wyatt's mother was so angry. She pretended to be sick, tricking him so he would come back, but her ploy was exposed. She wanted to ban Nicole from acting because she couldn't persuade Wyatt. Unexpectedly, Nicole recently received a major international award for a low- budget literary film she made last year. Now she is popular abroad. Even if she couldn't find work here, she could easily land a job abroad. The film industry in those foreign countries is not under Wyatt's mother's control. So she became even more enraged. This time, her anger made her very sick."
Lucia was smiling while speaking. Hence, Eliana gradually relaxed, influenced by Lucia's smiles.
"What's so funny?"
Suddenly, a slightly sarcastic female voice cut through their conversation.
Both Eliana and Lucia looked in the direction of the voice.
###Chapter 688 It's All Your Fault
"Harriet? Why is she here?" Lucia asked.
She hadn't expected to run into Harriet in this place.
"How come she appeared everywhere I went? Lucia murmured.
Eliana's smile vanished almost instantly.
'Long time no see, Eliana." Harriet didn't seem to notice the disgust in Lucia's and Eliana's eyes. She approached them with a strange tone and asked, "Have you been very proud recently?"
"Harriet, I don't think we have anything to talk about," Eliana said, unable to ignore her presence.
Lucia rolled her eyes and commented, "Let's go, Eliana. Seeing such a kind of person makes me sick!"
Then she took Eliana's hand in hers and walked away.
Harriet, on the other hand, wouldn't let them go easily. She took a bold step forward, blocking their path.
"Eliana, you bitch! It's all your fault! You must have criticized the Stone family in front of Maurice and asked him to remove the Stone Group from the theme park project, right?"
Harriet had turned into a shrew.
Maurice kicked the Stone Group out of the theme park project?
Eliana did not expect it, but she refused to let anyone smear her. "Harriet, you must be to blame for the Stone Group's expulsion. It has absolutely nothing to do with me."
Harriet laughed sarcastically.
"Eliana, you have no right to blame me! To be honest, even if Maurice kicked out the Stone Group, he still didn't win! He's going to give the project to Jonathan. And it's all your fault! You should just stay with the White family. You are causing trouble to the Moran family!"
Eliana was dumbfounded.
What was Harriet talking about?
Maurice was going to give Jonathan the theme park project? Was it their deal?
"Shut up!" Lucia yelled. "Harriet, you're a complete loser. What qualifications do you have to squawk? Mr. Moran is willing to give up everything for Eliana, but he refuses to even look at you!"
Lucia's words broke Harriet's heart, and she yelled angrily, "That's because Maurice is too stupid! The Morans are stupid! That's why they like an evil woman like Eliana!"
"Enough!" Eliana had had enough that she poured a glass of wine directly to Harriet.
She would never allow this crazy woman to insult the two families.
"Elians! You bitch! How dare you!"
Harriet raised her hand, ready to slap Eliana across the face.
Eliana was ready to fight back, but before she could, a big hand grabbed Harriet's wrist firmly.
"What are you doing?"
A cold voice came from behind Eliana.
It was Maurice.
He pushed Harriet away and wrapped his arms around Eliana.
"Are you okay?"
Maurice's eyes were worried, and his tone was gentle.
Harriet was wet with wine, looking embarrassed. However, Maurice ignored her completely.
"I'm perfectly fine. She can't hurt me, especially since Lucia is here," Eliana replied, shaking her head.
But Maurice still looked her up and down carefully. After confirming that she was fine, he stared coldly at Harriet. "How dare you come here to aggravate Biana? Do you truly want the Stone Group to go bankrupt?"
Harriet was annoyed by Maurice's overprotectiveness toward Eliana.
"Maurice, you've gone too far! You kicked out the Stone Group for a woman. I'll see if you can still be arrogant after the Universe Group takes away your theme park project!"
Maurice sneered. "The Stone family was kicked out because they cut corners when doing the project. I'm still considering whether or not to collaborate with Jonathan."
"You are lying!" Harriet exclaimed.
"You'd better go back and ask your mother about the truth," Maurice retorted.
Harriet was furious and left.
"Wait!" Maurice stopped Harriet and said, "Now that you're here, take our wedding invitation card."
Then he winked at Corbin, who had been with him all along. "Corbin, give it to her."
"I won't take it! I won't go to your fucking wedding ceremony!" Harriet exclaimed, gritting her teeth.
"It isn't for you. Why don't you let others go if you don't? Corbin rolled his eyes and stuffed the wedding invitation card into Harriet's hand.
Harriet became even angrier when she saw that it was for her mother.
"Do not forget to give it to her," Maurice added.
"You... Just wait and see!"
Harriet held the wedding invitation card tightly as if she was going to crush it.
The moment she walked out of the restaurant, she swore to herself, "Let's wait and see. I have a number of plans to stop this marriage!"
###Chapter 689 God Would Understand And Forgive Him
"Ha-ha! It's so funny! Eliana, have you seen Harriet's expression after she was scolded just now? It's so funny, right?" Lucia couldn't stop herself from laughing after Harriet left.
Corbin gave a little cough and winked at her, as if saying, "Don't you have discerning eyes? Can't you see that these two are having a good time?"
Lucia immediately understood. She wiped the tears from her eyes because of laughing and intended to exit decisively. *Eliana... I suddenly remember that I still have something to do at the company. I'll leave first. Let's meet again next time."
After saying this, Lucia left quietly. There was no third wheel anymore.
This time, Maurice also said to Eliana, "Let's go back first. I have something to give you."
Maurice quickly returned to the Moran Group's building with Eliana in his arms.
As soon as they entered his office, he immediately took out a small medicine bottle, in which a red capsule lay quietly inside.
"Eliana, take this. You will be fine after having this medicine." Maurice held the bottle in front of Eliana and said guiltily, "I know what you have suffered during these days. I'm sorry. It's all my fault. I failed to protect you well, and I didn't solve this matter faster."
Eliana looked at the medicine battle in front of her. Harriet's words just now echoed in her mind.
She pushed the medicine bottle away and stared at Maurice with burning eyes. "Did you agree to Jonathan's condition in exchange of this medicine? Maurice, answer me!"
Maurice didn't answer her question directly. He only said, "Don't worry. Jonathan may not show up in front of us again." Eliana was confused. "Why?"
Maurice finally agreed to Jonathan's request. "Because he asked me to say something to you on his behalf. He wanted to say he was sorry."
"What? How could he...'
Eliana was so surprised that she was at a loss for words.
"Maybe Jonathan used to be a good person. But he changed after he lost the love of his life. He missed that person so much that he tried to keep you who resemble her."
Jonathan was obviously an enemy. But that moment he said sorry, and Maurice inexplicably understood his inner thoughts.
Eliana was silent for a long time.
She suddenly remembered Jonathan in her memory. He was not always stubborn. She had also seen his inadvertent tenderness.
Perhaps Maurice was right. He just couldn't let go.
At this time, Eliana looked at Maurice and couldn't help sighing.
"If I die one day, will you be like him? Will you also find someone similar to me to replace me?
"No, I won't," Maurice answered without hesitation.
"Really? Why?' Eliana asked.
*Because you are the only love of my life. I love you not because of your face or because you gave birth to my children. I love you because you are the woman I love the most."
Maurice used the calmest tone to say the most beautiful honeyed words in the world.
These words were like the warm sunshine, dispelling the depression in Eliana's heart.
She took the bottle from Maurice, trying to hold back her tears.
"Oh, I see."
She then picked up a glass of water and ate the capsule.
The moment she swallowed it, she felt unprecedentedly relaxed.
She wrapped her arms around Maurice's waist, leaned her head against his broad chest, and said affectionately, "Maurice, after my illness is cured, there will be no more obstacles to our future. We will have a smooth-sailing and peaceful life."
Maurice hugged her back and answered firmly, "Yes, you're right."
He still hid Earle and Nancy's matter from her.
He believed he could slowly persuade Earle and Nancy in the future. But for now, he wanted to be selfish, ignore his identity as the heir of the Moran family, and be with the woman he loved most.
God would understand and forgive him.
After a short period of warmth and affection, they had to return to reality.
Maurice still had a lot of work to deal with. He also had to figure out what Earle had arranged.
"It's time for me to go to work." As he spoke, Maurice reluctantly let go of Eliana.
"Go ahead. It's time for me to go home too. Aileen and Adrian will be off school soon," Eliana said with a smile. Then she tiptoed and planted a kiss on Maurice's cheek.
"Okay, let's go. I'll take you downstairs."
Maurice gently took Bliana's hand and led her to the elevator.
They were now in a confined space, and their breathing seemed to be entangled. The air around them was full of ambiguity.
The scents emanating from their bodies seemed to seduce each other.
Finally, all the love and attachment they felt burst out at this moment. Almost at the same time, they hugged and kissed each other affectionately.
###
Chapter 690 Being Watched
They were both engrossed in the kiss and couldn't get out of it.
After so many practices, Eliana's kissing had now improved and perfectly caught up with Maurice's rhythm.
In the elevator, they kissed each other more and more passionately.
They were absorbed in their kissing, wishing that time would stop at this precise moment.
The elevator door opened the next moment.
The scene unfolded to a large number of employees standing outside the elevator. They were taken aback.
No one dared to enter the elevator because one of the two passengers was the company's CEO.
Eliana was still kissing Maurice when she sensed other people's gazes. She opened her eyes and looked aside...
Damn it! Why were there so many people here?
She was so embarrassed.
When Eliana came to her senses, she pushed Maurice away and prepared to exit the elevator.
But Maurice pulled her back into his arms. "Why are you running? We haven't arrived yet."
Maurice's voice was magnetic and hoarse, and there was still a lustful look in his eyes. Eliana was stunned and froze in Maurice's arms.
'Hello.'
Maurice greeted the employees calmly and without any hint of embarrassment.
"Hello, Mr. Moran."

Some employees recognized that the woman in front of them was Eliana, the former designer of the Design. Department.
"You don't want to come in?"
Maurice moved to stand on the elevator's inner side with Eliana.
The employees suddenly came to their senses and hurried into the elevator.
The elevator was then filled with dead silence. Everyone's gaze was drawn to Maurice and Eliana, eventually settling on the couple rings they wore.
The rings seemed to be the pair in the trending topic... Suddenly, they were enlightened.
Mr. Moran's mysterious girlfriend was Bliana!
What kind of woman could win the heart of an eligible bachelor like Maurice?
The employees couldn't help but stare at Eliana curiously.
Unconsciously, Eliana became nervous, and her palms began to sweat. She wanted to hide her hands behind her back.
Unfortunately, Maurice did not give her the chance. He held Eliana's hand and purposefully showed her ring to everyone.
Two similar platinum rings shone brightly, especially when illuminated by the light. Maurice purposefully did it to let everyone know that his girlfriend was Eliana.
Eliana gradually relaxed as she felt the warmth of Maurice's palm.
For a brief moment, the employees looked at one another with envy in their eyes.
They then began to whisper to each other.
"I had no idea Mr. Moran could be so romantic! What a perfect man!"
"Yeah, he looked at Miss Pierce so gently. I feel like I will also fall in love with him!"
Some brave female employees even congratulated Eliana, saying, "Miss Pierce, you must be very happy! I have always supported you before!"
"Thank... Thank you!"
Eliana was extremely shy.
The elevator soon reached the ground floor. They were all so excited that they forgot to exit the elevator.
"Haven't you seen enough? Maurice raised his eyebrows and scolded the employees. "Go back to work now. Get out of the way."
"No, no, no... No need!" Eliana cut him off. "Go ahead with your work. I'm leaving."
Then she bolted without looking back, straight to the company's gate, and Maurice couldn't stop her.
Maurice's eyes were filled with affection as he looked at Eliana's receding figure.
He then went back to his office.
Only then did he learn that Earle's lawyers had already arrived.
One of them was a man named Cory Moreno. Maurice felt that he was unfamiliar with the man. He had never seen him on Earle's legal team before.
But apparently, Cory was the one leading the team.
He fixed his gaze on Maurice, took out some documents, and declared, "Mr. Moran, Mr. Earle Moran is serious this time. He asks you to hand over all the power of the Moran Group immediately. You cannot postpone it!"
###Chapter 691 Ask Wyatt For Help
Cory looked very aggressive. However, Maurice just sat down in front of him casually in an imposing manner.
"Hand over all my power to..." Maurice's voice trailed off and stared at Cory mockingly. "To whom? To Gerald?" he asked coldly.
Cory pushed the gold-rimmed glasses on the bridge of his nose and said arrogantly, "Mr. Moran, you don't need to worry about that. Your grandfather has his own arrangements. You just need to follow his orders."
At this moment, Corbin chimed in, "How dare you talk to Mr. Moran like that!'
He was so angry that he wanted to step forward. But Maurice stretched out his hand to stop him.
"Just leave the documents and go. I'll let you know later."
Maurice didn't choose to have a direct conflict with Earle's legal team.
"But Mr. Moran, your grandfather said it should be executed immediately," Cory retorted at once.

Cory froze for a moment. He broke out in a cold sweat. And no one from the legal team behind him dared to say anything.

This group of lawyers came valiantly. But in the end, they left dejectedly.

On the other side of the city, Wyatt was in the kitchen of Moonlight restaurant, helping with the dishes.
The phone in his pocket suddenly rang.
The noise in the kitchen was so loud that he didn't hear it for a while. He only knew when Rosalie who stood beside him told him. Then he answered it.
"Wyatt, are you busy?"
When Wyatt heard Maurice's voice, he held the phone with one hand and the menu with the other. He smiled brightly and said, "Wow! Maurice, is this really you? What makes you call me today? Tell me, what can I do for you? I'm busy right now. If it's nothing important, I'll hang up."
On the other end of the line, Maurice loosened his tie and said, "Wyatt, I need your help to check the patient's information in all the hospitals in the city. The Todd family has more resources in the medical industry than me, so you can find out faster."
Wyatt frowned in confusion and asked, "Check the patients' information? Why? Is something wrong?"
"My grandfather took my grandma out, but they didn't come back. I have been looking for them, but I couldn't find them until now. I suspect he is ill," Maurice explained, expressing his speculation.
"What? Your grandpa is ill?"
Wyatt wanted to say yes. But he suddenly remembered that he had already severed ties with the Todd family. He realized he was in an embarrassing situation.
"Wyatt, I know this is hard for you. If you can't do it, I'll find another way."
Maurice also knew what happened between Wyatt and the Todd family, so he understood if Wyatt couldn't help him.
He was about to give up when Wyatt suddenly said, "What are you talking about? We are best friends, and we grew up together. Although I have severed ties with my family, I'm willing to give it a try for you."
Of course, Wyatt couldn't refuse Maurice.
But after hanging up the phone, he couldn't help scratching his head.
He promised Maurice, but he didn't know how to do it yet.
After all, he vowed to sever ties with the Todd family. If he went back to ask for help from the Todd family, it seemed a little unreasonable.
While he was worrying, all the new dishes in the restaurant had been prepared.
This time, the food taster he invited had also arrived. It was Nicole.
Wyatt had no choice but to set aside Maurice's matter temporarily and serve the dishes first.
Nicole tasted each dish seriously and began to comment.
But soon, she realized something was wrong.
Wyatt didn't seem okay. Did something happen today?
In the past, as soon as he saw her, he would immediately cling to her. But today, she had already said so much, but he did not respond at all.
###Chapter 692 She Is Your Mother
Nicole approached Wyatt and asked softly, "Wyatt, is something wrong? Did you encounter any difficulties in making the new dishes?"
Wyatt pondered for a moment. Then he finally said, "It's not a big deal. Maurice called me just now, asking me a favor..." He stopped for a moment. Obviously, he wanted to say something but stopped at a second thought. Nicole was a little confused. She asked, "What favor did he ask from you? Why do you look so worried?" Wyatt glanced at Nicole anxiously. "I might need to go back to see my mother. I need her help." After saying this, he looked at Nicole uneasily, fearing she would be angry.
Nicole was stunned for a moment when she heard this. Then she laughed and said, "Then go ahead. Why are you looking at me?"
"I'm afraid it will make you unhappy," Wyatt said, smiling bitterly.
Nicole stretched out her finger, tapped his forehead lightly, and said with a smile, "She is your mother, and you are her son. Can you avoid seeing her for the rest of your life?"
"No, it's not like that," Wyatt said anxiously. He grabbed her hand and added, "I know my mother has hurt you deeply. But Nicole, don't worry. I won't let her humiliate you ever again."
Nicole thought Wyatt was such a fool.
But she was moved. A trace of sweetness surged in her heart.
She said solemnly, "Wyatt, listen to me. I can't forgive your mother, and I will never want to see her for the rest of my life. But it doesn't mean that I will stop you from seeing your mother. I have no right, and I won't do that. Do you understand?"
'Nicole, thank you."
After saying this, Wyatt hugged Nicole tightly.
He felt fortunate to have such a kind and beautiful girlfriend.
"We are getting married soon. As your fiancee, I will support all your decisions."
Nicole leaned against Wyatt's chest, giving him courage and strength.
Wyatt took a deep breath. And with a painful expression, he said, "Nicole, my mother deceived me so badly all these years. She saw me in pain, and she saw me hurt the person I love most. And she even wanted to continue hurting you by banning you from the entertainment industry."
Those painful memories flooded his mind, making his body tremble all over.
Nicole held him tightly and comforted him softly, "it's all right. Everything is over now, and I never blame you."
It took Wyatt a long time to calm down. He said in a daze, "Nicole, I actually don't have the courage to go back to see her. It seems that I have never really known my mother. She has been acting all the time. And now, I can't tell whether
her words are true or not."
Nicole patted his back gently and said, "It's okay. If you are scared, I can go with you. But I'll just wait for you outside." "Okay," Wyatt said with a nod, forcing a smile.
He knew that Nicole was willing to wait for him. But he could only do it by himself.
This time, Nicole decided to change the topic. She said in a relaxed tone, 'Can we try the dishes now? This is for Eliana's wedding, so we can't be careless."
"Okay, honey."
Wyatt felt a little better now.
Then they formally began to try the dishes.
"Is the steak a little old?"
"No, it's tasty. Just like me."
"Oh God!" Nicole rolled her eyes.
The soon-to-be-married couple was so sweet, even if they were only trying the dishes.
"You two have tried so much. Drink some water first."
Rosalie handed them two glasses of water with a smile.
"Thank you, Rosalie," Nicole said, taking the glasses with a smile.
Then she teased Wyatt by not giving him the water.
Rosalie looked at them happily. They were so sweet, joking with each other.
She felt so good to know that the two people she treated as her own children had found their happiness.
For the sake of helping Maurice, Wyatt took Nicole back to the Todd family's house.
As soon as he reached the destination, he looked at both familiar and strange iron gates, feeling nervous.
He took a deep breath to calm himself down and opened the car door.
When Nicole saw his nervous face, she couldn't help teasing him. "Wyatt, this is your home. What are you afraid of? You make me feel like I am sending a child to kindergarten."
###
Chapter 693 Back To The Todd Family's House
Eventually, Wyatt gathered enough courage to walk into the Todd family's house.
"Mr. Todd, you're finally back!"
The moment the elderly butler saw Wyatt, his eyes lit up and welled up with tears, and he immediately approached the latter.
Feeling a little embarrassed, Wyatt answered, "Erick, do you know where my mother is?
The butler, Erick Vance, wiped his tears away and said, "She's upstairs, Mr. Todd! You should go and see her. It saddens me to say this, but her health is dwindling."
Wyatt's heart sank, but he still thought that this might be another trick.
Once he was upstairs, he knocked on the door of Dora's room. "Mom, it's me."
Moments later, he heard a voice from inside say, "Come in."
Wyatt walked in, visibly uneasy.
Inside, Dora was sitting in a wheelchair by the window. Her face was pale and her legs were covered with a blanket. She looked at Wyatt lightly and said, "It seems you still remember how to come back. I thought you've been so beguiled by that woman that you've forgotten which family you came from."
"Mom, what happened to your legs?"
A look of shock washed over Wyatt's face. He hurried to her side, squatted down, and put his hand on Dora's legs. "Are you okay?" he asked in disbelief.
Dora had used self-harm to trick him before, so even if the butler said that she was ill, Wyatt thought that his mother was just deceiving him again. Thus, he didn't take it seriously.
But to his dismay, she was actually in a bad condition.
Upon seeing the concern on Wyatt's face, Dora's face softened. "It's nothing serious. This is just my rheumatism acting up. I lost my balance and fell down the stairway."
"I'm so sorry, Mom." Wyatt lowered his head, riddled with guilt.
Dora placed her hand on his head, and replied, "I can forgive you as long as you leave that woman and come back home." Wyatt wanted to retort, but he bit his words back. He knew that his mother really wanted him to return to the Todd family, but there was no way he would give up his love.
He was worried about his mother's health, so he didn't refute her and just decided to change the topic. "Mom, let me help you get up."
"Thanks, son. Dora nodded.
Cautiously and gently, Wyatt helped her stand up and then they walked out one step at a time.
"By the way, didn't Dad come back to see you after you got yourself hurt?' asked Wyatt.
Dora froze for a moment and then calmed down. "Your father is busy with work. He probably doesn't have the time."
"Mom, enough! Stop making excuses for that asshole!" Wyatt interrupted her, clearly infuriated. "He's busy, you say? If he's so busy with work every damned day, then how come someone found him attend the fashion week with a famous supermodel the other day?"
Agassi Todd and Dora had been living apart for many years, and their relationship had been awful all these years.
He was a playboy who frequently changed girlfriends. Though he had a wife at home, he still preferred to keep numerous mistresses around.
"Wyatt, don't say that! He's still your father, Dora replied calmly. "Our marriage was purely a business decision. I don't care whatever he does outside the confines of this home."
Wyatt clenched his teeth, holding back his anger.
This was how his parents had always been. They were more concerned about personal interest that their relationship. The loveless marriage that they shared also affected Wyatt.
Because he had seen too many conflicts between his parents, he never believed that true love existed; that was, until the day he met Nicole.
"Mom, have you ever been happy all these years?" Wyatt finally asked the question that he had been wanting to ask all his life.
Dora wanted to tell him that she was happy, but she couldn't bring herself to say it.
"Mom, I don't want to end up like you and Dad. I'll live a happy life with Nicole," Wyatt said firmly.

"That's enough, Mom!" Wyatt didn't expect that Dora would continue to slander Nicole. He was really annoyed and disappointed in her.

Dora trembled in anger, still intent on making a fuss about this.

"Wyatt! Come back here!"
Dora had never panicked like this before. She was worried that Wyatt would never come back again.
For a moment, she didn't care about her legs anymore. She didn't hesitate to go after Wyatt, but she inevitably fell down from her wheelchair.
"Wyatt!" Dora cried.
###
Chapter 694 Can You Make My Son Happy
Dora fell to the floor. She lowered her head and called out hoarsely, "Wyatt..."

She couldn't believe Nicole would say such a thing to Wyatt. This was a very good opportunity for Nicole to sow dissension between Dora and Wyatt. Why didn't she do it?

So I didn't become a bad person like my father. If we have our own children in the future, she won't let them become bad people either. Don't you still want to accept her?"
Dora was silent. She didn't say anything about Wyatt's question.

"Mom, I'm leaving now. Take care of yourself."
He then stood up and was about to leave.

Wyatt's heart sank. He clenched his fists tightly.

"It's not me. It's Maurice. Earle is missing, and he wants to use the Todd family's power to investigate the hospitals in the city. Maybe it can lead to Earle's whereabouts."
Wyatt finally said it. But he felt very nervous.

'Just wait here. I think we can have the result in a while."
That was it?

Dora looked at Wyatt, feeling he was silly. She got angry. "I am in a wheelchair now. How can I arrest her? Call her and ask her to come in. I won't hurt her."

On the other end of the line, Nicole imagined how helpless Wyatt was. She burst into laughter and finally summoned up her courage.
