Eliana and Maurice looked at each other in surprise. 
Earle's voice was very clear and everyone present heard him.
The senior executives and employees of the Moran Group present were in an uproar after hearing what Earle said. 
"Maurice, long time no see!" 
Gerald finally showed up.He pushed Earle, who was sitting in a wheelchair, straight to the stage.
###Chapter 707 A Sudden Change In The Wedding
It happened so suddenly, and Wyatt was the first to react. 
Holding the walkie-talkie firmly in his hand, he shouted anxiously, "Somebody, stop him!" 
The bodyguards present immediately rushed up. 
"What do you want to do? Take a good look at the man sitting in this wheelchair and let me see if you still dare to move," 
Gerald shouted angrily at the bodyguards who were rushing over to stop him. 
The bodyguards stopped and took a closer look at the man sitting in the wheelchair. 
The old man had a thick scarf around his neck and was wearing a hat on his head. 
Despite this disguise, the guards recognized the man's eyes and eyebrows, which really resembled Earle's. 
Seeing that it was indeed the head of the Moran family in the wheelchair, no one dared to act recklessly. 
Frowning tightly, Gerald ordered the bodyguards, "Get out of the way!" 
The guards gazed at each other for a moment before finally stepping aside to let them pass. 
On stage, Maurice stood in front of Eliana and the children to protect them.He didn't take his eyes off Gerald while wearing a frighteningly serious expression.He still couldn't believe that Earle was really with Gerald. 
What did they have in mind to do? Why did they show up at this time? With a mischievous grin, Gerald pushed Earle in front of Maurice.
Then he leaned over to Earle, patted him on the arm, and said in a meaningful tone, "Dad, if you have something to say today, just say it in front of everyone." 
Earle understood what Gerald expected of him and complied. 
He looked up at Maurice and asked angrily, "Maurice, how could you marry this woman! She's related to the White family!" 
Earle's words hurt Eliana and her face suddenly turned pale.She couldn't help but look unconsciously at Maurice. 
However, Maurice was not one to be intimidated and he said firmly, "Grandpa, I don't care what Eliana's family background is.She is the only woman I would ever marry." 
"Bastard! You really disappoint me!" 
Earle snapped.He took out a document and angrily threw it at Maurice. 
"I will never allow anyone related to the White family to marry into the Moran family! Since you insist on marrying her, sign your name on this document and renounce your position as CEO of the Moran Group.Gerald would now be the new CEO of the company." 
Hearing Earle's words, Maurice was stunned. 
"You intend to give the company to Gerald?" Maurice asked in shock. 
Earle nodded and said firmly, "Yes, he's my only son now, so it's only natural for him to inherit the Moran Group.And I'm not healthy now, so he will have power of attorney and become by the same my legal guardian."
Maurice was even more shocked after hearing Earle’s words.He stared at the nervous man in the wheelchair and had a strong feeling that something was wrong. 
Earle knew better than anyone that Gerald was a good-for-nothing. 
Earle had worked hard all his life to build the Moran Group. 
No matter how angry he was, he wouldn't hand over the company to Gerald so easily. 
Moreover, Earle had just said Gerald was henceforth his legal guardian and that he would give him power of attorney. 
This was tantamount to giving Gerald absolute power over his life. 
Earle would never do something so stupid. 
Maurice walked forward slowly, looking straight into Earle's eyes. 
Maurice had the deep feeling that something was wrong. 
"Grandpa, calm down first, okay? If we fall out on such an important occasion, it will have a great negative impact on the Moran Group." 
Earle subconsciously shrank back in the wheelchair and lowered his head. 
He pushed Gerald, who was beside him, and said nervously, "You...You deal with it." 
A smirk appeared on Gerald's face and he said proudly, "Maurice, you have heard what your grandpa said, right? Hurry up and do as he said." 
Now, Maurice knew for sure that something was wrong with Earle.
In the past, no matter how seriously ill Earle had been, he would always stay strong and would never show any vulnerability. 
Now, not only did he look scared, but he hid behind Gerald and asked him to handle the matter for him. 
Ignoring Gerald, Maurice squatted down in front of Earle and grabbed the latter's hand. 
He looked his grandfather in the eye and asked seriously, "Grandpa, are you sure you want to do this?" 
Earle's hand shook slightly, and he turned his head hastily to avoid meeting Maurice's eyes. 
Seeing this, Gerald feared that Maurice suspected something, so he kicked Maurice in the knee. 
"How dare you question your grandpa's decision? If you didn't insist on marrying that bitch, would your grandpa be so furious and fall ill again? It's all your fault.You really disappointed your grandpa.Now, kneel down and apologize!" 
Since Maurice had all his attention focused on Earle, he didn't have time to dodge Gerald's attack. 
The kick was so heavy that Maurice felt a sharp pain in his knee.He lost his balance and fell on one knee. 
At this moment, a hint of morbid joy flashed through Gerald's eyes. 
It was such a satisfaction for him to see the arrogant Maurice so humble now.He even managed to force Maurice to kneel down and give him everything. 
Sitting in the wheelchair, Earle still didn’t say a word, as if acquiescing in what Gerald had said. 
"Maurice!"
Eliana's heart tightened when she saw Maurice been forced on his knee.She anxiously ran to Maurice and helped him up. 
"Gerald, are you crazy?" Eliana snapped. 
However, Gerald only sneered at her. 
"Eliana, you are not a good person! It was Maurice who ruined the Pierce family.You should have avenged your parents, or at least never forgive the one who hurt them.That's what a filial daughter would have done.I didn't expect you to be so cheeky.You turned your back on your parents for power and wealth!" 
After Gerald said that, the audience burst into an uproar.It was real chaos.
###Chapter 708 A Chaos Situation
"Oh my! Did I hear him well? What did Gerald mean? Is there any secret behind the bankruptcy of the Pierce Group?" 
"I remember that Maurice took over the Pierce Group after it went bankrupt and Eliana's parents died.Does that mean he had carefully planned everything?" 
"Does this mean that Maurice is really responsible for the death of Eliana’s parents? And to think that Eliana married him now! What a shame!" 
This huge scoop caused a stir among the guests. 
Meanwhile, the journalists present had already taken out their cameras and began to film the scene. 
"Gerald, what nonsense are you talking about?" 
Maurice couldn't hold back his anger anymore.His eyes were blood red and blue veins stood out on his neck.He grabbed Gerald by the collar and lifted him up with all his strength. 
Gerald laughed wildly. 
"What's wrong? Are you angry that I embarrassed you by telling the truth?" 
Gerald had been very careful back then not to leave any clues when he harmed the Pierce family.He was therefore certain that Maurice could find no proof to refute his statements. 
"you're asking for it!" 
Maurice's eyes narrowed, and a dangerous aura emanated from him.He clenched his fists and threw a punch in Gerald's face. 
The two men immediately began to brawl.
"They are fighting!" someone shouted in shock. 
The guests all stood up and stepped back in fear. 
Seeing that the whole matter had escalated, Eliana was at a loss. 
However, she quickly forced herself to calm down.Her experience with Maurice before they finally got married had made her very hardened. 
They'd been through so many ups and downs and now they could finally be happy together.So, Eliana would not let anything get in the way of her happiness. 
"Nana! Corbin!" 
She shouted to the two people who seemed to be in a daze. 
"Nana and Corbin, stop anyone from filming the scene and deal with the journalists too.I'll deal with the guests," Eliana said firmly. 
Corbin came to his senses and nodded seriously. 
"Okay! I'll do it right away." 
At this moment, Wyatt also came to his senses and he rushed to separate Maurice and Gerald. 
"Stop that now!" Wyatt shouted. 
Maurice finally calmed down a little and stopped.He had hit Gerald so hard and so many times that the left side of Gerald's face was swollen. 
Now, Gerald hated Maurice even more.
Just now when Maurice and Gerald were brawling, Eliana walked to the stage and bowed to the guests. 
"I'm really sorry that you had to witness this mess today.Please go back to the castle and have a rest while we handle this matter." 
Looking at the poor bride in front of them, the guests didn't have the heart to embarrass her any further. 
They didn't make things more difficult for her and left the wedding site in order.It wasn't until all the guests had left that Eliana finally showed a tired expression. 
Adrian and Aileen rushed up and hugged her. 
"Mommy, are you okay?" the kids asked with concern. 
Silas also came to her, looking worried. 
Eliana had to force a smile and comfort the children first. 
"Don't worry, darlings, I'm fine.Did it scare you guys?" The kids shook their heads. 
Maurice suddenly turned around and said, "Eliana, take the kids away first." 
"Okay, be careful," Eliana said, taking a deep look at Maurice. 
She then took the children's hands and they left the scene. 
As they headed for the exit, Silas kept looking back, and the scene just now kept flashing in his mind. 
Maurice was blocking his sight, so he didn't see Earle clearly just now. 
However, he had the feeling that Earle was a little strange today.
After hesitating for a while, Silas let go of Eliana’s hand. 
"Auntie Eliana, I have the feeling that my great-grandfather is rather strange today, and I want to go back and see what's wrong." 
Eliana sighed and said gently, "Silas, it's real chaos there.What if you're in danger when you go there? I am your aunt and I have to protect you.You heard what your uncle said just now, right? Now, let's go back and rest, okay?" 
Hearing this, Aileen raised her fist and said seriously, "Silas, don't be afraid.I can protect you too!" 
Silas hesitated for a while and finally gave up the idea. 
Eliana and the three children continued to walk to the exit and back to the castle.But when they reached the gate, they were stopped by a group of reporters. 
The reporters surrounded them and didn't even let the children go. 
"Eliana, is what Gerald said true? Did Maurice really make the Pierce Group go bankrupt?" 
"Did you know that your husband might be responsible for your parents' death? If you did, why did you marry into the Moran family?" 
"Eliana, it seems that Earle doesn't like you.Will you break up with Maurice because of this?" 
"Eliana..." 
The reporters bombarded Eliana with questions, which annoyed her. 
For a moment, even the bodyguards couldn't stop the excited reporters.
In their excitement, the reporters jostled and trampled Eliana, and her white dress was spotted with several footprints.She tried in vain to get rid of these disturbing reporters. 
The only thing that mattered to her now was to protect the three children. 
Suddenly, a clear male voice was heard. 
"Stop bothering such a lovely bride.We're here to give her our blessing, right? If you don't mind, I will answer some of your questions."
###Chapter 709 Interview Eli
The crowd turned around and saw Eli, the new rising star, standing in front of them. 
Eli waved at Eliana and pushed his way through the people. 
"Eliana, it's been a long time." 
"Why are you here, Eli?" 
Eliana asked, looking at him in shock. 
Eli replied coyly, "I had planned to come to have a look and try to keep my sad feelings to myself, but I didn't expect to see such drama." 
Eliana shook her head with exasperation, saying, "You must think this is all so ridiculous." 
"It's all right," 
Eli comforted her. 
Then he turned to the crowd and asked, "Have you made up your mind yet? It's a good opportunity.I promise you that I will tell you everything I know today." 
The journalists who were there looked at each other and quickly weighed up their choices. 
They hadn't expected a big star who didn’t normally appear so relaxed in public, to be there today. 
They suddenly abandoned their idea of questioning Eliana. 
They turned around and, aiming their cameras at Eli, asked, "Eli, are all the rumors about Lora and you true?" 
"Did you really fall in love with each other after you cooperated with her?"
"Eli..." 
As the journalists had turned to question Eli, they had naturally made way for Eliana to pass through. 
"Eliana, you go first.I'll take care of everything here." 
Standing in front of the journalists, Eli waved his hand to let Eliana leave. 
"Thank you." 
Eliana was so touched by his kind gesture.She glanced tenderly at him, then took the children's hands and left the venue as quickly as she could. 
Eliana was grateful when they finally reached their room.She immediately took off the awkward wedding dress and put on more comfortable clothes instead. 
Aileen looked at the wedding dress, hanging up.She felt incredibly sad. 
"Shame, Mommy! You were dressed so beautifully today.You haven't even had photos taken yet..." 
Eliana came to comfort her, "It doesn't matter, baby.I had photos taken beforehand, just like we did with you last time." 
This made Aileen feel better, but then she pouted and said angrily, "It's all that bad guy's fault! If it weren't for him, Mommy and Daddy would have had a perfect wedding!" 
Eliana was concerned about Maurice who had remained at the wedding venue.She didn't know how he was doing now. 
Finally, she couldn't stand it any longer.
She gathered the three children together and said sternly, "Babies, you stay here.I'm going out to see what's going on.Please be good for me and don't run around, all right?" 
Aileen and Adrian immediately wanted to go with her. 
"Mommy, Adrian and I also want to see our great-grandpa.He likes us and thus will be compassionate when he sees us." 
"Yes, Mommy, please let us go with you." 
Eliana had to be firm with the children and replied, "No, babies." 
The truth was that at the wedding just now, she sensed that something was not right with Earle. 
Earle felt very strongly about the family being united and at peace with each other. 
In the past, no matter how angry he was, he wouldn't let Gerald hurt Maurice. 
But today, he had been on Gerald's side, watching him crush Maurice.It was peculiar. 
Besides, she didn't know what was going on out there, so she couldn't let the kids accompany her. 
What if they got hurt? "You just stay here and wait for me to return." 
The three children lowered their heads, feeling disappointed. 
Eliana could not help but soften her tone while saying, "Babies, don't worry.I'll take you with me once I know what's going on, okay?" 
"Okay, Mommy...But you must be careful," the twins said as they reluctantly agreed to her decision. 
Meanwhile, they heard a knock at the door.
Instantly alert, Eliana asked, "Who is it?" 
"Don't worry.It’s me, Nicole," replied the familiar voice from outside. 
Eliana was so relieved to hear who it was, and opened the door. 
Nicole had just arrived back from the wedding venue. 
As soon as she entered the room, Eliana pulled her aside and asked anxiously, "How is it going outside?" 
"Don't worry.Nothing serious has happened yet," 
Nicole comforted her. 
"Wyatt is still dealing with guests outside.Have a rest while he is busy doing that." 
Eliana still felt worried. 
"Nicole, please look after the children for me.I must go out and have a look for myself." 
Leaving the three children in Nicole's care, Eliana left to see Maurice. 
As she walked out of the room, her cell phone rang.
###Chapter 710 Meet Me Alone
Harriet’s name repeatedly displayed on the phone screen. 
Gripping her cell phone firmly, Eliana glared.She wondered what could be the reason for Harriet's call at that time. 
The phone kept ringing and was on the verge of disconnecting. 
Eliana sighed and answered the call. 
"Harriet, why are you calling by this time?" 
A cackle came from Harriet's end. 
"Why are you being so angry? Isn't today your wedding day? Naturally, I am calling to extend my congratulations.Also, I was greatly amused by the charade at the ceremony." 
Did Harriet call to make mockery of her? Eliana sneered, "Have you got anything else to say? If not, I'll end the call." 
She moved her phone from her ear to hang up the call.In that instant, Harriet asked a question that caught her interest. 
"Eliana, didn't you notice that Earle looked and acted very weird today?" Eliana was startled. 
She instantly held her phone against her ear uneasily. 
"Harriet, what in the world are you talking about?" Harriet laughed hysterically. 
"The person who was at the wedding earlier is not Earle.He is an impostor!" 
Eliana was stunned.
Trying to make sense of what Harriet was saying, she asked, "Impostor? What are you talking about?" 
"Can you believe that Gerald asked someone else to act as Earle? While in fact, Earle is still in the hospital in a coma." 
This shocking revelation caught Eliana off-guard. 
Gerald! It was indeed his doing.He hid Earle and got an impostor to destroy her wedding with Maurice. 
Reality dawned on Eliana. 
"Hold on!" she snapped, "How did you know all these?" 
"I know a lot of things," Harriet responded with pride. 
"Earle is very sick and Gerald used a doctor I know." 
Holding on to her phone tightly, Eliana asked nervously, "Then you know where Earle is currently, right?" 
"Great question!" 
Harriet eventually got an avenue to bring up her true intention. 
"Meet me alone now and I'll tell you where Earle is.Else, I promise that Maurice will never set his eyes on Earle again until he dies!" 
Harriet wanted to see her? Eliana became cautious upon her request.She understood that Harriet must have ulterior motives.It would be risky to meet her alone. 
"No, I won't meet you."
Eliana turned her down immediately. 
"You're a hypocrite!" Harriet said sarcastically. 
"Oh, did I tell you that Nancy is also under Gerald's control? You are aware that her health is deteriorating.She cries every day because of Earle lately.Her vision is getting worse.Weren't you her puppet? Because your dream of marrying into the Moran family has come true, she is now nothing in your eyes?" Harriet sounded so harsh.Her words tore through Eliana's heart and made her feel guilty. 
It was true that Nancy had been very nice to her. 
How could she sit by when Nancy needs help? Eliana was unsettled.She paced to and fro and even to the front of Maurice's room subconsciously. 
"Stop!" 
Harriet screamed suddenly. 
"If you dare inform Maurice about this, Earle and Nancy will die!" 
Eliana was startled.She immediately stopped dead in her tracks. 
"How can you tell where I am?" Cold shivers ran down her spine. 
"You are watching me!" 
"You're not so dumb." 
Harriet grunted.
"Have you decided what to do? If you walk down the corridor, you would see me at the end.You have just a minute.If I don’t see you after then, you won't be able to get me to say anything!" 
Eliana stared at the door of Maurice's room, but couldn't take a step further. 
Nancy's lovely face flashed across her mind.She thought twice about meeting Harriet. 
"Okay, I assure you that I'm coming," Eliana said, swallowing hard on her spit. 
She glanced at the closed door once more then looked away and walked in the other direction. 
Every step she took sent her farther away from Maurice's room. 
The end of the corridor was so dark and had an ominous air. 
Immediately Eliana walked into the darkness, she blinked uncomfortably and saw a face that indeed looked like Harriet. 
"I'm here.You..." 
She was about to say something to Harriet when a person ran out of nowhere and covered her mouth and nose with a handkerchief. 
She breathed in the toxic fragrance on the handkerchief, and passed out instantly.
###Chapter 711 An Ominous Premonition
While Eliana was being drugged and taken away, Maurice raised his head thoughtfully in the room.He thought he heard Eliana’s voice a moment ago. 
Maurice looked up at the door, but he was sure he hadn't heard a knock. 
Did he hear something that never happened? Maurice started to feel a little uneasy. 
A lawyer was sitting next to him, holding the contract that Earle had thrown to Maurice. 
As he read it through, the lawyer's face became gloomier and gloomier.He closed the contract and whispered to Maurice, "Mr.Moran, the terms in this document are very disadvantageous to you.You can't sign it..." 
Opposite them, Gerald was patiently taking care of Earle, looking like a dutiful son. 
Seeing that Maurice hadn't decided for a long time, he looked at his nephew and urged him impatiently, "Maurice, have you finished reading it? Sign it quickly.I have to take your grandpa to the hospital for an examination." 
Maurice glanced at him and said abruptly, "I have a doctor here.He can exam Grandpa's body." 
A trace of nervousness flashed through Gerald's eyes. 
He dismissed the offer and said, "No, thanks.I'm his rightful guardian.I'll take care of him.Besides, I will officially take over the Moran Group tomorrow.Get out of here as soon as you sign that a document." 
As Gerald spoke, he looked as if he was going to push Earle away. 
Maurice looked at Earle, who had remained silent all this time and hadn't looked up or shown his face at all.He motioned to his men behind him.
They immediately understood and intervened to stop Gerald and Earle. 
Realizing that his planned escape route was blocked, Gerald began to panic. 
Damn it! He had been buying time for Harriet. 
Why hadn't she taken any action yet? As Maurice's men were about to take Earle away forcefully, Maurice's phone suddenly rang. 
It was Nicole. 
Maurice frowned, feeling extremely troubled.He answered the phone and heard Nicole's anxious voice at the other end. 
"Something is wrong, Maurice.Eliana has gone!" 
Shocked, Maurice replied, "What did you say?" 
In a panic, Nicole explained, "Eliana insisted on going out to look for you just now, but it has been so long, and she hasn't returned!" 
Something must have happened to her! Maurice stood up instantly, horrified and angry. 
Suddenly, something occurred to him.He turned to look at Gerald with face like thunder. 
"Did you do this?" 
Gerald was relieved as Maurice asked him the question. 
Judging from the expression on Maurice's face, he knew that Harriet had probably made it.He smiled nonchalantly and shrugged his shoulders.
"What's wrong, Maurice? It seems that your wife is playing hide and seek with you again.Take all the time you need to search for her, but 1 won't come with you." 
With Earle by his side, no one dared stop him. 
As Eliana had disappeared, Maurice wasn't in the mood to deal with Gerald at all. 
Maurice rushed back straight away and hurried to the monitoring room of the castle to check the surveillance video at his door. 
He had a nagging feeling that he hadn't misheard Eliana's voice a bit earlier. 
Unfortunately, the surveillance camera was blocked by colorful balloons floating in the air just at that moment. 
The wedding venue was decorated with several balloons, and some of them blocked the surveillance camera for a while. 
No one paid any attention to it, which enabled someone to use them to their advantage. 
"Find the surveillance video at the gate now.Hurry up!" 
Maurice quickly changed his plan without panicking. 
Soon, the staff retrieved the surveillance video of the castle gate and pulled it up on the screen. 
There was no sign of Eliana in the surveillance video from the time of her return until the time they checked the video. 
This was good news as it meant that even if she had been caught, her captor hadn't had enough time to take her out of the castle.
Eliana must still be somewhere in the castle! Maurice silently breathed a sigh of relief, turned his head and barked orders at his men, "Blockade all the exits to the venue right away, search one room after another! Do whatever it takes to find her!" 
After organizing everything, Maurice rushed to the children's room. 
The three children were waiting anxiously for any news of Eliana. 
It was a mess outside, and Eliana had been gone for a long time and still wasn't back. 
The children didn’t know what had happened and were extremely upset. 
Seeing Maurice enter the room, the three children immediately surrounded him. 
"Daddy, where is Mommy?" Aileen asked. 
"Daddy, Mommy went to find you.Didn't you see her?" Adrian asked. 
"Uncle, why hasn't my aunt returned yet?" 
Maurice hurriedly squatted down and held the three children firmly in his arms. 
"It's all right.She will be back soon.Don't be afraid..." 
Little by little, Maurice's deep, soothing voice comforted the children. 
Only Maurice knew how unsettled he really was inside. 
In the past, Eliana had gone missing but always came back.But today he had a very bad feeling. 
This time seemed different to before...
###Chapter 712 I Want You To Die In Front Of Him
The cold wind blew over the rooftop. 
A large mass of white clouds covered the bright sun, casting an ominous shadow on the ladies below. 
Eliana's hands and feet were bound together, and she sat uncomfortably on the ground. 
Next to her, Harriet was enjoying watching the video feed on her phone. 
In the video, the room where the three children were staying, could be seen. 
"Tut-tut, your children really love you! They're worried about you, and your dear husband, Maurice, is probably searching for you everywhere by now." 
Sneering, Harriet showed the video on her phone to Eliana. 
Eliana didn't expect that Harriet had even installed surveillance cameras in the children's room! Looking at the panic-stricken faces of the three children in the video, Eliana was so distraught that she burst into tears. 
And as she watched the video, she saw Maurice comfort the children and then stand up to leave. 
"Harriet, you'd better let me go right now," said Eliana, trying to calm herself down. 
"The castle has been cordoned off, and you can't escape.Maurice will find me here sooner or later.By that time, it won't end well for you." 
"Don't worry, Eliana!" 
Harriet gave Eliana an evil stare and said confidently, "You'd better look at them now.I'm afraid you will never see them again in your whole life..."
Eliana’s heart skipped a beat. 
Losing her cool, she suddenly raised her head and asked, "Harriet, what the hell do you want?" 
Harriet's face changed into a distorted smile. 
"The show has just begun.As Maurice and the children leave the castle, they might just see you fall right in front of them! Ah, what a beautiful scene that will be!"Instantly, her words sent a child down Eliana's spine.This crazy bitch really wanted to kill her! "Harriet, you really are crazy! This is murder!" 
"I'm crazy?" 
Harriet looked as vicious as a wild animal and shouted loudly, "If I'm crazy, it's all because of you! You have taken away everything I have ever wanted.You took away the wedding, which should have been mine! If you die, all these things will still be mine!" 
Looking pale now, Eliana swallowed hard, her mind working furiously. 
Obviously, Harriet was insane now and was not going to listen to her at all.She had to find a way to save herself! As quietly as she could, Eliana slowly moved her hands tied behind her back to the pocket of her trousers. 
Fortunately, she had just changed her clothes before she left the room and her phone was still in her trouser pocket! Harriet was still absorbed in her own world and didn't notice Eliana's slight movement. 
The opportunity was momentary. 
Since her hands were tied, Eliana couldn't control her finger movements freely.She could only dial a random number by feeling, and she had to do this quickly. 
Feeling the phone's vibration behind her, Eliana breathed a silent sigh of relief.
Although she didn't know who she had called, at least she had managed to get through to someone. 
Now, as long as the person on the other side knew her specific location, she would definitely be saved! Casting her gaze calmly upon Harriet, Eliana shouted loudly and deliberately, "Harriet, have you ever thought that if I fall from the rooftop of the castle and die in front of Maurice, he will never forget me, and you will never have a chance with him again?" 
Harriet was shocked by Eliana's outburst. 
Recovering quickly, Harriet thought about her words. 
Eliana was right! If she died in front of Maurice on their wedding day, Maurice would definitely remember her for the rest of his life! A living person could never compete with a dead person! Noticing that Harriet was looking a little uncertain now, Eliana tried her best to hold back her fear and continued, "Think about it. 
If I die in a corner and no one knows, Maurice will grow impatient after searching for me for a few years, won't he?" 
Looking serious, Harriet began to think carefully. 
"What you said is certainly a good idea, but...Those two children are still a serious threat to me.As long as they are alive, Maurice will think of you when he sees them.It seems I have to kill them to erase the memory of your existence permanently." 
Hearing her words, Eliana suddenly lost her mind.She didn't expect Harriet would be so cruel that she wouldn't even let go of her children! Eliana stood up and shouted, "Harriet, are you the devil incarnate? They are just innocent children!" 
Eliana was so stirred by anger that she forgot that her phone was still in her pocket.
As soon as she stood up, her phone, which was still on, slipped out of her pocket and fell, clattering to the ground. 
The screen accidentally lay face up, exposing what Eliana was doing.
###Chapter 713 Saved
As she saw the phone lying on the ground, Harriet's face changed dramatically. 
Damn it! She had been deceived! Noticing that the phone was still on, she picked it up without hesitation and hurled it hard on the ground. 
With a loud bang, the phone smashed into pieces. 
"You bitch! How dare you phone for help!" 
Harriet bent down, grabbed Eliana’s hair, and bashed her head against the wall. 
As her head made contact with the wall, Eliana felt a sharp pain in her head. 
The severe pain almost made her faint. 
Blood began to pour down from her forehead into her eyes, blurring her vision. 
Eliana fell heavily to the ground, weak from the injury and slowly losing consciousness. 
"You bitch! Bitch! " Harriet was so angry that she stamped hard on Eliana’s hand. 
"Ah!" 
The pain from the back of her hand brought Eliana back to full consciousness instantly and her face twisted in anguish.Still feeling intense anger, Harriet stepped harder and harder on Eliana's hand. 
Momentarily, the blood gushed out from Eliana’s palm, and the sound of bones cracking could be heard clearly. 
Eliana's face was as white as a sheet as a result of the intense pain.Her face was a mess, covered with sweat and blood.
Eventually, Harriet broke her hand.

###Chapter 716 Dream

Her bones were broken.

###Chapter 717 Forgetting

###Chapter 719 His Decision Doesn't Count

###Chapter 720 Exposed
The presence of the bodyguards caused a tense atmosphere, and the j conference room was in an uproar.

Seeing those panic-stricken faces, Maurice comforted them, "This is just a family matter.You have nothing to do with this, so don't panic.The meeting is adjourned.You can go back to work now.But remember not to tell anyone what has happened here today.Do you understand?"

Then he replied, "Tell the public that my marriage has affected the image of our company, so today's meeting was called to deal with the matter.I don't want to hear any bad rumors about Moran Group."
"But Mr.Moran, if we say that, I'm afraid the public opinion will be very unfavorable to you." The director was a little confused. 
"It's okay.Just do as I say.At this stage, it's better for the public to focus on me.In that case, nothing will happen to Moran Group." 
Maurice still wore a calm expression. 
It seemed he was able to endure everything. 
Everyone was shocked when they heard his words. 
They didn't expect that he would sacrifice himself for the sake of the Moran Group. 
The director was even more moved.He nodded and said, "Yes, Mr.Moran.I understand.We'll handle this matter immediately." 
"Alright.The meeting is adjourned." 
Maurice announced that the meeting was dismissed. 
At this moment, everyone finally breathed a sigh of relief. 
So far, Maurice was still the head of Moran Group. 
This made the employees and shareholders feel at ease. 
Soon, everyone walked out of the conference room, leaving only the members of the Moran family. 
Gerald was furious because his plan to get control of Moran Group went down the drain due to Maurice.He almost got the position of CEO.He was only one step away from owning the entire Moran
Group! But why? Why did Maurice have to ruin everything? Gerald felt like he was about to lose his mind. 
He stared at the fake Earle fiercely and questioned angrily, "This is all your fault! Why did you suddenly change your mind? Don't you know how important this matter is to me? I've spent so much effort in this, but everything was in vain." 
The fake Earle was stunned by Gerald's yelling.He lowered his head, not daring to say a word. 
Gerald's anger towards the fake Earle was too obvious.It was as if he no longer feared or respected the old man who had dominated the business world for most of his life. 
Even the bodyguards looked at Gerald in shock. 
Gerald only realized what he had done when he finished venting his anger.He was stunned for a moment.His heart skipped a beat.He was so anxious to make amends that he said in a panic, "Dad, I'm sorry.I was too emotional just now, and I couldn't control my emotions.I..." 
"Enough, Gerald! Haven't you acted enough?" 
Maurice interrupted before Gerald could finish apologizing. 
"Do you know what I said to him just now that made him change his mind?" 
A strong sense of uneasiness rose in Gerald's heart. 
"what did you tell him?" 
Maurice was too calm, so Gerald knew something must be wrong. 
Besides, from the moment Maurice entered the conference room, he had been confident.
Why was he so confident? "Well, I told him...I already know he is not my real grandpa.If he still wants to continue this farce, I will make him die miserably." 
Maurice's low and deep voice was so cold that it could make people shiver. 
Gerald froze.His mind went blank for a moment.It turned out that Maurice already knew everything.He trembled in fear and asked, "Since when did you know?" 
"The day of the wedding," Maurice replied calmly. 
"That's impossible! How can you know so soon?" Gerald's eyes widened in disbelief. 
What could have gone wrong? As far as he could remember, his acting was flawless. 
Maurice couldn't have seen through him. 
Maurice stared at the hysterical Gerald with contempt and pity in his eyes. 
It was as if he was looking at an amusing clown. 
"Gerald, you really don't know Grandpa at all.Even if he doesn't approve of Eliana, he won't make a fuss during my wedding.He won't disregard the reputation of the Moran family.And he won't let you hurt me unscrupulously because no one knows how to cherish a family better than him!"
###Chapter 721 Watch The Fight
There was dead silence in the conference room. 
Needless to say, the result was a foregone conclusion.Gerald's face darkened.But he suddenly burst into laughter. 
"Ha-ha! Maurice, even if you know it, so what? I have locked Dad up, and Mom is also in my hands." 
Maurice was not too surprised.He looked calm, but he said in a cold tone, "Gerald, you are a bastard."Gerald didn't seem to hear Maurice's ridicule. 
He continued, "You are indeed a family.Mom said the same words to me.You know what? When I told Mom my plan, she didn't show any signs of fear at all.Instead, she told me calmly that I would definitely fail.And when I asked her why, she said because you would stop me.Isn't it funny? Even if all the chips are in my hands, she still thinks you will win." 
Gerald's voice trailed off, then he fell into deep thought. 
What was in his mind after he heard Nancy say those things? Of course, he didn't believe it. 
Who did Maurice think he was? He was the one who had the upper hand. 
How could he lose? So he only laughed at Nancy. 
"Stop your wishful thinking.The Moran Group will soon be mine.And your dear grandson will be doomed." 
He could still remember his rhetoric before.But now that things had come to this point, even if he was not reconciled, so what? He still lost. 
Maurice's brows furrowed tightly.
Actually, he didn't want to waste his time on Gerald.So he said, "Gerald, I don’t have time to chat with you.So hurry up and hand over my grandparents.As for you, I will send you abroad according to Grandpa's original plan.But I'm not Grandpa, so I won't be softhearted to you.You will live abroad, and you can never come back for the rest of your life." 
Maurice loved his grandparents, and he couldn't bear to break their hearts.But he couldn't let Gerald go just like that. 
Gerald had to pay for what he had done. 
When Gerald heard Maurice's words, he sneered, "Maurice, I'm not that stupid.Dad is my last bargaining chip.Why should I give him to you easily?" 
While they were in a stalemate, Corbin hurriedly walked in, holding Sean with a drooping head. 
He pushed Sean in front of Maurice and said excitedly, "Mr.Moran, Sean has already told me everything he knows." 
Gerald was utterly shocked.He stood up angrily and shouted, "Sean, you're a traitor! How dare you betray me!" 
Gerald was so angry that he gave Sean a few kicks.Sean was not able to dodge in time, so he was hit hard.His leg was badly hurt. 
"Enough! I've really had enough of you!" 
At this moment, Sean broke out in an emotional outburst.He had been working for Gerald for quite a long time.But at this moment, he was driven into a corner.So he didn't care anymore if Gerald was his boss.He took this opportunity to vent all the resentment that had accumulated in his heart over the years.
"Gerald, ever since I worked for you, I never lived a good life anymore.If I changed jobs these years, I wouldn't end up like this." 
"Okay, fine! It turns out this is what you really feel.Have you long wanted to betray me? I will teach you a lesson today." 
Gerald trembled in anger, and his eyes turned red.He pounced on Sean and began to wrestle with him. 
"Come on! I have long been tired of you." 
Sean's bloodshot eyes didn't show any sign of fear at all.He gathered his strength and fought with Gerald, punching after punching to vent the anger he had suppressed over the years.He didn't show mercy anymore. 
Gerald didn’t expect that Sean, who had always been his obedient secretary, was so good at fighting. 
After a few rounds, he was no match for Sean at all. 
In the end, he was pinned down on the floor and beaten black and blue. 
Corbin was dumbfounded by the funny scene in front of him. 
Then he turned to Maurice and asked, "Mr.Moran, shall we stop them?" 
But Maurice just stood still, watching Gerald and Sean hitting each other. 
"Don't worry.They won't beat each other to death.When they are done, we'll take Gerald with us to find Grandpa."
###Chapter 722 The Accident
Inside the black Lincoln, Corbin sat in the driver's seat with Maurice in the passenger seat. 
Gerald and Sean sat in the back seat. 
The farce in the Moran Group building ended with Sean winning. 
By the time Sean felt he had vented his anger enough, Gerald was already beaten black and blue. 
In the end, Maurice took both of them to the car. 
Maurice looked back and asked coldly, "What's the address?" 
"Filialness Sanatorium," 
Sean immediately shouted. 
Corbin turned on the GPS and drove to the sanatorium. 
In the back seat, Gerald covered his bruised and swollen face, staring at Sean with red eyes.He got so worked up that he pointed at Sean's nose and cursed, "Sean, you traitor! I treated you well.If not for me, you are nothing.How dare you betray me! Do you still have any conscience?" 
But Sean didn't waver at all.He retorted without hesitation, "Bah! What a pack of lies! Save your breath, Gerald." 
As a result, Sean and Gerald fought fiercely again. 
Maurice didn't mind them.He was so worried about Earle that he didn't even want to talk to them. 
When Corbin heard Gerald's words, he also couldn't help satirizing, "Gerald, don't argue anymore.If you really treated Sean well, how could he betray you at this critical moment?"
Actually, his life trajectory was similar to Sean's.It was just that their lives were totally different. 
Corbin couldn't help recalling the days when he worked as Maurice's assistant these years. 
Although Maurice was a sharp-tongued man, he felt Maurice's kindness to him. 
So it was not surprising that he was loyal to Maurice. 
Even if Gerald was the one who won today, he would never betray Maurice. 
With this thought, Corbin couldn't help but secretly glanced at Maurice beside him. 
Maurice was leaning against the back of the seat with his eyes closed.His face was a little pale, and there were obvious dark circles under his eyes. 
Stubble had already grown on his chin too. 
It was hard to imagine that he was an energetic and high-spirited man before. 
Ever since Eliana had an accident at the wedding, Maurice had been looking for her.He hadn't slept for several days now. 
Aside from that, he had to find a way to deal with Gerald too.So he was exhausted and in a very bad state. 
Now that Gerald was in his hands, he must be able to find Earle and Nancy soon.So Maurice could finally relax even a little. 
Corbin secretly prayed for Maurice in his heart. 
He really hoped that all these bad things would end as soon as possible and Maurice could find Eliana.
Otherwise, Maurice would not be able to hold on. 
At this time, the traffic light turned red, so the car stopped at an intersection. 
There was pin-drop silence in the car. 
Looking at the familiar scenery outside the window, Gerald broke out in a cold sweat and became more and more flustered. 
They were getting closer and closer to the sanatorium where he hid Earle. 
If Maurice found Earle, he would be doomed. 
Gerald turned his head and looked at Maurice. 
It was only then that he found Maurice leaning against the seat with his eyes closed. 
He seemed to be sleeping. 
No! He couldn't admit defeat just like that. 
At the thought that Maurice was asleep, why didn't he try to fight back? A hint of cruelty flashed through Gerald's eyes as he made the decision in an instant. 
Then the red light turned green. 
The moment Corbin started the car, Gerald suddenly pounced at him crazily. 
Corbin's attention was all on the road, so he didn't notice what Gerald was doing. 
Gerald grabbed his neck and tightly strangled it. 
"Gerald...What are you doing? Are you crazy?"
Corbin struggled hard, coughing and cursing. 
Since he was strangled by Gerald, he couldn't hold the steering wheel anymore, and the car went out of control. 
Maurice was suddenly awakened. 
When he opened his eyes and saw this scene, he immediately turned to help Corbin. 
But it seemed that Gerald had already lost his mind. 
He held on to Corbin tightly and refused to let go. 
While they were entangled, the car rushed forward. 
And since it was out of control, it crashed into the car in front of them. 
Immediately afterwards, the car ran off the road. 
And with a loud bang, it finally hit a tree on the roadside. 
The cars around them were all affected. 
They were in a mess, crashing into each other one after another. 
The car window instantly shattered, and a huge impact hit the people in the car. 
After the collision, Corbin, in the driver's seat, was the most severely injured. 
His head lay on the steering wheel, and his face was covered with blood. 
Maurice was also injured, and he immediately fainted.
Among them, only Gerald stayed awake. 
He struggled to open the door, wanting to escape. 
But the next moment, someone grabbed him by the hand. 
"Don't go away..." 
Corbin pulled Gerald back with all his remaining strength. 
"Let go of me," Gerald said fiercely, shaking off his hand. 
"I haven't lost yet.You just wait and see.I'll come back to get even with you." 
After saying this, Gerald got out of the car, and stumbled to the middle of the road.
###Chapter 723 His Family And Enemy
When Corbin saw Gerald running towards the road, he turned his head and called out to Maurice with difficulty. 
"Mr.Moran...Mr.Moran...Please wake up.Gerald is running away again." 
Corbin wanted to chase after Gerald.But his legs were stuck, so he couldn't move right now. 
At this critical moment, Maurice’s breathing became heavy, and his eyelids trembled. 
Then he coughed violently. 
Finally, he opened his eyes, regaining his consciousness. 
"Mr.Moran...Gerald has..." 
Corbin was gasping for breath, so he almost couldn't speak. 
Upon hearing this, Maurice tilted his head slightly and forced himself to look out the window. 
Indeed, he saw Gerald limping away. 
"Mr.Moran, hurry up..." Corbin urged. 
Maurice could see that Corbin's condition was not good, so he comforted him immediately, "Take care of yourself first.You are more important than Gerald.I'll go after him." 
Maurice raised his hand and was about to unfasten his seat belt.But before he could do so, a loud honk sounded outside.He subconsciously looked out of the window. 
Then he saw a large white truck speeding towards Gerald, who was standing in the middle of the road.It could be seen that Gerald was too shocked to move.
In the blink of an eye, Gerald's body was sent flying by the truck more than ten meters away. 
Then he fell heavily on the ground, rolled several circles in a row, and finally stopped. 
Everything happened so fast that there was no time to stop it. 
There was nothing Maurice could do but just watch the tragedy happen. 
At this moment, he looked at Gerald lying on the ground, not knowing whether Gerald was dead or alive.His mind went blank all of a sudden. 
Maurice only came back to his senses when he had severe tinnitus.He unfastened his seat belt, opened the door, and got out of the car. 
When his feet touched the ground, he felt so weak that he almost fell.He grabbed the door tightly and steadied himself. 
Maurice took a deep breath and staggered towards the direction where Gerald fell. 
And when he approached Gerald, he found Gerald lying in a pool of blood, and his body twisted unnaturally.Judging from Gerald's condition, Maurice knew he wouldn't survive. 
This idea popped up in his mind uncontrollably. 
"Ahhh! Someone is hurt! Call an ambulance!" 
The people around started screaming in fright, and the scene immediately became chaotic. 
Gerald, who was lying on the ground and obviously in severe pain, raised his eyes and looked at Maurice.His mouth moved as if he wanted to say something. 
Maurice subconsciously crouched down and approached him.
Gerald gathered all his remaining strength and grabbed Maurice's collar with his trembling hand.He opened his mouth again. 
But the next moment, a lot of blood gushed out of his mouth. 
"Ah...Ah..." 
Gerald couldn't even utter a word. 
Maurice realized that Gerald couldn't say anything anymore. 
Gerald could only stare at him with hatred.His gaze never left Maurice until he couldn't hold on any longer, and his eyes gradually closed. 
When the last gleam of light in his eyes was extinguished, his grip on Maurice loosened, and his hand fell heavily on the ground. 
Maurice was in a daze. 
Mixed emotions overwhelmed his heart at the moment.He hated Gerald to the core. 
Gerald killed his parents and sister and ruined his family.He was also the reason for the Pierce Group's bankruptcy and the miserable fate of the Pierce family and Eliana. 
Maurice wanted to kill Gerald, but he had to take his grandparents into consideration.He didn't want them to hold a funeral again for their son. 
So he could only endure the immense hatred in his heart. 
And exiling Gerald from the country forever was his last bottom line.
But Gerald did too many evil things, and finally it was God who punished him. 
Everything was finally coming to an end. 
At this moment, more and more people gathered around them. 
Maurice gave Gerald, his family and enemy, one last look. 
Then he turned around and slowly walked out of the crowd. 
Right now, Corbin had already gotten out of the car and staggered over. 
"Mr.Moran, how...How is Gerald?" Corbin asked anxiously, looking at the crowd not far away. 
Maurice's face was pale, and his eyes were blank.It was as if he hadn't heard Corbin's voice at all. 
"Mr.Moran..." 
Corbin sensed something was wrong, and he wanted to help Maurice.But the next moment, Maurice suddenly fell back to the ground and became unconscious. 
"Mr.Moran!" Corbin screamed in fear and rushed over to Maurice.
###Chapter 724 Meet In A Dream
When Maurice opened his eyes, there was nothing but darkness.He couldn't see anything.His mind was a mess. 
What happened? Where was he? What about Eliana? He was going to find her. 
This was the only thing left in his mind. 
At this moment, there was a light in the distance. 
Maurice's eyes lit up.He staggered to his feet and walked towards the direction where the light was coming from.He didn't know how long he had been walking. 
But this time, he saw bright lights in the sky. 
And under the sky full of lights, he saw Eliana in a wedding dress. 
"Eliana!" Maurice shouted at once. 
Eliana turned around and smiled at him. 
Then she slowly walked towards him, took his hand, and led him forward. 
"Eliana, I finally found you." 
He held her slender hand tightly and said excitedly, "Where have you been these days? Are you hurt? Grandpa doesn't have any ion to our relationship anymore.The truth has come out.It's all Gerald's fault." 
Maurice had said a lot, but Eliana didn't reply a word.She just quietly led him forward until they completely walked out of the darkness behind them.
Then she let go of his hand. 
Maurice was flustered. 
"Eliana..." 
He quickly grabbed her hand again and asked, "Eliana, what's wrong with you? Why are you letting go of my hand? Aren't we going back together? Do you know how much I miss you? Our children are waiting for you.They miss you so much too.Are you going to leave the three of us again?" 
Maurice was overwhelmingly emotional. 
Suddenly, a drop of hot tears fell on his hand, making him step back. 
Then Eliana disappeared. 
"Eliana, no!" 
Maurice screamed and opened his eyes. 
Lying in bed, he looked around.He found that he was surrounded by the white hospital walls. 
There was no darkness, no light, and most of all, no Eliana. 
Everything was just a dream.He turned his head to the side and saw that Corbin had already fallen asleep on the bedside. 
Corbin's head was pressed on his hand, which had an infusion, making his entire arm numb. 
Sure enough, Corbin was still so unreliable. 
Looking at Corbin, Maurice was amused and helpless at the same time.
Then he thought of his dream just now, and he couldn't help feeling sorry. 
If his arm didn't feel numb because of Corbin, he might have spent more time with Eliana, even if they could only meet in a dream. 
In the past few days that they were apart, she never appeared in his dream. 
And when he finally saw her in his dream, he was awakened before he could even take a good look at her. 
Maurice was still lost in thought when Corbin woke up in a daze. 
Seeing that Maurice was looking at him, he exclaimed, "Mr.Moran, you're finally awake! This is great! Let me call the doctor." 
Then he rushed to the door and shouted, "Doctor!" 
But Maurice stopped him. 
"Hey, calm down.Tell me, what's wrong with me?" 
"Mr.Moran, you suddenly passed out.You've scared me to death.Fortunately, I was not seriously injured in the car accident, so I was able to find a hospital nearby." 
Corbin still couldn't help feeling terrified when he recalled the car accident. 
There was a moment of silence.Then Maurice asked, "How long have I been unconscious?" 
Corbin scratched his head and said, "Actually, the doctor said you didn't really faint.It was just that you were too tired, so you fell asleep.But you slept the entire day.It really scared me."
Barely had Corbin finished his words when the doctor came in.He walked to the bedside and checked Maurice carefully. 
Finally, he came to a conclusion. 
"Mr.Moran, you are fine now.You can be discharged and just rest at home for a few days." 
"Did I sleep the entire day?" 
After the doctor had left, Maurice frowned and asked. 
"What about Grandpa? Have you taken him and Grandma back?" 
"You have nothing to worry about now, Mr.Moran.I dealt with everything when you were asleep.Your grandparents are now safe and sound," Corbin replied. 
It was only then that Maurice breathed a sigh of relief. 
Then he asked, "How is Grandpa?" 
"He is fine.But..." 
Corbin paused for a moment before he continued, "He doesn't know yet about what happened to Gerald."
###Chapter 725 He Has Changed A Lot
Although Maurice had seen it with his own eyes, he was still stunned when he heard Corbin say Gerald was dead. 
The scene when Gerald was hit by the truck and fell to the ground a few meters away flashed in his mind. 
And when he recalled Gerald's image lying in a pool of blood, his heart skipped a beat. 
This time, it was not a dream. 
Gerald was really dead. 
Maurice's heart was filled with mixed emotions, but he could only sigh.He looked at the back of his hand, pulled out the infusion needle, and lifted the quilt.He wanted to get out of bed.But Corbin hurriedly stopped him. 
"Mr.Moran, you still need to rest for now." Maurice shook his head. 
"The doctor said I'm fine, and I can go home.Grandpa and Grandma are waiting for me.We have to go." 
"No!" Corbin retorted loudly. 
"You just had a car accident.Even if the doctor said you are fine, you still need a good rest." 
"No need." Maurice insisted. 
"Mr.Moran, your grandparents have already lost two sons.If they see their only grandson look like this, their hearts will definitely be broken.Do you have the heart to hurt them again?" 
Maurice felt Corbin made sense, so he was finally persuaded.He didn’t insist anymore.
Instead, he lay back on the bed. 
Then he asked, "What about you? Are you okay?" 
He looked at Corbin's bandaged forehead worriedly. 
When the car accident happened, Corbin seemed to be seriously injured. 
"Oh, this?" 
Corbin touched the gauze on his forehead and smiled. 
"Don't worry.I'm okay.It's no big deal." 
As soon as he said this, Nana suddenly rushed into the ward, crying.She hugged Corbin tightly and said bitterly, "Corbin, you scared me to death! I thought you were dead." 
As she cried, she hammered his chest with her small fist. 
"Hey, don't cry now.I'm fine." 
Corbin held Nana in his arms and comforted her.Her tearful eyes were already red and swollen from crying. 
Nana cried even more hysterically and complained loudly, "I called you, but you didn't answer.If I hadn't seen the news, I wouldn't have known you got into a car accident.I've already lost Eliana.I can't lose you anymore." 
Corbin was flustered upon hearing Nana's last two sentences.His heart skipped a beat.He hurriedly glanced at Maurice and covered Nana's mouth with his hand. 
"Okay, it's all my fault.Beat me or scold me if you want.Just don't say anything more."
It was only then that Nana came to her senses. 
When she realized what she had just said, her face turned pale.She subconsciously looked at Maurice on the bed with an extremely embarrassed expression. 
Everyone knew that Eliana's disappearance made Maurice distressed. 
Recently, no one dared to mention this matter. 
For a moment, there was dead silence in the ward. 
Corbin looked at Maurice apprehensively, fearing that he was sad and angry.He was also worried that Maurice would vent his anger on Nana. 
But much to Corbin's surprise, Maurice didn't do anything drastic. 
Instead, Maurice comforted Nana. 
"Don't worry, I'm not angry," Maurice said, shaking his head. 
"Take Corbin out and ask the doctor to check on him.Don't let any sequela happen." 
Nana and Corbin obediently walked out of the ward, but they were still in a daze. 
Nana couldn't help sighing, "The power of love is really great.Compared to before, Maurice has really changed a lot.Even his attitude toward me has changed.After Eliana disappeared, he looked for her.He took the children to work every day and took care of everything.Why didn't I realize before that Maurice was also a good man?" 
Corbin agreed with Nana, "Indeed, Mr.Moran has changed a lot.And it’s all because of Eliana.But she is missing now."
When he said this, the two of them could only sigh at the same time.They had the same question in their hearts: Where was Eliana?
###Chapter 726 So Close Yet So Far
In the middle of the night, Maurice lay on the hospital bed, tossing and turning. 
The same questions lingered in his mind. 
Where was Eliana now? Who took her away? Was she alright? Did she also miss him and the children? Every time Maurice closed his eyes, Eliana's images flashed through his mind one after another.He couldn't fall asleep at all. 
Finally, he gave up forcing himself to sleep.He stood up, took out a cigarette from the cigarette box, and walked to the balcony.He looked up and saw that the moon tonight was beautiful. 
Maurice put the cigarette in his mouth, lit it, and took a deep drag.He looked up at the pale moonlight again, feeling sad and lonely. 
What he didn't know was that on the balcony above him, there was a person who also felt the same. 
"Alas!" 
Eliana sighed.She leaned against the railing and looked down at her phone.She was watching the video of the twins playing on the beach. 
As she looked at her children's cute faces in the video, her eyes moistened a little. 
Since Eliana woke up in the hospital, she was left alone.She and her children had never been separated for so long, and she really missed them so much. 
Fortunately, Branson promised her that after she was discharged from the hospital, she could see the children. 
But when she thought of what the doctor had told her, she couldn't help frowning.
Yesterday, the doctor told her that because of the strong impact she had when she hit her head, she lost some of her memories.She couldn't remember things happened after she was back home. 
Eliana could only vaguely recall that she came back to find out the truth about the bankruptcy of the Pierce family. 
As for what happened next, she couldn't remember anymore. 
Branson only told her that the White family found her and the children not long after she came back. 
He also said that after the investigation, the truth about the bankruptcy of the Pierce family was revealed. 
And Gerald of the Moran Group was the culprit. 
Gerald wanted to take away Eliana's mother, so he played some dirty tricks to take down the Pierce Group, which eventually led to the destruction of the Pierce family. 
Now, everything was settled. 
Eliana could tell that Branson was not lying. 
But was the truth really as what he said? If this was the case, shouldn't she be happy that the enemy was found? Why did she still feel empty? It was as if she still needed to find someone. 
But whenever she tried to recall, her mind went blank. 
Who was on her missing memory? While Eliana was in a daze, she loosened her left hand which was holding the phone by accident. 
As a result, her phone fell downstairs.
At this moment, Maurice stubbed out his cigarette. 
Then he heard a loud bang and a white fell in front of him. 
He was confused, not knowing what had almost hit him. 
‘Is It..a phone?" 
Right then, familiar voices suddenly came from the phone. 
"Mommy, come here!" 
"Mommy, hurry up! The fish is running away!" 
Was he hallucinating? Why did the voices sound like Aileen and Adrian? Maurice froze in an instant.He stared at the white phone in disbelief and subconsciously picked it up. 
But unfortunately, as soon as he picked up the phone, it locked. 
The screen instantly darkened, and the children’s voices disappeared. 
Maurice's face turned gloomy.He stared at the phone, feeling uneasy. 
Whose phone was this? Why did he hear Aileen's and Adrian's voices from there? Upstairs, Eliana looked at her empty hand, utterly shocked. 
What if her phone hit someone? Did she hurt someone? Eliana quickly lowered her head and looked downstairs. 
But her sight was blocked by the plants on the balcony, so she couldn't see anything at all.
But there was a little light in the ward downstairs, so there should be someone there.She decided to go downstairs and have a look. 
If her phone really hit someone, she must apologize. 
Eliana hurried downstairs, came to the door of the ward, and knocked gently.
###Chapter 727 My Family Member Is An Old Woman
"Eliana? What are you doing here?" 
Someone suddenly appeared behind Eliana. 
Eliana was so startled that she shivered. 
But when she turned around and saw it was Branson, she patted her chest and breathed a sigh of relief.She said truthfully, "I accidentally dropped my phone on the balcony of someone's ward.I came down to apologize to the patient in this ward." 
Branson walked up to her and said, "Let me help you." 
But Eliana shook her head at once. 
"It's okay.It's just a small thing.I can handle it." 
Branson smiled. 
"The wards on this floor are for VIP patients.Except for you, the rest of the patients here are elderly.If you meet an old man with a bad temper, you can't handle it well.Why don't you let me help you? You go back upstairs first." 
Eliana pursed her lips and looked at the closed door of the ward. 
If the patient here was really an old man with a strange temper, she couldn't handle it. 
At the thought of this, she didn't refuse Branson's kindness anymore. 
"Thank you, Branson.Please apologize to the patient on my behalf." 
After Branson nodded, Eliana then turned around and went back upstairs.
The moment the elevator doors closed, the door of the ward opened. 
Then Maurice stood at the door and looked at the strange young man in front of him indifferently. 
"who are you?" he asked with a frown. 
When Branson saw Maurice, his heart jolted, and he almost couldn't control the expression on his face.He didn't expect that Maurice was the patient in this ward. 
Of course, he knew Maurice.But Maurice didn't know him. 
When Branson didn't say anything, Maurice got impatient and was about to close the door. 
"Wait..." Branson said. 
Then he added politely, "I'm sorry, my family member is a patient in the VIP ward upstairs.She accidentally dropped her phone on the balcony just now.I wonder if you happen to see it."

"There are none.Why?"Branson replied with a frown.

Branson said it was for her and the children's good. 
But the truth was, he had been restricting her freedom.He even hired a private nurse to watch over her every day. 
There must be something fishy here.
###Chapter 728 Change Clothes

Next move could make or break her escape.

That woman must be Eliana.She was tricked.
The private nurse was suddenly enlightened.She rushed out of the restroom and tried to chase after Eliana.
###Chapter 729 I Think I Have Seen Mommy

###Chapter 731 He Is A Father And A Husband
