###Chapter 735 Let Go Of Hatred
Earle's eyes fluttered open a few moments later.His eyes were filled with sadness and helplessness.He even looked older than his age. 
However, Earle was not as furious as Maurice had anticipated.He glanced at Maurice with bloodshot eyes and said in a soft voice, "Maurice, I know about everything.There's no need to be sad.None of this is your fault." 
Shocked by his words, Maurice lowered his head in despair and said in a hoarse voice, "I'm very sorry." 
As soon as Nancy heard Maurice's words, she squeezed the photo of Gerald in her hands and burst into tears. 
Even though Earle didn't cry, it was obvious that he was very sad due to the sorrowful expression on his face.He sighed heavily and rose to his feet. 
Then he stared at Maurice for a while in silence, before walking up to him and patting him gently on the shoulder. 
"Everything that happened is your uncle's fault.You don't have to take the blame or be sorry about it." 
Then Earle paused momentarily and asked, "Before he died...Did he say anything?" 
Maurice remained silent.He couldn't stop thinking about the resentful expression on Gerald's face as life slipped away from him.He knew that Gerald would probably not regret anything at all. 
But as he stared at the eager expressions in Earle and Nancy's eyes, he couldn't bring himself to tell them the truth. 
Finally, Maurice sighed and decided to lie.He glanced at them and said, "Yes, he said that he regretted doing those things.He loved you and grandma very much.He hoped that you could forgive him and live
a good life in the future." 
Then he quickly added, "Uncle died very quickly.He didn't feel the pain." 
"Really? He said all that?" 
Earle felt a sense of relief after he finished listening to Maurice. 
Then he waved his hand dismissively. 
"Maurice, I suggest that you take your grandmother out for now.I want to be alone for a while." 
Knowing that Earle wasn't feeling very well, Maurice felt he couldn't leave him alone, so he immediately said, "No, I can't leave you here all by yourself" 
However, Earle shook his head and said in a determined voice, "Well, I need some privacy.You can go downstairs and wait there." 
"Maurice, I think we should leave him alone." 
Nancy suddenly spoke.She wiped her tears and placed the photo on the table. 
Then she walked to Maurice. 
"Let's go.Give him some privacy." 
Nancy understood Earle very well, since they had been married for a very long time.She knew him better than anyone else. 
Seeing that he had no choice, Maurice stared hard at Earle for a while, before turning around and leaving the room with Nancy.
As they both descended the stairs, Nancy suddenly stopped. 
"Is there any problem, grandma?" Maurice asked with confused expression visible on his face. 
Nancy slowly slipped her fingers into Maurice's hand and held him tightly. 
"Maurice, I know you have had a very hard time all these years...I know what happened to your father had nothing to do with the White family.It was probably the handiwork of your uncle.I have hated him for so many years, but your father was dead, and he is my only son left.I have been trying to hide from the truth, because I dare not confront it.I'm really sorry for making you and Eliana suffer so much..." 
Nancy sobbed uncontrollably. 
"Grandma, none of that matters now," 
Maurice said as he gently patted Nancy's hand. 
"It's all over now.You have to let go of it now that he has passed on." 
Even though he said those words to comfort Nancy, Maurice didn't really mean them. 
Deep down in his heart, he knew he could never forgive Gerald.But now he had other things to concentrate on. 
The dead was gone forever. 
If he didn't let go of the hatred, it would only make everyone unhappy. 
Maurice also reasoned that his dead parents would want to see him happy instead of holding on to his hatred for what his uncle had done.
Nancy was relieved that the problem that had caused her so many sleepless nights for years had finally been solved. 
Suddenly, she turned to Maurice and asked anxiously, "Maurice, where is Eliana at the moment? Have you found her yet?" 
A smile appeared on Maurice's face. 
"Don't worry yourself about that, grandma.I have found her." 
Stunned by his answer, Nancy exclaimed excitedly. 
"This is good news, I'm glad that you have found her! Henceforth, Earle and I won't be poking our noses into your business anymore.Just stay with Eliana and take care of her, okay?" 
Maurice nodded his head firmly. 
"Don’t worry.I will never let her out of my sight again."
###Chapter 736 Let's Get Out Of Here
Maurice and Nancy were in the middle of a conversation when suddenly, something happened downstairs. 
Eliana was standing in front of the name board when she unexpectedly heard a voice from behind. 
"Eliana, what are you doing here?" 
Eliana turned back and saw Branson walking briskly towards her. 
Damn it! Why did he have to show up now? She knew she couldn't escape, so she put on a brave face to handle the situation. 
"You shouldn't be here.Come back with me!" 
Branson said urgently as he hurried towards her and grabbed her arm.He wanted to make Eliana leave. 
Eliana got pissed off and released herself from Branson's grip. 
"Why can't I be here? Is it because of Maurice?" 
Branson frowned and asked, "You know him?" 
"Yes! I know everything, Branson.Why didn't you tell me about Maurice?" 
Eliana snapped at him. 
"Don't you think you owe me an explanation?" 
She was seething with anger.
Branson responded in a serious tone, "I'm trying to protect you! You've been hurt enough by Maurice.Aileen and Adrian will not have a happy life with him.If you and the kids go back to the White family, I can better ensure your safety." 
"What makes you think you can decide for me?" Eliana backed away from Branson, firm in her resolve. 
"I don't need your protection." 
Branson lost his patience when he realized it was impossible to get her on the same page as him.He was ready for the use of force. 
"since you won't listen to me, don't blame me for being rude," he warned her. 
Eliana narrowed her eyes, sensing trouble. 
"What do you want to do? This is the Moran family!" she said loudly, making sure he was aware of where they were. 
Branson scowled and ordered his bodyguard, "Get her!" 
Just as the situation was about to escalate, Maurice suddenly appeared. 
"Let me see who dares to do that!" he shouted as he came down the stairs. 
He then rushed to Eliana and held her hand. 
"Branson, this is the Moran family.It's bold of you to think that you can take my woman away!" 
Branson snorted, "Seriously, Maurice? Your woman? Your new girlfriend was cozying up in your hospital bed the other day.And you have the nerve to talk about ‘your woman’?" 
Both Maurice and Branson were fuming with anger.
Just then, Eliana raised her hand and spoke up. 
"Actually, that girlfriend you're referring to is me." 
Branson was taken aback, "Wait, have you regained your memory?" 
Eliana shook her head, "No, not yet." 
Branson breathed a sigh of relief. 
As long as Eliana didn't remember her past with Maurice and didn't have strong feelings for him, he still had a chance. 
"Eliana, don't worry.It's not your fault that you don't remember.Once you do, you'll realize how much Maurice hurt you.It was he who got you kidnapped from the wedding by the Stone family.Aileen and Adrian were also deceived by him." 
The sincere look on Branson's face got Eliana confused. 
Did Maurice really hurt her? Was he truly a bad guy? The doubts were creeping in, and Elaina wasn’t sure whom to believe.She held her head tightly with a sad expression on her face. 
Every time she tried to recall a memory, her head felt like it was being pricked with a needle. 
Branson was becoming increasingly impatient. 
"Eliana, forget about Maurice.Your real family is the White family.Let's get out of here!" 
"Shut up!" 
Maurice bellowed.He dropped Eliana's hand and held her face with both hands.
"Eliana, what's wrong? Are you okay?" 
"Maurice, my head hurts!" 
Elaina was covered in sweat.She clenched her face in pain as she felt like a stick was stirring in her head. 
Maurice's heart raced with panic as he exclaimed, "Don't worry, I'm here for you.Let's get you to the hospital immediately!" 
With Eliana in his arms, he turned to leave. 
But how could Branson stand by and let Maurice take her away from him? He blocked their way and demanded, "Where do you think you're taking her? Put Eliana down!" 
"Get out of my way!" Maurice was infuriated. 
Blue veins became prominent on the forehead.He was about to lose it and give Branson a punch, but he held back since he was holding Eliana. 
Seeing that he wouldn't back down, Branson threatened him loudly, "Maurice, if you take Eliana away, you'll be going against the White family.Do you really want to do that?"
###Chapter 737 We Have A Lifetime To Create New Memories
Immediately Branson was done talking, Maurice stopped. 
Branson thought his threat had done the trick. 
"The Moran family is in trouble.The theme park project has stalled and stock prices are plummeting.If you mess with the White family, the Moran Group will suffer.Don't you care about that?" 
Maurice's expression turned grave.He turned around to face Branson. 
"I don't want Eliana to be caught between the dilemma with me and the White family.However, if you and your people want a fight, I won't back down," he said firmly before leaving. 
Eliana had listened to their conversation.She was now leaning against Maurice's warm chest, listening to his strong heartbeat.She felt an overwhelming sense of relief. 
Maurice brought her to the bedroom and immediately called the doctor to check her. 
Maurice was so worried. 
"Doctor, Eliana has been complaining of a headache.Should we be worried about anything?" He asked the doctor when he arrived. 
After the examination, the doctor reviewed Eliana's medical records and furrowed his brow. 
"Miss Pierce, you've suffered serious brain damage resulting in amnesia.It's best not to force yourself to remember things as it will only cause you more pain." Maurice's eyes dimmed as the doctor spoke. 
Eliana felt a bit helpless. 
"Doctor, are there other quick ways to get back my memory?" she asked the doctor, hoping for a positive answer.
Maurice immediately opposed Eliana. 
"It's not necessary for you to remember the past." Eliana was perplexed. 
"Why? Is there something you don't want me to recollect?" 
"No." 
Maurice squatted down and held her hand, looking at her with patience and tenderness. 
"I will tell you all you want to know, Eliana.I swore to never lie to you.Those vows are still valid even if you don't remember them." 
Eliana was startled. 
"I can't just allow myself to lose my memory.Those are a part of me.Don't you want me to remember what took place between us?" 
Maurice shook his head and stared at Eliana affectionately. 
"It doesn't matter if you can't remember.We still have a lifetime to create new memories together." 
Eliana was moved by his words.She had a feeling that the man in her memory was different from the man he was now, and Maurice must have changed a lot for her.But she was still troubled by what Branson had said earlier. 
"What about the White family?" 
Maurice stroked her face and assured her, "Don't worry.I will take care of everything." 
In the evening, Eliana and Maurice ate with their kids.
While they ate, Silas spoke up hesitantly. 
"Aun...Eliana, is everything okay?" 
Maurice had told him that Eliana had lost her memory, which meant that she didn't remember him anymore.So, he felt too awkward to address her as ‘aunt’. 
Silas was visibly nervous which made Eliana feel sorry for him.She thought he was a cute boy and liked him a lot. 
"You are Silas, right? You are Maurice's nephew.If you want, you can call me ‘aunt’." 
Silas’s face lit up immediately and he called her in the cutest voice. 
"Aunt!" 
Eliana responded with a smile, "Yes!" 
Later, after they ate, the three kids took turns to shower and then went to bed obediently. 
Eliana looked at the children as they slept soundly in the dim light of the small night lamp.She felt a happiness that she hadn't experienced in a long time.She stood quietly by their bedside until Maurice came over and called out to her, "Let's go." 
Eliana was drawn back to the present.She gently tucked the children in before heading back to the room with Maurice. 
Maurice held Eliana tightly on the bed and said softly, "you must be tired.Go to sleep now." 
He was feeling sleepy himself and his eyes were slowly closing.But Eliana couldn't fall asleep.She tossed and turned in his arms, feeling like something was missing.
Maurice noticed that she was restless.He was troubled and asked her nervously, "What's wrong? Are you feeling uncomfortable again?" 
"Did I wake you up?" Eliana blushed in the dark. 
Maurice assumed that Eliana couldn't sleep with him next to her, so he kissed her on the forehead and got up from the bed. 
"Go to sleep. I'll sleep in the study." 
However, before Maurice took a step, Eliana tightly grabbed him by his clothes.
###Chapter 738 Regain Memory
Eliana felt embarrassed. She looked at Maurice and asked hesitantly, "Maurice, is there anything we haven't done?"
Maurice looked puzzled. "What do you mean?"
Eliana's cheeks flushed as she struggled to find the right words. She cleared her throat and said, "I mean… Have we really been close before?"
Maurice was taken aback. He stared at Eliana's delicate face and swallowed hard. "Why did you ask that?"
Eliana bit her lip and her face grew redder. "Well, I remembered something when we were together yesterday, and…"
She didn't need to speak further.
Maurice's eyes softened and he was filled with emotion. He pulled Eliana close, raising her chin and kissing her gently.
The air was filled with so much tenderness for a moment.
Maurice finally released Eliana when she was out of breath. He looked deep into her eyes and smiled tenderly.
"Don't worry. As your husband, it's my duty to help you remember everything."
Eliana's heart raced as he spoke, and she couldn't help clenching her fists. However, she didn't pull away from him. She closed her eyes and took a deep breath. Her eyelids fluttered slightly, which exposed the restlessness she was feeling.
Staring at his beautiful wife, Maurice's heart swelled with more affection. He leaned in and kissed her softly, whispering, "Just relax. I'll take care of you."
Maurice spoke in a soft tone that made Eliana feel relaxed. He gently held her close and kissed her passionately, showing his love for every part of her.
Eliana was too shy to open her eyes, but she could feel the warmth of Maurice's kisses. He kissed her scars — the back of her hand and the scar left on her belly from years ago.
"Please, don't touch that!" Eliana gasped for breath and tried to pull away, but Maurice held her close and continued to show his affection.
There was no way she could leave.
After kissing her scars, Maurice held her in his arms and spoke to her with a shaky voice. "Eliana, I messed up. I should have protected you better and spared you all that pain."
Eliana's heart swelled with emotion. She slowly opened her eyes and saw that his eyes were heavy with regret.
"From now on, I promise to carry the weight of your scars. Your suffering will be turned into joy," Maurice vowed, looking at her with tender affection.
At that moment, Eliana felt intoxicated by his love. A sense of relief washed over her, and she let her guard down completely. It was almost surreal that there was someone out there who would love and accept her unconditionally.
This man was not just holding her body — he was embracing her soul.
Eliana felt like she was having a long dream. In the dream, she and Maurice had gone through so much together. They had gotten to know each other, misunderstood each other, and eventually fallen deeply in love. They had faced all sorts of obstacles but ultimately got married. And then the accident happened…
The next morning, when Eliana woke up, Maurice was no longer by her side.
All of these memories were not just figments of her imagination. The sweet and painful experiences they had shared together were real. It all came rushing back to her.
Eliana covered her face with her hands and cried tears of joy. She was a terrible wife for not remembering her own husband.
As she rushed out of the room, Eliana saw Maurice bustling about in the kitchen, with their three children lending a hand.
"Mommy!" "Aunt!" They were overjoyed to see her.
Maurice turned around and caught sight of his wife. Smiling warmly at her, he said, "You're finally awake. Why don't you go freshen up before breakfast?"
Eliana was completely stunned. Everything seemed like a dream. She was so lucky to have a loving husband and adorable kids by her side.
At that moment, all the difficulties she had faced seemed insignificant. It was as if nothing else mattered.
"Okay," Eliana responded as she got emotional.
###Chapter 739 Her Apology
They had a happy breakfast. 
After that, Maurice went to work. 
There were a lot of things to deal with at the company. 
After Maurice and the children left, Eliana was home alone.Her expression suddenly turned serious and she pulled out her phone to call Branson.She couldn't just sit around and do nothing.She had to protect her family! To do this, she must take the initiative to deal with the White family. 
"Eliana!" 
Branson was stunned when he saw an incoming call from her.He asked anxiously, "Have you finally figured it out?" 
Eliana didn't answer, but said in a low voice, "Branson, we need to talk about something.Let's meet." 
Branson was surprised by her request.He felt a little strange. 
After a short while, he said, "Well, I happen to have something to show you.Come to the White family." 
Eliana didn't want to waste time on the phone, so she agreed.She then got dressed and went straight to the White family.When she entered the living room of the White family villa, she was stunned by what Branson did. 
"Eliana, look who I have caught for you." 
Branson dragged a tied-up Harriet and threw her in front of Eliana. 
Lying on the floor at Eliana's feet, Harriet wasn't as arrogant and overbearing as before.
Instead, she looked terrible now. 
Harriet's head was lowered, with her long hair covering her face. 
Eliana almost didn't recognize her. 
Branson said arrogantly, "This woman is Harriet.She is the one who hurt you before.I brought her here today so that you can get even with her." 
Seeing the woman so miserable now, Eliana didn't feel the joy she thought she would.She only felt a kind of pity for Harriet. 
"What happened to her?" Eliana asked Branson. 
Branson sneered, "She deserves it.She's just been diagnosed with terminal liver cancer and has only a few months to live.But even that can’t make up for her crime.Maurice didn't punish her, but the White family won't let her go." 
Eliana eyes widened in shock! Harriet had terminal liver cancer? Seeing that Harriet was motionless, Branson asked his man to pull her head up. 
"Apologize to Eliana!" Branson ordered. 
Harriet was forced to raise her head.Her face was pale and she looked really miserable. 
After all, she was so humiliated now. 
"Eliana...I'm sorry!" Harriet said, gritting her teeth. 
Eliana remained silent. 
"Anything else?" Branson asked Harriet in a cold tone.
"Eliana has lost her memory, so you'd better tell her the whole story!" he added, giving Harriet a threatening look. 
Harriet trembled with fear and explained quickly, "Actually...It was Maurice who asked me to do what I did." 
Eliana frowned and glared at the woman in front of her. 
"Did you just say it was Maurice who asked to you to do it?" Harriet glanced at Branson with a guilty look. 
Then she gritted her teeth and nodded. 
"Yes! It was him! I had sex with him long before you got married.On your wedding day, Maurice asked me to take you away and kill you.When I realized that I could not kill you, I changed my mind and asked the White family to save you.It was all Maurice’s plan." 
After saying that, Harriet closed her eyes, trembling all over.She didn't want to die or offend the White family, so she had to lie. 
Eliana listened to the woman in front of her in silence.It seemed that Eliana believed what Harriet had said. 
Seeing that, a hint of slyness flashed through Branson's eyes.He stood up and said seriously, "Eliana, now you know what kind of person Maurice is.He has been lying to you the whole time." 
"Are you done?" 
With a slight smile, Eliana lowered her head and looked at Harriet mockingly. 
"Harriet, your acting is much worse than before."
Hearing Eliana's words, both Harriet and Branson were flabbergasted. 
Then Harriet widened her eyes in horror, "Did you just say ‘before’? You remember everything?" 
Eliana glared at Harriet coldly and spat, "Yes, I remember everything.I remember all the times you tried to harm me, but you always failed in the end.I also remember how determined Maurice has been to choose me every time.And the reason why I left on the wedding day was to protect my family.I think we're the same in that way at least."
###Chapter 740 The Real Purpose Of Branson
"This is all your fault.It's because of you I'm in this mess.I hate you!" 
Harriet shouted at Eliana. 
Eliana's presence filled her heart with stubbornness and malice. 
The Stone Family had fallen apart, and she had cancer. 
How could the person responsible for all this get to be with the man she loved, and marry into a wealthy family? She despised her a lot! Harriet was consumed by hatred, all she wanted was for Eliana to suffer.She used all her might to stand up. 
"I'm going to kill you!" she screamed as she ran into Eliana. 
Eliana kicked her aside immediately. 
"Why are you still so stubborn, Harriet?" Harriet was on the floor with blood-shot eyes.She tried to get up to attack again, but her body was too weak. 
Elaina watched her coldly. 
"Because I hate you so much! You deserve to die! Fuck you! Kill me if you dare! Otherwise, I'm going to murder you and your children." Harriet had gone nuts.She continued swearing at Eliana.She looked deplorable and vile. 
Eliana wasn't in the mood to entertain her antics anymore. 
"Harriet, you are dying.Cancer is already killing you, so I don’t have to do anything.In fact, I might pay someone to keep you alive so you can suffer longer." 
"Eliana! You bitch! I won't let you get away with it, even if I die!" Harriet seemed crazy.
Branson's men took her away. 
Eliana and Branson were the only people left in the room. 
Branson realized that he couldn't trick Eliana any longer. 
"Elaina, let me tell you what happened after your memory loss," he said hurriedly. 
"No," Eliana interrupted coldly. 
"I have recovered my memory. I don't need an explanation from you. I won't believe a word you say." 
Branson didn't stop. 
"I'm doing this for you. Leave Maurice, and the White family will acknowledge Aileen and Adrian." 
"My children don't need the White family's acceptance. They belong to the Moran family and I belong to the Pierce family. Since the White family didn't come through for me before, please don't harass me in the future," Eliana warned him harshly. She didn't appreciate what Branson said at all. 
Branson's expression darkened. 
"Eliana, do you have to be so harsh?" 
"I'm not done talking," Elaina said immediately. She didn't have time to dilly-dally with Branson. 
"I know what you want.I will give up all my property in White family as compensation for saving me.Are you satisfied now?" 
Branson's expression darkened further. 
There was no time to pretend to be sad.He felt ashamed as his secret was revealed.
Eliana knew why Branson had insisted on escorting her back to the White family.Because her mother had left her some property as inheritance in the White family. 
When the Pierce family fell apart, the White family didn't show them support. 
Now, the White family was doing their best to prevent her from marrying Maurice. 
Elaina was convinced that there was a motive behind this. 
"Am I correct?" 
She was so direct that Branson was speechless. 
In fact, Elaina was right. 
If she had a good rapport with the White family, they would not care that some of their property went to her.But her engagement to Maurice, a descendant of their long-time rival, the future master of the Morans, made them uncomfortable. 
They hated to think that their money would be used in any way for the Moran family. 
"Seeing that you knew my motive all along, I apologize for disappointing you." 
Branson sighed. 
Eliana laughed at his apology.She had no expectations whatsoever, so she was never disappointed. 
"Don't bother! I know you did all these to protect the White family.As for my Mother's shares, I will let them go.Call a lawyer and ask them to draw up a contract.I will sign it, and you can get it notarized.Let's end this struggle immediately."
Elaina's determination was clear on her face. 
Branson knew that she had made up her mind and would pay no attention to his advice.He shook his head helplessly. 
"Alright, as you please," he said.
###Chapter 741 Untie The Hatred
Branson's lawyer wasted no time in drafting the property waiver agreement. 
Once the document was ready, he handed it over to Eliana.She signed it with no hesitation, as though the money she had just given up held no value to her. 
As she was about to take her leave, Branson's secretary burst into the room. 
"Mr.White, I have some terrible news! Maurice and his men have broken in!" 
Branson was taken aback by the sudden news.He instinctively looked over at Eliana and questioned, "Did you tell him to come here?" 
Eliana appeared bewildered and shook her head in response. 
The secretary spoke urgently, "Not only the Moran family, but also the Deleon family and the Todd family have arrived.They have surrounded the White family as we speak." 
Just then, Maurice barged in with a group of men. 
Branson stood up, faced Maurice, and demanded, "Maurice, what's going on? Are you here to fight the White family?" 
Maurice glared, looking furious. 
"And what if I am?" 
Worried that a fight would break out, Eliana stepped forward and yelled, "Maurice, everything's fine.Don't do anything rash!" 
Maurice’s eyes bulged with anger, and the veins on his neck protruded prominently.
However, he regained his composure when he laid eyes on his wife, who was standing unharmed in front of him. 
"Mommy!" 
Aileen and Adrian cried and rushed towards her. 
"You scared us, Mommy.We thought you went missing again!" 
Aileen exclaimed, her face streaked with tears. 
Adrian also had a very dull countenance as he wrapped his arms around her neck tightly. 
Eliana felt sorry for her children and immediately tried to soothe them. 
"It's okay, don't cry.Mommy's here with you now, right?" 
Maurice glared at Branson as he stood in front of the three of them. 
"Branson, no one can mess with me repeatedly.You're asking for trouble!" 
Branson's laughter echoed through the room as he replied, "Alright then.Let's resolve this today!" 
Realizing that things were escalating quickly, Eliana intervened, "Stop! Branson didn't kidnap me.I came here on my own." 
"On your own?" Maurice repeated. 
Did Eliana want to return to the White family? Maurice’s eyes narrowed, and he turned to look at Eliana. 
"Why?"
Eliana smiled and handed Maurice the document. 
"Read it and see for yourself." 
Maurice took the document. 
After he looked through it briefly, he appeared startled. 
"Eliana, what are you doing?" 
Eliana took Maurice's hand and replied, "I gave up the White family property.Are you okay with that? I'm completely broke now.Are you still interested in being with me?" 
"Eliana, you remember everything now!" 
Maurice was momentarily speechless before realizing what had just happened. 
"Yes." Eliana nodded, smiling widely. 
Maurice couldn't contain his joy, so he pulled Eliana into a tight embrace. 
Overwhelmed with emotion, he struggled to articulate his feelings. 
"I want to be with you, Eliana.I want you even more now!" 
"There are numerous people here! Watch what you say and do." 
Eliana felt a bit embarrassed.She pushed him aside, took a deep breath to regain her composure, and turned to Branson. 
"Sorry about that.My husband is a little hot-headed.I apologize for what just happened."
Eliana handed the document back to Branson, then walked over to Maurice. 
At this point, Maurice had also calmed down.He took Eliana’s hand and looked at Branson with a serious expression. 
"Branson, I don't know your family’s thoughts, but as long as Eliana is safe, I don't care about what happened between the Moran family and the White family in the past.I'm going to be the new head of the Moran family, and I won't give room for any more disputes between our families." 
Branson wore a mixed expression as he tightly clutched the document.He let out a sigh of relief and nodded his head. 
"Alright, I get it." 
It was time to let go, and he knew it.He looked at Eliana with a sincerity he had never shown before. 
"Eliana, even though you've made your choice, remember that the White family will always be your home.Welcome back anytime.If this man ever treats you wrong, the White family will come to your rescue and teach him a lesson." 
Before Eliana could respond, Maurice furrowed his brow and interrupted him. 
"Don't talk nonsense.It’s never going to happen.Don't get involved in our family issues from now on." 
With that, he grabbed Eliana and their kids and stormed out of the room. 
Eliana felt a little helpless but decided to let her husband have his moment of childishness.She turned around and nodded at Branson. 
Looking at the family as they left, Branson eventually made up his mind to let go of her. 
"Eliana, I really hope you find happiness this time."
###Chapter 742 Happy Ending
After leaving the White family villa, Maurice took Eliana and the children directly to the Moran family's old house. 
When Eliana saw Maurice's grandparents, she had mixed feelings. 
Earle smiled at Eliana and said kindly. 
"I dare not imagine how much you suffered.It's a good thing you're back home!" 
Earle's attitude towards Eliana had improved a lot.Now he didn't care that she was a member of the White family. 
""Great-grandpa!" 
The twins shouted happily as they rushed to Earle. 
The old man was so happy to be surrounded by his great grandchildren and his sadness eased a little. 
At this moment, tears welled up in Nancy's eyes.She held Eliana's hand and said guiltily, "You've been through a lot, and it's our fault.We didn't even give you a decent wedding." 
"Grandma, don't worry.It doesn't matter," Eliana said, patting Nancy's hand. 
However, Nancy quickly refuted. 
"No! My husband and I missed your wedding last time, which is a very bad thing.Under no circumstances should an elder fail to attend the wedding of a junior member.I promise to organize a better wedding for you and Maurice!" 
Nancy seemed so enthusiastic about arranging a better wedding for Eliana and Maurice that Eliana didn't have the heart to say no.She nodded her head in agreement.
"Okay, grandma." 
"Great! I'll get to it right away." 
After saying so, Nancy immediately went away. 
After Nancy left, Maurice walked over to Eliana. 
Seeing that she didn't look well, he asked in a low voice, "What's wrong?" 
Maurice's concerned voice brought Eliana back to her senses and she explained, "Grandma said she would prepare a better wedding ceremony for us." 
Maurice was puzzled. 
"Isn't that a good thing?" 
Biting her bottom lip, Eliana explained, "After everything that happened at our wedding ceremony last time, I'm a little apprehensive about a second wedding to be honest." 
Maurice understood how Eliana felt.He subconsciously looked at her right hand, which was still weak now, and felt heartbroken.He gave her a gentle kiss on the forehead and promised, "Don't be afraid.I'll take care of everything." 
Soon, it was Maurice and Eliana's wedding day. 
Not only was the venue exceptional, with magnificent decorations, but the weather was also favorable with radiant sunshine.It looked like a fairy tale wedding. 
Since this was Eliana and Maurice's second wedding, everyone seemed much more adept at what they had to do.It was Wyatt who for the past few months had been preparing the buffet.
The wedding food and decoration were more exquisite than before. 
Nana and Corbin carefully checked the identity of each of the guests in order to prevent the incident from last time from happening again. 
A woman with big sunglasses and a wide hat suddenly showed up. 
Nana immediately stopped her. 
"Who are you? You can't get in until I've checked your identity." The woman quickly took off her sunglasses. 
"It's me!" she shouted excitedly. 
"Nicole!" Nana exclaimed in surprise. 
"I've been filming lately.I have to dress up like this to avoid the paparazzi," Nicole explained. 
While they were talking, Nicole suddenly saw a lovely diamond ring on Nana's finger.She immediately understood what it meant and smiled. 
"It looks like you will be getting married soon. Congratulations!" 
Nana's face flushed with shyness.She quickly changed the topic. 
"Well, stop talking about me.Come on in!" 
Soon, everyone took their seats. 
Nancy and Earle sat in the front row with the twins. 
Wyatt had volunteered to be the host this time.
When everyone was seated, he took the stage and excitedly announced, "Now let's welcome the bride and groom!" 
However, for a long time, there was no movement. 
Standing alone on stage, Wyatt felt quite embarrassed.Everyone was confused. 
Then, Nicole received a video call from Eliana.Eliana said a few words to Nicole who suddenly became in a better mood. 
With a smile, Nicole asked the staff to connect the video to the screen. 
The guests were stunned to see that the bride and groom wouldn't attend their own wedding. 
On the big screen, Eliana and Maurice were seen going on their honeymoon trip. 
Eliana wore a white wedding dress, while Maurice was dressed in a custom-made suit. 
"I'm sorry, everyone.I have run away from the wedding with my wife and we are on our way to go on our honeymoon.Today's ceremony is to make up for our mistakes from the last time.As for me and Eliana, please don't worry about us." 
Smiling happily, Maurice hugged Eliana tightly. 
"What a bastard!" 
Earle snapped. 
Sure, the old man felt angry. 
However, he couldn't help laughing.
Staring at the screen, Aileen asked in confusion, "Why don't mommy and daddy take us with them since they are traveling?" 
Adrian rolled his eyes and replied, "Daddy probably forced mommy to go with him!" 
Silas, on the other hand, was silent for a moment. 
Then he asked excitedly, "Hey, do you think we can eat more candies since they have left?" 
All of a sudden, the three children looked at each other and smiled. 
After hanging up, Eliana and Maurice got into the red convertible that was waiting for them by the sea. 
A gust of wind blew Eliana's veil away. 
"Oh no, my veil!" 
Eliana subconsciously tried to catch it, but she was held by Maurice. 
"Mrs.Moran, be careful!" 
Eliana gave up trying to catch the veil and looked at her husband with a smile. 
"Okay!" 
"Let's go!" 
The newlyweds drove the convertible into a promising future. 
One thing was certain, Eliana and Maurice would never be separated again.
